authors_text: Ritik Batra,Narjes Pourjafarian,Samantha Chang,Margaret Tsai,Jacob Revelo,Cindy Hsin-Liu Kao
title: texTENG: Fabricating Wearable Textile-Based Triboelectric Nanogenerators
title_zh: texTENG：制造基于纺织品的可穿戴摩擦纳米发电机
abstract: Recently, there has been a surge of interest in sustainable energy sources, particularly for wearable computing. Triboelectric nanogenerators (TENGs) have shown promise in converting human motion into electric power. Textile-based TENGs, valued for their flexibility and breathability, offer an ideal form factor for wearables. However, uptake in maker communities has been slow due to commercially unavailable materials, complex fabrication processes, and structures incompatible with human motion. This paper introduces texTENG, a textile-based framework simplifying the fabrication of power harvesting and self-powered sensing applications. By leveraging accessible materials and familiar tools, texTENG bridges the gap between advanced TENG research and wearable applications. We explore a design menu for creating multidimensional TENG structures using braiding, weaving, and knitting. Technical evaluations and example applications highlight the performance and feasibility of these designs, offering DIY-friendly pathways for fabricating textile-based TENGs and promoting sustainable prototyping practices within the HCI and maker communities.
summary: Recently, there has been a surge of interest in sustainable energy sources, particularly for wearable computing. Triboelectric nanogenerators (TENGs) have shown promise in converting human motion into electric power. Textile-based TENGs, valued for their flexibility and breathability, offer an ideal form factor for wearables. However, uptake in maker communities has been slow due to commercially unavailable materials, complex fabrication processes, and structures incompatible with human motion. This paper introduces texTENG, a textile-based framework simplifying the fabrication of power harvesting and self-powered sensing applications. By leveraging accessible materials and familiar tools, texTENG bridges the gap between advanced TENG research and wearable applications. We explore a design menu for creating multidimensional TENG structures using braiding, weaving, and knitting. Technical evaluations and example applications highlight the performance and feasibility of these designs, offering DIY-friendly pathways for fabricating textile-based TENGs and promoting sustainable prototyping practices within the HCI and maker communities.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对可持续能源的兴趣激增，特别是可穿戴计算。摩擦纳米发电机 (TENG) 在将人体运动转化为电能方面表现出了良好的前景。基于纺织品的 TENG 因其灵活性和透气性而受到重视，为可穿戴设备提供了理想的外形尺寸。然而，由于商业上无法获得的材料、复杂的制造工艺以及与人体运动不相容的结构，创客社区的吸收一直很缓慢。本文介绍了 texTENG，这是一种基于纺织品的框架，可简化电力收集和自供电传感应用的制造。通过利用可获取的材料和熟悉的工具，texTENG 弥合了先进 TENG 研究和可穿戴应用之间的差距。我们探索了使用编织、机织和针织创建多维 TENG 结构的设计菜单。技术评估和示例应用突出了这些设计的性能和可行性，为制造基于纺织品的 TENG 提供了 DIY 友好的途径，并在 HCI 和创客社区内推广可持续的原型制作实践。

AI.tldr: 本文提出texTENG框架，通过纺织技术简化可穿戴式摩擦纳米发电机的制作，促进可持续原型开发。
AI.motivation: 现有纺织型TENG因材料不可得、工艺复杂及结构不兼容人体运动，难以被创客社区广泛采用。
AI.method: 利用编织、编织和针织技术设计多维TENG结构，结合易获取材料与通用工具实现简易制作。
AI.result: 技术评估与应用案例验证了设计的性能可行性，为DIY纺织TENG提供了可操作路径。
AI.conclusion: texTENG弥合了先进TENG研究与可穿戴应用间的差距，推动HCI和创客社区的可持续原型实践。

authors_text: Rui Cao
title: Online Misinformation Detection in Live Streaming Videos
title_zh: 直播视频中的在线错误信息检测
comment: First prize winner in the Smart City Challenge in the 16th ACM international WSDM conference(WSDM), 2023
comments: First prize winner in the Smart City Challenge in the 16th ACM international WSDM conference(WSDM), 2023
abstract: Online misinformation detection is an important issue and methods are proposed to detect and curb misinformation in various forms. However, previous studies are conducted in an offline manner. We claim a realistic misinformation detection setting that has not been studied yet is online misinformation detection in live streaming videos (MDLS). In the proposal, we formulate the problem of MDLS and illustrate the importance and the challenge of the task. Besides, we propose feasible ways of developing the problem into AI challenges as well as potential solutions to the problem.
summary: Online misinformation detection is an important issue and methods are proposed to detect and curb misinformation in various forms. However, previous studies are conducted in an offline manner. We claim a realistic misinformation detection setting that has not been studied yet is online misinformation detection in live streaming videos (MDLS). In the proposal, we formulate the problem of MDLS and illustrate the importance and the challenge of the task. Besides, we propose feasible ways of developing the problem into AI challenges as well as potential solutions to the problem.
abstract_zh: 在线错误信息检测是一个重要问题，人们提出了检测和遏制各种形式的错误信息的方法。然而，之前的研究都是以离线方式进行的。我们声称尚未研究的现实错误信息检测设置是直播视频中的在线错误信息检测（MDLS）。在提案中，我们阐述了 MDLS 问题并说明了该任务的重要性和挑战。此外，我们提出了将问题发展为人工智能挑战的可行方法以及问题的潜在解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线直播视频虚假信息检测新场景（MDLS），并探讨其问题定义、挑战及解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多为离线检测，而直播视频的实时性与传播特性使在线检测成为亟待解决的新问题。
AI.method: 将MDLS问题形式化，设计AI挑战赛框架，并提出潜在解决方案以应对实时性与数据动态性挑战。
AI.result: 构建了MDLS问题的理论框架，提出可行的AI竞赛形式与技术方向，为后续研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 在线直播虚假信息检测具有重要现实意义，需进一步开发高效算法与评估指标以应对实际应用需求。

We claim a realistic misinformation detection setting that has not been studied yet is online misinformation detection in live streaming videos (MDLS). In the proposal, we formulate the problem of MDLS and illustrate the importance and the challenge of the task. Besides, we propose feasible ways of developing the problem into AI challenges as well as potential solutions to the problem. 在线错误信息检测是一个重要问题，人们提出了检测和遏制各种形式的错误信息的方法。然而，之前的研究都是以离线方式进行的。我们声称尚未研究的现实错误信息检测设置是直播视频中的在线错误信息检测（MDLS）。在提案中，我们阐述了 MDLS 问题并说明了该任务的重要性和挑战。此外，我们提出了将问题发展为人工智能挑战的可行方法以及问题的潜在解决方案。 本文提出在线直播视频虚假信息检测新场景（MDLS），并探讨其问题定义、挑战及解决方案。 Rui Cao cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Leonardo Rosa Amado,Adriano Vogel,Dalvan Griebler,Gabriel Paludo Licks,Eric Simon,Felipe Meneguzzi
title: Automated Planning for Optimal Data Pipeline Instantiation
title_zh: 最佳数据管道实例化的自动规划
abstract: Data pipeline frameworks provide abstractions for implementing sequences of data-intensive transformation operators, automating the deployment and execution of such transformations in a cluster. Deploying a data pipeline, however, requires computing resources to be allocated in a data center, ideally minimizing the overhead for communicating data and executing operators in the pipeline while considering each operator's execution requirements. In this paper, we model the problem of optimal data pipeline deployment as planning with action costs, where we propose heuristics aiming to minimize total execution time. Experimental results indicate that the heuristics can outperform the baseline deployment and that a heuristic based on connections outperforms other strategies.
summary: Data pipeline frameworks provide abstractions for implementing sequences of data-intensive transformation operators, automating the deployment and execution of such transformations in a cluster. Deploying a data pipeline, however, requires computing resources to be allocated in a data center, ideally minimizing the overhead for communicating data and executing operators in the pipeline while considering each operator's execution requirements. In this paper, we model the problem of optimal data pipeline deployment as planning with action costs, where we propose heuristics aiming to minimize total execution time. Experimental results indicate that the heuristics can outperform the baseline deployment and that a heuristic based on connections outperforms other strategies.
abstract_zh: 数据管道框架提供了用于实现数据密集型转换运算符序列的抽象，从而在集群中自动部署和执行此类转换。然而，部署数据管道需要在数据中心分配计算资源，理想情况下最大限度地减少管道中数据通信和执行运算符的开销，同时考虑每个运算符的执行要求。在本文中，我们将最优数据管道部署问题建模为具有行动成本的规划，其中我们提出了旨在最小化总执行时间的启发式方法。实验结果表明，启发式方法可以优于基线部署，并且基于连接的启发式方法优于其他策略。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何通过自动化规划实现最优数据流水线的实例化，以优化资源分配和减少执行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有数据流水线部署方法在资源分配和执行效率上存在不足，需优化以减少通信开销和执行时间。
AI.method: 将最优数据流水线部署建模为带有动作成本的规划问题，提出启发式算法，尤其是基于连接的启发式策略，以最小化总执行时间。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的启发式方法在总执行时间上优于基线方法，其中基于连接的启发式策略表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的启发式方法能有效优化数据流水线部署，其中基于连接的策略在减少执行时间方面表现突出，为相关领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Vrushank Ahire,Kunal Shah,Mudasir Nazir Khan,Nikhil Pakhale,Lownish Rai Sookha,M. A. Ganaie,Abhinav Dhall
title: MAVEN: Multi-modal Attention for Valence-Arousal Emotion Network
title_zh: MAVEN：价-唤醒情感网络的多模态注意力
abstract: Dynamic emotion recognition in the wild remains challenging due to the transient nature of emotional expressions and temporal misalignment of multi-modal cues. Traditional approaches predict valence and arousal and often overlook the inherent correlation between these two dimensions. The proposed Multi-modal Attention for Valence-Arousal Emotion Network (MAVEN) integrates visual, audio, and textual modalities through a bi-directional cross-modal attention mechanism. MAVEN uses modality-specific encoders to extract features from synchronized video frames, audio segments, and transcripts, predicting emotions in polar coordinates following Russell's circumplex model. The evaluation of the Aff-Wild2 dataset using MAVEN achieved a concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) of 0.3061, surpassing the ResNet-50 baseline model with a CCC of 0.22. The multistage architecture captures the subtle and transient nature of emotional expressions in conversational videos and improves emotion recognition in real-world situations. The code is available at: https://github.com/Vrushank-Ahire/MAVEN_8th_ABAW
summary: Dynamic emotion recognition in the wild remains challenging due to the transient nature of emotional expressions and temporal misalignment of multi-modal cues. Traditional approaches predict valence and arousal and often overlook the inherent correlation between these two dimensions. The proposed Multi-modal Attention for Valence-Arousal Emotion Network (MAVEN) integrates visual, audio, and textual modalities through a bi-directional cross-modal attention mechanism. MAVEN uses modality-specific encoders to extract features from synchronized video frames, audio segments, and transcripts, predicting emotions in polar coordinates following Russell's circumplex model. The evaluation of the Aff-Wild2 dataset using MAVEN achieved a concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) of 0.3061, surpassing the ResNet-50 baseline model with a CCC of 0.22. The multistage architecture captures the subtle and transient nature of emotional expressions in conversational videos and improves emotion recognition in real-world situations. The code is available at: https://github.com/Vrushank-Ahire/MAVEN_8th_ABAW
abstract_zh: 由于情绪表达的瞬态性和多模态线索的时间错位，野外动态情绪识别仍然具有挑战性。传统方法预测效价和唤醒度，并且常常忽视这两个维度之间的内在相关性。所提出的效价唤醒情感网络多模态注意（MAVEN）通过双向跨模态注意机制集成了视觉、音频和文本模态。 MAVEN 使用特定于模态的编码器从同步视频帧、音频片段和文字记录中提取特征，并按照 Russell 的循环模型预测极坐标中的情绪。使用 MAVEN 对 Aff-Wild2 数据集的评估实现了 0.3061 的一致性相关系数 (CCC)，超过了 CCC 0.22 的 ResNet-50 基线模型。多级架构捕捉了对话视频中情绪表达的微妙和短暂的本质，并提高了现实世界中的情绪识别。代码位于：https://github.com/Vrushank-Ahire/MAVEN_8th_ABAW

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态注意机制MAVEN，用于在真实场景中通过视觉、音频和文本模态的融合提升情绪识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统情绪识别方法未能有效捕捉情绪的瞬时性和多模态线索的时间错位问题，且忽视了愉悦度与唤醒度两个维度的内在关联。
AI.method: 采用双向跨模态注意力机制，通过模态特定编码器提取同步视频帧、音频片段和文本的特征，并基于Russell环形模型在极坐标系中预测情绪。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2数据集上，MAVEN的CCC值达到0.3061，优于ResNet-50基线模型的0.22，验证了多阶段架构对细微情绪表达的捕捉能力。
AI.conclusion: MAVEN通过多模态注意力机制有效解决了情绪识别中的动态性和模态对齐问题，为真实场景下的情绪分析提供了改进方案。

authors_text: Haocheng Ren,Muzhe Wu,Gregory Croisdale,Anhong Guo,Xu Wang
title: Rubikon: Intelligent Tutoring for Rubik's Cube Learning Through AR-enabled Physical Task Reconfiguration
title_zh: Rubikon：通过支持 AR 的物理任务重新配置进行魔方学习的智能辅导
abstract: Learning to solve a Rubik's Cube requires the learners to repeatedly practice a skill component, e.g., identifying a misplaced square and putting it back. However, for 3D physical tasks such as this, generating sufficient repeated practice opportunities for learners can be challenging, in part because it is difficult for novices to reconfigure the physical object to specific states. We propose Rubikon, an intelligent tutoring system for learning to solve the Rubik's Cube. Rubikon reduces the necessity for repeated manual configurations of the Rubik's Cube without compromising the tactile experience of handling a physical cube. The foundational design of Rubikon is an AR setup, where learners manipulate a physical cube while seeing an AR-rendered cube on a display. Rubikon automatically generates configurations of the Rubik's Cube to target learners' weaknesses and help them exercise diverse knowledge components. In a between-subjects experiment, we showed that Rubikon learners scored 25% higher on a post-test compared to baselines.
summary: Learning to solve a Rubik's Cube requires the learners to repeatedly practice a skill component, e.g., identifying a misplaced square and putting it back. However, for 3D physical tasks such as this, generating sufficient repeated practice opportunities for learners can be challenging, in part because it is difficult for novices to reconfigure the physical object to specific states. We propose Rubikon, an intelligent tutoring system for learning to solve the Rubik's Cube. Rubikon reduces the necessity for repeated manual configurations of the Rubik's Cube without compromising the tactile experience of handling a physical cube. The foundational design of Rubikon is an AR setup, where learners manipulate a physical cube while seeing an AR-rendered cube on a display. Rubikon automatically generates configurations of the Rubik's Cube to target learners' weaknesses and help them exercise diverse knowledge components. In a between-subjects experiment, we showed that Rubikon learners scored 25% higher on a post-test compared to baselines.
abstract_zh: 学习解魔方需要学习者反复练习某项技能，例如识别放错位置的方块并将其放回去。然而，对于诸如此类的 3D 物理任务，为学习者提供足够的重复练习机会可能具有挑战性，部分原因是新手很难将物理对象重新配置为特定状态。我们提出了 Rubikon，一种用于学习解魔方的智能辅导系统。 Rubikon 减少了重复手动配置魔方的必要性，同时又不影响处理物理魔方的触觉体验。 Rubikon 的基本设计是 AR 设置，学习者可以在显示屏上看到 AR 渲染的立方体的同时操作物理立方体。 Rubikon 自动生成魔方的配置，以针对学习者的弱点，帮助他们锻炼不同的知识成分。在一项受试者间实验中，我们发现 Rubikon 学习者在事后测试中的得分比基线高出 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rubikon系统，通过AR技术实现物理魔方的智能重组，辅助学习者练习魔方解法。
AI.motivation: 传统魔方学习需重复手动配置物理状态，对初学者难度较高，且难以针对性练习薄弱环节。
AI.method: 基于AR的物理魔方操作界面，结合智能算法自动生成针对性练习配置，保留触觉体验并减少人工干预。
AI.result: 实验显示使用Rubikon的学习者在后测中比基准组高出25%的得分。
AI.conclusion: AR驱动的智能重组系统能有效提升魔方学习效率，通过个性化练习配置强化知识掌握。

tldr: 本文提出Rubikon系统，通过AR技术实现物理魔方的智能重组，辅助学习者练习魔方解法。
motivation: 传统魔方学习需重复手动配置物理状态，对初学者难度较高，且难以针对性练习薄弱环节。
method: 基于AR的物理魔方操作界面，结合智能算法自动生成针对性练习配置，保留触觉体验并减少人工干预。
result: 实验显示使用Rubikon的学习者在后测中比基准组高出25%的得分。
conclusion: AR驱动的智能重组系统能有效提升魔方学习效率，通过个性化练习配置强化知识掌握。
search_text: Rubikon: Intelligent Tutoring for Rubik's Cube Learning Through AR-enabled Physical Task Reconfiguration Rubikon：通过支持 AR 的物理任务重新配置进行魔方学习的智能辅导 Learning to solve a Rubik's Cube requires the learners to repeatedly practice a skill component, e.g., identifying a misplaced square and putting it back. However, for 3D physical tasks such as this, generating sufficient repeated practice opportunities for learners can be challenging, in part because it is difficult for novices to reconfigure the physical object to specific states. We propose Rubikon, an intelligent tutoring system for learning to solve the Rubik's Cube. Rubikon reduces the necessity for repeated manual configurations of the Rubik's Cube without compromising the tactile experience of handling a physical cube. The foundational design of Rubikon is an AR setup, where learners manipulate a physical cube while seeing an AR-rendered cube on a display. Rubikon automatically generates configurations of the Rubik's Cube to target learners' weaknesses and help them exercise diverse knowledge components. In a between-subjects experiment, we showed that Rubikon learners scored 25% higher on a post-test compared to baselines. 学习解魔方需要学习者反复练习某项技能，例如识别放错位置的方块并将其放回去。然而，对于诸如此类的 3D 物理任务，为学习者提供足够的重复练习机会可能具有挑战性，部分原因是新手很难将物理对象重新配置为特定状态。我们提出了 Rubikon，一种用于学习解魔方的智能辅导系统。 Rubikon 减少了重复手动配置魔方的必要性，同时又不影响处理物理魔方的触觉体验。 Rubikon 的基本设计是 AR 设置，学习者可以在显示屏上看到 AR 渲染的立方体的同时操作物理立方体。 Rubikon 自动生成魔方的配置，以针对学习者的弱点，帮助他们锻炼不同的知识成分。在一项受试者间实验中，我们发现 Rubikon 学习者在事后测试中的得分比基线高出 25%。 本文提出Rubikon系统，通过AR技术实现物理魔方的智能重组，辅助学习者练习魔方解法。 Haocheng Ren,Muzhe Wu,Gregory Croisdale,Anhong Guo,Xu Wang cs.HC,cs.ET

authors_text: Anthony Lamelas,Harrison Muchnic
title: Scaling Semantic Categories: Investigating the Impact on Vision Transformer Labeling Performance
title_zh: 扩展语义类别：调查对 Vision Transformer 标签性能的影响
comment: 4 pages, 7 figures, submitted to CVPR (feedback pending)
comments: 4 pages, 7 figures, submitted to CVPR (feedback pending)
abstract: This study explores the impact of scaling semantic categories on the image classification performance of vision transformers (ViTs). In this specific case, the CLIP server provided by Jina AI is used for experimentation. The research hypothesizes that as the number of ground truth and artificially introduced semantically equivalent categories increases, the labeling accuracy of ViTs improves until a theoretical maximum or limit is reached. A wide variety of image datasets were chosen to test this hypothesis. These datasets were processed through a custom function in Python designed to evaluate the model's accuracy, with adjustments being made to account for format differences between datasets. By exponentially introducing new redundant categories, the experiment assessed accuracy trends until they plateaued, decreased, or fluctuated inconsistently. The findings show that while semantic scaling initially increases model performance, the benefits diminish or reverse after surpassing a critical threshold, providing insight into the limitations and possible optimization of category labeling strategies for ViTs.
summary: This study explores the impact of scaling semantic categories on the image classification performance of vision transformers (ViTs). In this specific case, the CLIP server provided by Jina AI is used for experimentation. The research hypothesizes that as the number of ground truth and artificially introduced semantically equivalent categories increases, the labeling accuracy of ViTs improves until a theoretical maximum or limit is reached. A wide variety of image datasets were chosen to test this hypothesis. These datasets were processed through a custom function in Python designed to evaluate the model's accuracy, with adjustments being made to account for format differences between datasets. By exponentially introducing new redundant categories, the experiment assessed accuracy trends until they plateaued, decreased, or fluctuated inconsistently. The findings show that while semantic scaling initially increases model performance, the benefits diminish or reverse after surpassing a critical threshold, providing insight into the limitations and possible optimization of category labeling strategies for ViTs.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了缩放语义类别对视觉变换器 (ViT) 图像分类性能的影响。本具体案例使用Jina AI提供的CLIP服务器进行实验。该研究假设，随着真实数据和人为引入的语义等效类别数量的增加，ViT 的标记准确性会提高，直到达到理论最大值或极限。选择了各种各样的图像数据集来检验这一假设。这些数据集通过 Python 中的自定义函数进行处理，该函数旨在评估模型的准确性，并进行调整以考虑数据集之间的格式差异。通过以指数方式引入新的冗余类别，该实验评估了准确性趋势，直到它们趋于稳定、下降或不一致地波动。研究结果表明，虽然语义缩放最初会提高模型性能，但在超过关键阈值后，其优势会减弱或逆转，从而深入了解 ViT 类别标记策略的局限性和可能的​​优化。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了扩展语义类别对视觉Transformer（ViT）图像分类性能的影响，使用Jina AI的CLIP服务器进行实验，分析标签准确性随类别数量变化的趋势。
AI.motivation: 研究假设增加真实和人工引入的语义等价类别能提升ViT性能，但存在理论极限，需验证该假设并探索优化策略。
AI.method: 采用多种图像数据集，通过自定义Python函数处理数据格式差异，逐步指数级引入冗余类别，观察模型准确率变化趋势直至趋于稳定、下降或波动。
AI.result: 语义扩展初期提升性能，但超过临界阈值后准确率下降或波动，表明存在性能优化的类别数量限制。
AI.conclusion: 语义类别扩展对ViT性能有提升作用，但需控制在合理阈值内，为标签策略优化提供依据。

authors_text: Alessio Spagnoletti,Jean Prost,Andrés Almansa,Nicolas Papadakis,Marcelo Pereyra
title: LATINO-PRO: LAtent consisTency INverse sOlver with PRompt Optimization
title_zh: LATINO-PRO：具有提示优化的潜在一致性逆求解器
comment: 27 pages, 24 figures, International Conference on Computer Vision, ICCV 2025
comments: 27 pages, 24 figures, International Conference on Computer Vision, ICCV 2025
abstract: Text-to-image latent diffusion models (LDMs) have recently emerged as powerful generative models with great potential for solving inverse problems in imaging. However, leveraging such models in a Plug & Play (PnP), zero-shot manner remains challenging because it requires identifying a suitable text prompt for the unknown image of interest. Also, existing text-to-image PnP approaches are highly computationally expensive. We herein address these challenges by proposing a novel PnP inference paradigm specifically designed for embedding generative models within stochastic inverse solvers, with special attention to Latent Consistency Models (LCMs), which distill LDMs into fast generators. We leverage our framework to propose LAtent consisTency INverse sOlver (LATINO), the first zero-shot PnP framework to solve inverse problems with priors encoded by LCMs. Our conditioning mechanism avoids automatic differentiation and reaches SOTA quality in as little as 8 neural function evaluations. As a result, LATINO delivers remarkably accurate solutions and is significantly more memory and computationally efficient than previous approaches. We then embed LATINO within an empirical Bayesian framework that automatically calibrates the text prompt from the observed measurements by marginal maximum likelihood estimation. Extensive experiments show that prompt self-calibration greatly improves estimation, allowing LATINO with PRompt Optimization to define new SOTAs in image reconstruction quality and computational efficiency. The code is available at https://latino-pro.github.io
summary: Text-to-image latent diffusion models (LDMs) have recently emerged as powerful generative models with great potential for solving inverse problems in imaging. However, leveraging such models in a Plug & Play (PnP), zero-shot manner remains challenging because it requires identifying a suitable text prompt for the unknown image of interest. Also, existing text-to-image PnP approaches are highly computationally expensive. We herein address these challenges by proposing a novel PnP inference paradigm specifically designed for embedding generative models within stochastic inverse solvers, with special attention to Latent Consistency Models (LCMs), which distill LDMs into fast generators. We leverage our framework to propose LAtent consisTency INverse sOlver (LATINO), the first zero-shot PnP framework to solve inverse problems with priors encoded by LCMs. Our conditioning mechanism avoids automatic differentiation and reaches SOTA quality in as little as 8 neural function evaluations. As a result, LATINO delivers remarkably accurate solutions and is significantly more memory and computationally efficient than previous approaches. We then embed LATINO within an empirical Bayesian framework that automatically calibrates the text prompt from the observed measurements by marginal maximum likelihood estimation. Extensive experiments show that prompt self-calibration greatly improves estimation, allowing LATINO with PRompt Optimization to define new SOTAs in image reconstruction quality and computational efficiency. The code is available at https://latino-pro.github.io
abstract_zh: 文本到图像潜在扩散模型（LDM）最近成为强大的生成模型，在解决成像逆问题方面具有巨大潜力。然而，在即插即用（PnP）、零样本方式中利用此类模型仍然具有挑战性，因为它需要为感兴趣的未知图像识别合适的文本提示。 Also, existing text-to-image PnP approaches are highly computationally expensive.我们在此通过提出一种新颖的 PnP 推理范式来解决这些挑战，该范式专门设计用于在随机逆求解器中嵌入生成模型，并特别关注潜在一致性模型 (LCM)，它将 LDM 提炼为快速生成器。我们利用我们的框架提出了 LAtent consisTency INverse sOlver (LATINO)，这是第一个零样本 PnP 框架，用于解决由 LCM 编码的先验的逆问题。 Our conditioning mechanism avoids automatic differentiation and reaches SOTA quality in as little as 8 neural function evaluations.因此，LATINO 提供了非常准确的解决方案，并且比以前的方法具有更多的内存和计算效率。然后，我们将 LATINO 嵌入到经验贝叶斯框架中，该框架通过边际最大似然估计根据观察到的测量结果自动校准文本提示。大量实验表明，即时自校准极大地改善了估计，使 LATINO 与 PROmpt Optimization 能够在图像重建质量和计算效率方面定义新的 SOTA。 The code is available at https://latino-pro.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在一致性模型（LCMs）的零样本插件式逆问题求解框架LATINO-PRO，通过提示优化提升图像重建质量与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像的逆问题求解方法计算成本高且依赖人工设计的文本提示，难以直接应用于未知图像的零样本场景。
AI.method: 设计LATINO框架，结合LCMs的快速生成能力与提示自校准机制，通过经验贝叶斯框架实现测量数据驱动的提示优化，避免自动微分并减少神经网络调用次数。
AI.result: 在8次神经函数评估内达到SOTA重建质量，内存与计算效率显著优于现有方法，提示自校准使图像重建质量与效率均创历史新高。
AI.conclusion: LATINO-PRO通过潜在一致性模型与提示优化解决了逆问题求解的效率与零样本适配难题，为生成模型在逆问题中的应用提供了新范式。

We then embed LATINO within an empirical Bayesian framework that automatically calibrates the text prompt from the observed measurements by marginal maximum likelihood estimation. Extensive experiments show that prompt self-calibration greatly improves estimation, allowing LATINO with PRompt Optimization to define new SOTAs in image reconstruction quality and computational efficiency. The code is available at https://latino-pro.github.io 文本到图像潜在扩散模型（LDM）最近成为强大的生成模型，在解决成像逆问题方面具有巨大潜力。然而，在即插即用（PnP）、零样本方式中利用此类模型仍然具有挑战性，因为它需要为感兴趣的未知图像识别合适的文本提示。 Also, existing text-to-image PnP approaches are highly computationally expensive.我们在此通过提出一种新颖的 PnP 推理范式来解决这些挑战，该范式专门设计用于在随机逆求解器中嵌入生成模型，并特别关注潜在一致性模型 (LCM)，它将 LDM 提炼为快速生成器。我们利用我们的框架提出了 LAtent consisTency INverse sOlver (LATINO)，这是第一个零样本 PnP 框架，用于解决由 LCM 编码的先验的逆问题。 Our conditioning mechanism avoids automatic differentiation and reaches SOTA quality in as little as 8 neural function evaluations.因此，LATINO 提供了非常准确的解决方案，并且比以前的方法具有更多的内存和计算效率。然后，我们将 LATINO 嵌入到经验贝叶斯框架中，该框架通过边际最大似然估计根据观察到的测量结果自动校准文本提示。大量实验表明，即时自校准极大地改善了估计，使 LATINO 与 PROmpt Optimization 能够在图像重建质量和计算效率方面定义新的 SOTA。 The code is available at https://latino-pro.github.io 本文提出了一种基于潜在一致性模型（LCMs）的零样本插件式逆问题求解框架LATINO-PRO，通过提示优化提升图像重建质量与计算效率。 Alessio Spagnoletti,Jean Prost,Andrés Almansa,Nicolas Papadakis,Marcelo Pereyra cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Rashid Mushkani,Hugo Berard,Shin Koseki
title: Negotiative Alignment: Embracing Disagreement to Achieve Fairer Outcomes -- Insights from Urban Studies
title_zh: 谈判协调：拥抱分歧以实现更公平的结果——城市研究的见解
abstract: Urban assessments often compress diverse needs into single scores, which can obscure minority perspectives. We present a community-centered study in Montreal (n=35; wheelchair users, seniors, LGBTQIA2+ residents, and immigrants). Participants rated 20 streets (accessibility, inclusivity, aesthetics, practicality) and ranked 7 images on 12 interview-elicited criteria. Disagreement patterns were systematic in our sample: wheelchair users diverged most on accessibility and practicality; LGBTQIA2+ participants emphasized inclusion and liveliness; seniors prioritized security. Group discussion reduced information gaps but not value conflicts; ratings conveyed intensity, while rankings forced trade-offs. We then formalize negotiative alignment, a transparent, budget-aware bargaining procedure, and pilot it with role-played stakeholder agents plus a neutral mediator. Relative to the best base design under the same public rubric, the negotiated package increased total utility (21.10 to 24.55), raised the worst-group utility (3.20 to 3.90), improved twentieth percentile satisfaction (0.86 to 1.00; min-max normalized within the scenario), and reduced inequality (Gini 0.036 to 0.025). Treating disagreement as signal and reporting worst-group outcomes alongside totals may help planners and AI practitioners surface trade-offs and preserve minority priorities while maintaining efficiency.

abstract_zh: Urban assessments often compress diverse needs into single scores, which can obscure minority perspectives. We present a community-centered study in Montreal (n=35; wheelchair users, seniors, LGBTQIA2+ residents, and immigrants). Participants rated 20 streets (accessibility, inclusivity, aesthetics, practicality) and ranked 7 images on 12 interview-elicited criteria. Disagreement patterns were systematic in our sample: wheelchair users diverged most on accessibility and practicality; LGBTQIA2+ participants emphasized inclusion and liveliness;老年人优先考虑安全。 Group discussion reduced information gaps but not value conflicts; ratings conveyed intensity, while rankings forced trade-offs.然后，我们将谈判协调正式化，这是一个透明的、了解预算的谈判程序，并通过角色扮演的利益相关者代理人和中立的调解人进行试点。相对于相同公共标准下的最佳基础设计，协商的一揽子计划增加了总效用（21.10至24.55），提高了最差群体效用（3.20至3.90），提高了第20个百分点的满意度（0.86至1.00；场景内最小-最大标准化），并减少了不平等（基尼系数0.036至0.025）。将分歧视为信号并报告最差群体的结果以及总数可能有助于规划者和人工智能从业者进行权衡并在保持效率的同时保留少数优先事项。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'协商对齐'的透明协商机制，通过处理城市规划中的分歧，实现更公平的公共空间设计。
AI.motivation: 传统城市评估将多元需求简化为单一分数，导致少数群体需求被忽视，需建立能处理分歧且兼顾公平性的新方法。
AI.method: 对蒙特利尔35名弱势群体进行街道评估实验，分析分歧模式后构建包含利益相关者模拟和中立调解的协商对齐框架。
AI.result: 相较基准方案，协商方案使总效用提升16.3%，最差群体效用提高21.9%，满意度基尼系数下降24.7%。
AI.conclusion: 将分歧视为决策信号并关注最差群体指标，可帮助规划者在保持效率的同时平衡多元价值诉求。

authors_text: Yitian Shi,Di Wen,Guanqi Chen,Edgar Welte,Sheng Liu,Kunyu Peng,Rainer Stiefelhagen,Rania Rayyes
title: VISO-Grasp: Vision-Language Informed Spatial Object-centric 6-DoF Active View Planning and Grasping in Clutter and Invisibility
title_zh: VISO-Grasp：视觉语言通知空间以对象为中心的 6-DoF 主动视图规划和在杂乱和隐形中的抓取
abstract: We propose VISO-Grasp, a novel vision-language-informed system designed to systematically address visibility constraints for grasping in severely occluded environments. By leveraging Foundation Models (FMs) for spatial reasoning and active view planning, our framework constructs and updates an instance-centric representation of spatial relationships, enhancing grasp success under challenging occlusions. Furthermore, this representation facilitates active Next-Best-View (NBV) planning and optimizes sequential grasping strategies when direct grasping is infeasible. Additionally, we introduce a multi-view uncertainty-driven grasp fusion mechanism that refines grasp confidence and directional uncertainty in real-time, ensuring robust and stable grasp execution. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that VISO-Grasp achieves a success rate of $87.5\%$ in target-oriented grasping with the fewest grasp attempts outperforming baselines. To the best of our knowledge, VISO-Grasp is the first unified framework integrating FMs into target-aware active view planning and 6-DoF grasping in environments with severe occlusions and entire invisibility constraints. Code is available at: https://github.com/YitianShi/vMF-Contact
summary: We propose VISO-Grasp, a novel vision-language-informed system designed to systematically address visibility constraints for grasping in severely occluded environments. By leveraging Foundation Models (FMs) for spatial reasoning and active view planning, our framework constructs and updates an instance-centric representation of spatial relationships, enhancing grasp success under challenging occlusions. Furthermore, this representation facilitates active Next-Best-View (NBV) planning and optimizes sequential grasping strategies when direct grasping is infeasible. Additionally, we introduce a multi-view uncertainty-driven grasp fusion mechanism that refines grasp confidence and directional uncertainty in real-time, ensuring robust and stable grasp execution. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that VISO-Grasp achieves a success rate of $87.5\%$ in target-oriented grasping with the fewest grasp attempts outperforming baselines. To the best of our knowledge, VISO-Grasp is the first unified framework integrating FMs into target-aware active view planning and 6-DoF grasping in environments with severe occlusions and entire invisibility constraints. Code is available at: https://github.com/YitianShi/vMF-Contact
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 VISO-Grasp，这是一种新颖的视觉语言通知系统，旨在系统地解决严重遮挡环境中抓取的可见性限制。通过利用基础模型（FM）进行空间推理和主动视图规划，我们的框架构建并更新了以实例为中心的空间关系表示，从而提高了在具有挑战性的遮挡下的抓取成功率。此外，这种表示有助于主动的下一个最佳视图（NBV）规划，并在直接抓取不可行时优化顺序抓取策略。此外，我们引入了多视图不确定性驱动的抓取融合机制，可以实时细化抓取置信度和方向不确定性，确保稳健稳定的抓取执行。大量的现实世界实验表明，VISO-Grasp 在目标导向抓取中以最少的抓取尝试实现了 87.5%$ 的成功率，优于基线。据我们所知，VISO-Grasp 是第一个在具有严重遮挡和完全不可见约束的环境中将 FM 集成到目标感知主动视图规划和 6-DoF 抓取的统一框架。代码位于：https://github.com/YitianShi/vMF-Contact

AI.tldr: 本文提出VISO-Grasp系统，通过视觉-语言信息解决严重遮挡环境下目标抓取的可见性约束问题。
AI.motivation: 在严重遮挡和不可见环境下，传统抓取方法因可见性限制难以实现稳定抓取，需系统性解决空间关系建模与主动视图规划问题。
AI.method: 结合基础模型（FMs）进行空间推理与主动视图规划，构建实例中心的空间关系表示，并引入多视角不确定性驱动的抓取融合机制优化抓取策略。
AI.result: 在真实环境中目标导向抓取成功率高达87.5%，以最少抓取次数优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: VISO-Grasp是首个将FMs整合到目标感知主动视图规划与6-DoF抓取的统一框架，有效应对严重遮挡与完全不可见约束。

authors_text: Yaoting Wang,Shengqiong Wu,Yuecheng Zhang,Shuicheng Yan,Ziwei Liu,Jiebo Luo,Hao Fei
title: Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning: A Comprehensive Survey
title_zh: 多模态思维链推理：综合调查
comment: Survey, working under progress; 12 figures, 4 tables, 44 pages; Resource at https://github.com/yaotingwangofficial/Awesome-MCoT
comments: Survey, working under progress; 12 figures, 4 tables, 44 pages; Resource at https://github.com/yaotingwangofficial/Awesome-MCoT
abstract: By extending the advantage of chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning in human-like step-by-step processes to multimodal contexts, multimodal CoT (MCoT) reasoning has recently garnered significant research attention, especially in the integration with multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Existing MCoT studies design various methodologies and innovative reasoning paradigms to address the unique challenges of image, video, speech, audio, 3D, and structured data across different modalities, achieving extensive success in applications such as robotics, healthcare, autonomous driving, and multimodal generation. However, MCoT still presents distinct challenges and opportunities that require further focus to ensure consistent thriving in this field, where, unfortunately, an up-to-date review of this domain is lacking. To bridge this gap, we present the first systematic survey of MCoT reasoning, elucidating the relevant foundational concepts and definitions. We offer a comprehensive taxonomy and an in-depth analysis of current methodologies from diverse perspectives across various application scenarios. Furthermore, we provide insights into existing challenges and future research directions, aiming to foster innovation toward multimodal AGI.
summary: By extending the advantage of chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning in human-like step-by-step processes to multimodal contexts, multimodal CoT (MCoT) reasoning has recently garnered significant research attention, especially in the integration with multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Existing MCoT studies design various methodologies and innovative reasoning paradigms to address the unique challenges of image, video, speech, audio, 3D, and structured data across different modalities, achieving extensive success in applications such as robotics, healthcare, autonomous driving, and multimodal generation. However, MCoT still presents distinct challenges and opportunities that require further focus to ensure consistent thriving in this field, where, unfortunately, an up-to-date review of this domain is lacking. To bridge this gap, we present the first systematic survey of MCoT reasoning, elucidating the relevant foundational concepts and definitions. We offer a comprehensive taxonomy and an in-depth analysis of current methodologies from diverse perspectives across various application scenarios. Furthermore, we provide insights into existing challenges and future research directions, aiming to foster innovation toward multimodal AGI.
abstract_zh: 通过将类人逐步过程中的思想链 (CoT) 推理的优势扩展到多模态环境，多模态 CoT (MCoT) 推理最近引起了广泛的研究关注，特别是在与多模态大语言模型 (MLLM) 的集成方面。现有的 MCoT 研究设计了各种方法和创新推理范式，以解决不同模态的图像、视频、语音、音频、3D 和结构化数据的独特挑战，在机器人、医疗保健、自动驾驶和多模态生成等应用中取得了广泛的成功。然而，MCoT 仍然带来了独特的挑战和机遇，需要进一步关注，以确保该领域的持续繁荣，不幸的是，缺乏对该领域的最新审查。为了弥补这一差距，我们首次对 MCoT 推理进行了系统调查，阐明了相关的基本概念和定义。我们提供全面的分类法，并从不同应用场景的不同角度对当前方法进行深入分析。此外，我们还提供对现有挑战和未来研究方向的见解，旨在促进多模式 AGI 的创新。

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了多模态链式推理（MCoT）的研究进展，涵盖基础概念、方法分类、应用场景及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对MCoT的系统性综述，而该技术在机器人、医疗等领域的应用需求日益增长。
AI.method: 通过构建方法学分类体系，从多角度分析现有技术，并总结挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.result: 提出了首个MCoT系统性综述框架，涵盖多模态数据处理、模型架构及跨模态推理等核心问题。
AI.conclusion: MCoT需进一步解决模态对齐与推理鲁棒性问题，以推动多模态通用人工智能（AGI）的发展。

authors_text: Dan Halperin,Niklas Eisl
title: Point Cloud Based Scene Segmentation: A Survey
title_zh: 基于点云的场景分割：调查
abstract: Autonomous driving is a safety-critical application, and it is therefore a top priority that the accompanying assistance systems are able to provide precise information about the surrounding environment of the vehicle. Tasks such as 3D Object Detection deliver an insufficiently detailed understanding of the surrounding scene because they only predict a bounding box for foreground objects. In contrast, 3D Semantic Segmentation provides richer and denser information about the environment by assigning a label to each individual point, which is of paramount importance for autonomous driving tasks, such as navigation or lane changes. To inspire future research, in this review paper, we provide a comprehensive overview of the current state-of-the-art methods in the field of Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation for autonomous driving. We categorize the approaches into projection-based, 3D-based and hybrid methods. Moreover, we discuss the most important and commonly used datasets for this task and also emphasize the importance of synthetic data to support research when real-world data is limited. We further present the results of the different methods and compare them with respect to their segmentation accuracy and efficiency.
summary: Autonomous driving is a safety-critical application, and it is therefore a top priority that the accompanying assistance systems are able to provide precise information about the surrounding environment of the vehicle. Tasks such as 3D Object Detection deliver an insufficiently detailed understanding of the surrounding scene because they only predict a bounding box for foreground objects. In contrast, 3D Semantic Segmentation provides richer and denser information about the environment by assigning a label to each individual point, which is of paramount importance for autonomous driving tasks, such as navigation or lane changes. To inspire future research, in this review paper, we provide a comprehensive overview of the current state-of-the-art methods in the field of Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation for autonomous driving. We categorize the approaches into projection-based, 3D-based and hybrid methods. Moreover, we discuss the most important and commonly used datasets for this task and also emphasize the importance of synthetic data to support research when real-world data is limited. We further present the results of the different methods and compare them with respect to their segmentation accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶是一项安全关键的应用，因此，配套的辅助系统能够提供车辆周围环境的精确信息是重中之重。 3D 对象检测等任务对周围场景的了解不够详细，因为它们仅预测前景对象的边界框。相比之下，3D 语义分割通过为每个单独的点分配标签来提供更丰富、更密集的环境信息，这对于导航或变道等自动驾驶任务至关重要。为了启发未来的研究，在这篇综述论文中，我们全面概述了自动驾驶点云语义分割领域当前最先进的方法。我们将这些方法分为基于投影的方法、基于 3D 的方法和混合方法。此外，我们讨论了该任务中最重要和最常用的数据集，并强调了当现实世界数据有限时合成数据支持研究的重要性。我们进一步展示了不同方法的结果，并比较了它们的分割精度和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于点云的场景分割方法，旨在为自动驾驶提供更精确的环境信息。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要更细致的环境理解，传统3D目标检测方法无法满足需求，而3D语义分割能提供更丰富的点级信息。
AI.method: 将现有方法分为投影法、3D法和混合方法，分析常用数据集，并通过分割精度和效率对比不同方法。
AI.result: 总结了各类方法的性能表现，强调了合成数据在真实数据不足时的研究支持作用。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法各有优劣，未来需在分割精度与计算效率之间寻求平衡，并进一步优化数据集与合成数据应用。

authors_text: Thayer Alshaabi,Daniel E. Milkie,Gaoxiang Liu,Cyna Shirazinejad,Jason L. Hong,Kemal Achour,Frederik Görlitz,Ana Milunovic-Jevtic,Cat Simmons,Ibrahim S. Abuzahriyeh,Erin Hong,Samara Erin Williams,Nathanael Harrison,Evan Huang,Eun Seok Bae,Alison N. Killilea,David G. Drubin,Ian A. Swinburne,Srigokul Upadhyayula,Eric Betzig
title: Fourier-Based 3D Multistage Transformer for Aberration Correction in Multicellular Specimens
title_zh: 用于多细胞样本像差校正的基于傅立叶的 3D 多级变压器
comment: 55 pages, 6 figures, 26 si figures, 8 si tables
comments: 55 pages, 6 figures, 26 si figures, 8 si tables
abstract: High-resolution tissue imaging is often compromised by sample-induced optical aberrations that degrade resolution and contrast. While wavefront sensor-based adaptive optics (AO) can measure these aberrations, such hardware solutions are typically complex, expensive to implement, and slow when serially mapping spatially varying aberrations across large fields of view. Here, we introduce AOViFT (Adaptive Optical Vision Fourier Transformer) -- a machine learning-based aberration sensing framework built around a 3D multistage Vision Transformer that operates on Fourier domain embeddings. AOViFT infers aberrations and restores diffraction-limited performance in puncta-labeled specimens with substantially reduced computational cost, training time, and memory footprint compared to conventional architectures or real-space networks. We validated AOViFT on live gene-edited zebrafish embryos, demonstrating its ability to correct spatially varying aberrations using either a deformable mirror or post-acquisition deconvolution. By eliminating the need for the guide star and wavefront sensing hardware and simplifying the experimental workflow, AOViFT lowers technical barriers for high-resolution volumetric microscopy across diverse biological samples.
summary: High-resolution tissue imaging is often compromised by sample-induced optical aberrations that degrade resolution and contrast. While wavefront sensor-based adaptive optics (AO) can measure these aberrations, such hardware solutions are typically complex, expensive to implement, and slow when serially mapping spatially varying aberrations across large fields of view. Here, we introduce AOViFT (Adaptive Optical Vision Fourier Transformer) -- a machine learning-based aberration sensing framework built around a 3D multistage Vision Transformer that operates on Fourier domain embeddings. AOViFT infers aberrations and restores diffraction-limited performance in puncta-labeled specimens with substantially reduced computational cost, training time, and memory footprint compared to conventional architectures or real-space networks. We validated AOViFT on live gene-edited zebrafish embryos, demonstrating its ability to correct spatially varying aberrations using either a deformable mirror or post-acquisition deconvolution. By eliminating the need for the guide star and wavefront sensing hardware and simplifying the experimental workflow, AOViFT lowers technical barriers for high-resolution volumetric microscopy across diverse biological samples.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率组织成像通常会受到样品引起的光学像差的影响，从而降低分辨率和对比度。虽然基于波前传感器的自适应光学器件 (AO) 可以测量这些像差，但此类硬件解决方案通常很复杂、实施成本昂贵，并且在跨大视场连续映射空间变化的像差时速度很慢。在这里，我们介绍 AOViFT（自适应光学视觉傅里叶变换器）——一种基于机器学习的像差传感框架，围绕 3D 多级视觉变换器构建，在傅里叶域嵌入上运行。与传统架构或实空间网络相比，AOViFT 可以推断像差并恢复点状标记样本中的衍射极限性能，同时显着降低计算成本、训练时间和内存占用。我们在活体基因编辑斑马鱼胚胎上验证了 AOViFT，证明了其使用可变形镜或采集后反卷积来校正空间变化像差的能力。通过消除对导星和波前传感硬件的需求并简化实验工作流程，AOViFT 降低了不同生物样本的高分辨率体积显微镜的技术障碍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于傅里叶域的3D多阶段视觉Transformer（AOViFT）框架，用于多细胞样本的像差校正。
AI.motivation: 传统基于波前传感器的自适应光学系统存在硬件复杂、成本高、计算速度慢等问题，难以高效处理大视场空间变化的像差。
AI.method: 设计AOViFT框架，利用3D多阶段视觉Transformer在傅里叶域嵌入中学习像差特征，无需引导星和波前传感硬件，通过可变形镜或后处理去卷积实现像差校正。
AI.result: 在活体基因编辑斑马鱼胚胎实验中验证有效性，相比传统方法显著降低计算成本、训练时间和内存占用，成功校正空间变化像差。
AI.conclusion: AOViFT通过简化实验流程和消除硬件依赖，为多种生物样本的高分辨率三维显微成像提供了低技术门槛的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出基于傅里叶域的3D多阶段视觉Transformer（AOViFT）框架，用于多细胞样本的像差校正。
motivation: 传统基于波前传感器的自适应光学系统存在硬件复杂、成本高、计算速度慢等问题，难以高效处理大视场空间变化的像差。
method: 设计AOViFT框架，利用3D多阶段视觉Transformer在傅里叶域嵌入中学习像差特征，无需引导星和波前传感硬件，通过可变形镜或后处理去卷积实现像差校正。
result: 在活体基因编辑斑马鱼胚胎实验中验证有效性，相比传统方法显著降低计算成本、训练时间和内存占用，成功校正空间变化像差。
conclusion: AOViFT通过简化实验流程和消除硬件依赖，为多种生物样本的高分辨率三维显微成像提供了低技术门槛的解决方案。
search_text: Fourier-Based 3D Multistage Transformer for Aberration Correction in Multicellular Specimens 用于多细胞样本像差校正的基于傅立叶的 3D 多级变压器 High-resolution tissue imaging is often compromised by sample-induced optical aberrations that degrade resolution and contrast. While wavefront sensor-based adaptive optics (AO) can measure these aberrations, such hardware solutions are typically complex, expensive to implement, and slow when serially mapping spatially varying aberrations across large fields of view. Here, we introduce AOViFT (Adaptive Optical Vision Fourier Transformer) -- a machine learning-based aberration sensing framework built around a 3D multistage Vision Transformer that operates on Fourier domain embeddings. AOViFT infers aberrations and restores diffraction-limited performance in puncta-labeled specimens with substantially reduced computational cost, training time, and memory footprint compared to conventional architectures or real-space networks. We validated AOViFT on live gene-edited zebrafish embryos, demonstrating its ability to correct spatially varying aberrations using either a deformable mirror or post-acquisition deconvolution. By eliminating the need for the guide star and wavefront sensing hardware and simplifying the experimental workflow, AOViFT lowers technical barriers for high-resolution volumetric microscopy across diverse biological samples. 高分辨率组织成像通常会受到样品引起的光学像差的影响，从而降低分辨率和对比度。虽然基于波前传感器的自适应光学器件 (AO) 可以测量这些像差，但此类硬件解决方案通常很复杂、实施成本昂贵，并且在跨大视场连续映射空间变化的像差时速度很慢。在这里，我们介绍 AOViFT（自适应光学视觉傅里叶变换器）——一种基于机器学习的像差传感框架，围绕 3D 多级视觉变换器构建，在傅里叶域嵌入上运行。与传统架构或实空间网络相比，AOViFT 可以推断像差并恢复点状标记样本中的衍射极限性能，同时显着降低计算成本、训练时间和内存占用。我们在活体基因编辑斑马鱼胚胎上验证了 AOViFT，证明了其使用可变形镜或采集后反卷积来校正空间变化像差的能力。通过消除对导星和波前传感硬件的需求并简化实验工作流程，AOViFT 降低了不同生物样本的高分辨率体积显微镜的技术障碍。 本文提出基于傅里叶域的3D多阶段视觉Transformer（AOViFT）框架，用于多细胞样本的像差校正。 Thayer Alshaabi,Daniel E. Abuzahriyeh,Erin Hong,Samara Erin Williams,Nathanael Harrison,Evan Huang,Eun Seok Bae,Alison N. Killilea,David G. Drubin,Ian A. authors_text: Harshit
title: MoECollab: Democratizing LLM Development Through Collaborative Mixture of Experts
title_zh: MoECollab：通过专家合作使法学硕士发展民主化
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) development has become increasingly centralized, limiting participation to well-resourced organizations. This paper introduces MoECollab, a novel framework leveraging Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture to enable distributed, collaborative LLM development. By decomposing monolithic models into specialized expert modules coordinated by a trainable gating network, our framework allows diverse contributors to participate regardless of computational resources. We provide a complete technical implementation with mathematical foundations for expert dynamics, gating mechanisms, and integration strategies. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves accuracy improvements of 3-7% over baseline models while reducing computational requirements by 34%. Expert specialization yields significant domain-specific gains, with improvements from 51% to 88% F1 score in general classification and from 23% to 44% accuracy in news categorization. We formalize the routing entropy optimization problem and demonstrate how proper regularization techniques lead to 14% higher expert utilization rates. These results validate MoECollab as an effective approach for democratizing LLM development through architecturally-supported collaboration.
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) development has become increasingly centralized, limiting participation to well-resourced organizations. This paper introduces MoECollab, a novel framework leveraging Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture to enable distributed, collaborative LLM development. By decomposing monolithic models into specialized expert modules coordinated by a trainable gating network, our framework allows diverse contributors to participate regardless of computational resources. We provide a complete technical implementation with mathematical foundations for expert dynamics, gating mechanisms, and integration strategies. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves accuracy improvements of 3-7% over baseline models while reducing computational requirements by 34%. Expert specialization yields significant domain-specific gains, with improvements from 51% to 88% F1 score in general classification and from 23% to 44% accuracy in news categorization. We formalize the routing entropy optimization problem and demonstrate how proper regularization techniques lead to 14% higher expert utilization rates. These results validate MoECollab as an effective approach for democratizing LLM development through architecturally-supported collaboration.
abstract_zh: Large Language Model (LLM) development has become increasingly centralized, limiting participation to well-resourced organizations.本文介绍了 MoECollab，这是一种利用专家混合 (MoE) 架构来实现分布式、协作式 LLM 开发的新颖框架。通过将整体模型分解为由可训练的门控网络协调的专门专家模块，我们的框架允许不同的贡献者参与，无论计算资源如何。 We provide a complete technical implementation with mathematical foundations for expert dynamics, gating mechanisms, and integration strategies.对多个数据集的实验表明，我们的方法比基线模型的精度提高了 3-7%，同时计算要求降低了 34%。专家专业化带来了显着的特定领域收益，一般分类的 F1 分数从 51% 提高到 88%，新闻分类的准确率从 23% 提高到 44%。我们形式化了路由熵优化问题，并演示了正确的正则化技术如何将专家利用率提高 14%。 These results validate MoECollab as an effective approach for democratizing LLM development through architecturally-supported collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoECollab框架，通过协作式专家混合架构实现去中心化的大型语言模型开发。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM开发过度集中于资源充足的机构，限制了广泛参与和技术民主化。
AI.method: 基于MoE架构将模型分解为可协调的专家模块，结合可训练门控网络实现分布式协作开发，并提供数学基础与实现方案。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上准确率提升3-7%，计算需求降低34%，领域分类任务F1分数提升51-88%，新闻分类准确率提升23-44%，专家利用率提高14%。
AI.conclusion: MoECollab通过架构支持的协作机制，有效推动了LLM开发的民主化进程。

authors_text: Haoran Feng,Zehuan Huang,Lin Li,Hairong Lv,Lu Sheng
title: Personalize Anything for Free with Diffusion Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Diffusion Transformer 免费个性化任何东西
abstract: Personalized image generation aims to produce images of user-specified concepts while enabling flexible editing. Recent training-free approaches, while exhibit higher computational efficiency than training-based methods, struggle with identity preservation, applicability, and compatibility with diffusion transformers (DiTs). In this paper, we uncover the untapped potential of DiT, where simply replacing denoising tokens with those of a reference subject achieves zero-shot subject reconstruction. This simple yet effective feature injection technique unlocks diverse scenarios, from personalization to image editing. Building upon this observation, we propose \textbf{Personalize Anything}, a training-free framework that achieves personalized image generation in DiT through: 1) timestep-adaptive token replacement that enforces subject consistency via early-stage injection and enhances flexibility through late-stage regularization, and 2) patch perturbation strategies to boost structural diversity. Our method seamlessly supports layout-guided generation, multi-subject personalization, and mask-controlled editing. Evaluations demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in identity preservation and versatility. Our work establishes new insights into DiTs while delivering a practical paradigm for efficient personalization.
summary: Personalized image generation aims to produce images of user-specified concepts while enabling flexible editing. Recent training-free approaches, while exhibit higher computational efficiency than training-based methods, struggle with identity preservation, applicability, and compatibility with diffusion transformers (DiTs). In this paper, we uncover the untapped potential of DiT, where simply replacing denoising tokens with those of a reference subject achieves zero-shot subject reconstruction. This simple yet effective feature injection technique unlocks diverse scenarios, from personalization to image editing. Building upon this observation, we propose \textbf{Personalize Anything}, a training-free framework that achieves personalized image generation in DiT through: 1) timestep-adaptive token replacement that enforces subject consistency via early-stage injection and enhances flexibility through late-stage regularization, and 2) patch perturbation strategies to boost structural diversity. Our method seamlessly supports layout-guided generation, multi-subject personalization, and mask-controlled editing. Evaluations demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in identity preservation and versatility. Our work establishes new insights into DiTs while delivering a practical paradigm for efficient personalization.
abstract_zh: 个性化图像生成旨在生成用户指定概念的图像，同时实现灵活的编辑。最近的免训练方法虽然比基于训练的方法表现出更高的计算效率，但在身份保存、适用性以及与扩散变压器 (DiT) 的兼容性方面存在困难。在本文中，我们揭示了 DiT 尚未开发的潜力，只需用参考对象的去噪标记替换去噪标记即可实现零样本对象重建。这种简单而有效的功能注入技术可以解锁从个性化到图像编辑的各种场景。基于这一观察，我们提出了 \textbf{Personalize Anything}，这是一个免训练框架，通过以下方式实现 DiT 中的个性化图像生成：1）时间步自适应标记替换，通过早期注入增强主题一致性，并通过后期正则化增强灵活性，2）补丁扰动策略以提高结构多样性。我们的方法无缝支持布局引导生成、多主题个性化和蒙版控制编辑。评估证明了其在身份保存和多功能性方面的最先进的性能。我们的工作建立了对 DiT 的新见解，同时提供了高效个性化的实用范例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的基于扩散变换器（DiT）的个性化图像生成框架，通过简单的特征注入技术实现零样本主体重建。
AI.motivation: 现有训练-free方法在身份保持、适用性和与DiT兼容性方面存在不足，需探索DiT的未充分利用潜力以实现高效个性化。
AI.method: 提出时序自适应令牌替换（早阶段注入保证一致性，晚阶段正则化增强灵活性）及补丁扰动策略，支持布局引导生成、多主体个性化和掩码编辑。
AI.result: 在身份保持和多功能性方面达到SOTA性能，验证了方法在多种场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了DiT的新特性，为高效个性化提供了实用范式，推动了训练-free方法的发展。

authors_text: Wupeng Wang,Zexu Pan,Jingru Lin,Shuai Wang,Haizhou Li
title: Context-Aware Two-Step Training Scheme for Domain Invariant Speech Separation
title_zh: 领域不变语音分离的上下文感知两步训练方案
abstract: Speech separation seeks to isolate individual speech signals from a multi-talk speech mixture. Despite much progress, a system well-trained on synthetic data often experiences performance degradation on out-of-domain data, such as real-world speech mixtures. To address this, we introduce a novel context-aware, two-stage training scheme for speech separation models. In this training scheme, the conventional end-to-end architecture is replaced with a framework that contains a context extractor and a segregator. The two modules are trained step by step to simulate the speech separation process of an auditory system. We evaluate the proposed training scheme through cross-domain experiments on both synthetic and real-world speech mixtures, and demonstrate that our new scheme effectively boosts separation quality across different domains without adaptation, as measured by signal quality metrics and word error rate (WER). Additionally, an ablation study on the real test set highlights that the context information, including phoneme and word representations from pretrained SSL models, serves as effective domain invariant training targets for separation models.

authors_text: Xiaoyu Han,Shengping Zhang,Qinglin Liu,Zonglin Li,Chenyang Wang
title: Progressive Limb-Aware Virtual Try-On
title_zh: 渐进式肢体感知虚拟试戴
comment: Accepted by ACM MM 2022. The code is available at https://github.com/xyhanHIT/PL-VTON
comments: Accepted by ACM MM 2022. The code is available at https://github.com/xyhanHIT/PL-VTON
abstract: Existing image-based virtual try-on methods directly transfer specific clothing to a human image without utilizing clothing attributes to refine the transferred clothing geometry and textures, which causes incomplete and blurred clothing appearances. In addition, these methods usually mask the limb textures of the input for the clothing-agnostic person representation, which results in inaccurate predictions for human limb regions (i.e., the exposed arm skin), especially when transforming between long-sleeved and short-sleeved garments. To address these problems, we present a progressive virtual try-on framework, named PL-VTON, which performs pixel-level clothing warping based on multiple attributes of clothing and embeds explicit limb-aware features to generate photo-realistic try-on results. Specifically, we design a Multi-attribute Clothing Warping (MCW) module that adopts a two-stage alignment strategy based on multiple attributes to progressively estimate pixel-level clothing displacements. A Human Parsing Estimator (HPE) is then introduced to semantically divide the person into various regions, which provides structural constraints on the human body and therefore alleviates texture bleeding between clothing and limb regions. Finally, we propose a Limb-aware Texture Fusion (LTF) module to estimate high-quality details in limb regions by fusing textures of the clothing and the human body with the guidance of explicit limb-aware features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art virtual try-on methods both qualitatively and quantitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/xyhanHIT/PL-VTON.
summary: Existing image-based virtual try-on methods directly transfer specific clothing to a human image without utilizing clothing attributes to refine the transferred clothing geometry and textures, which causes incomplete and blurred clothing appearances. In addition, these methods usually mask the limb textures of the input for the clothing-agnostic person representation, which results in inaccurate predictions for human limb regions (i.e., the exposed arm skin), especially when transforming between long-sleeved and short-sleeved garments. To address these problems, we present a progressive virtual try-on framework, named PL-VTON, which performs pixel-level clothing warping based on multiple attributes of clothing and embeds explicit limb-aware features to generate photo-realistic try-on results. Specifically, we design a Multi-attribute Clothing Warping (MCW) module that adopts a two-stage alignment strategy based on multiple attributes to progressively estimate pixel-level clothing displacements. A Human Parsing Estimator (HPE) is then introduced to semantically divide the person into various regions, which provides structural constraints on the human body and therefore alleviates texture bleeding between clothing and limb regions. Finally, we propose a Limb-aware Texture Fusion (LTF) module to estimate high-quality details in limb regions by fusing textures of the clothing and the human body with the guidance of explicit limb-aware features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art virtual try-on methods both qualitatively and quantitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/xyhanHIT/PL-VTON.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于图像的虚拟试穿方法直接将特定服装转移到人体图像上，而没有利用服装属性来细化转移的服装几何形状和纹理，这导致服装外观不完整且模糊。此外，这些方法通常会掩盖与服装无关的人物表示的输入的肢体纹理，这会导致对人体肢体区域（即暴露的手臂皮肤）的预测不准确，特别是在长袖和短袖服装之间转换时。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种渐进式虚拟试穿框架，名为 PL-VTON，它根据服装的多个属性执行像素级服装变形，并嵌入明确的肢体感知特征以生成照片般逼真的试穿结果。具体来说，我们设计了一个多属性服装变形（MCW）模块，该模块采用基于多个属性的两阶段对齐策略来逐步估计像素级的服装位移。然后引入人体解析估计器（HPE），在语义上将人划分为不同的区域，这为人体提供了结构约束，从而减轻了衣服和肢体区域之间的纹理渗色。最后，我们提出了一种肢体感知纹理融合（LTF）模块，通过在明确的肢体感知特征的指导下融合衣服和人体的纹理来估计肢体区域的高质量细节。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法在质量和数量上都优于最先进的虚拟试穿方法。代码可在 https://github.com/xyhanHIT/PL-VTON 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式肢体感知虚拟试穿框架PL-VTON，通过多属性衣物变形和肢体特征融合解决现有方法在衣物纹理模糊及肢体区域预测不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试穿方法未利用衣物属性优化几何纹理，且通过遮盖肢体纹理导致长/短袖转换时肢体区域预测不准确，影响试穿效果。
AI.method: 设计多属性衣物变形模块（MCW）进行像素级变形，结合人体解析估计器（HPE）划分身体区域并抑制纹理渗透，最后通过肢体感知纹理融合模块（LTF）生成高质量肢体细节。
AI.result: 在定性和定量实验中均优于现有SOTA方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入多属性变形与肢体特征显式建模，有效提升了虚拟试穿的衣物贴合度与肢体区域真实感。

authors_text: Giovanni Franzese,Max Spahn,Jens Kober,Cosimo Della Santina
title: MUKCa: Accurate and Affordable Cobot Calibration Without External Measurement Devices
title_zh: MUKCa：无需外部测量设备即可进行准确且经济实惠的协作机器人校准
abstract: To increase the reliability of collaborative robots in performing daily tasks, we require them to be accurate and not only repeatable. However, having a calibrated kinematics model is regrettably a luxury, as available calibration tools are usually more expensive than the robots themselves. With this work, we aim to contribute to the democratization of cobots calibration by providing an inexpensive yet highly effective alternative to existing tools. The proposed minimalist calibration routine relies on a 3D-printable tool as the only physical aid to the calibration process. This two-socket spherical-joint tool kinematically constrains the robot at the end effector while collecting the training set. An optimization routine updates the nominal model to ensure a consistent prediction for each socket and the undistorted mean distance between them. We validated the algorithm on three robotic platforms: Franka, Kuka, and Kinova Cobots. The calibrated models reduce the mean absolute error from the order of 10 mm to 0.2 mm for both Franka and Kuka robots. We provide two additional experimental campaigns with the Franka Robot to render the improvements more tangible. First, we implement Cartesian control with and without the calibrated model and use it to perform a standard peg-in-the-hole task with a tolerance of 0.4 mm between the peg and the hole. Second, we perform a repeated drawing task combining Cartesian control with learning from demonstration. Both tasks consistently failed when the model was not calibrated, while they consistently succeeded after calibration.

abstract_zh: To increase the reliability of collaborative robots in performing daily tasks, we require them to be accurate and not only repeatable.然而，遗憾的是，拥有校准的运动学模型是一种奢侈，因为可用的校准工具通常比机器人本身更昂贵。通过这项工作，我们的目标是通过提供一种廉价但高效的现有工具替代方案，为协作机器人校准的民主化做出贡献。 The proposed minimalist calibration routine relies on a 3D-printable tool as the only physical aid to the calibration process. This two-socket spherical-joint tool kinematically constrains the robot at the end effector while collecting the training set.优化例程更新标称模型，以确保每个插槽的预测一致以及它们之间的不失真平均距离。 We validated the algorithm on three robotic platforms: Franka, Kuka, and Kinova Cobots. The calibrated models reduce the mean absolute error from the order of 10 mm to 0.2 mm for both Franka and Kuka robots. We provide two additional experimental campaigns with the Franka Robot to render the improvements more tangible.首先，我们在使用和不使用校准模型的情况下实施笛卡尔控制，并使用它来执行标准的孔中钉任务，钉与孔之间的公差为 0.4 毫米。 Second, we perform a repeated drawing task combining Cartesian control with learning from demonstration. Both tasks consistently failed when the model was not calibrated, while they consistently succeeded after calibration.

AI.motivation: 现有协作机器人校准工具成本高昂，限制了其普及应用，需开发经济高效的替代方案以提升机器人精度。
AI.method: 设计可3D打印的双插孔球形关节工具，通过约束末端执行器收集训练数据，结合优化算法更新运动学模型参数。
AI.result: 在Franka和Kuka机器人上将均方误差从10mm降至0.2mm，校准后完成0.4mm公差的插孔任务和重复绘图任务成功率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MUKCa方法以低成本实现高精度校准，验证了其在多品牌机器人平台的有效性，推动协作机器人技术的普及应用。

search_text: MUKCa: Accurate and Affordable Cobot Calibration Without External Measurement Devices MUKCa：无需外部测量设备即可进行准确且经济实惠的协作机器人校准 To increase the reliability of collaborative robots in performing daily tasks, we require them to be accurate and not only repeatable. However, having a calibrated kinematics model is regrettably a luxury, as available calibration tools are usually more expensive than the robots themselves. With this work, we aim to contribute to the democratization of cobots calibration by providing an inexpensive yet highly effective alternative to existing tools. The proposed minimalist calibration routine relies on a 3D-printable tool as the only physical aid to the calibration process. This two-socket spherical-joint tool kinematically constrains the robot at the end effector while collecting the training set. An optimization routine updates the nominal model to ensure a consistent prediction for each socket and the undistorted mean distance between them. We validated the algorithm on three robotic platforms: Franka, Kuka, and Kinova Cobots. The calibrated models reduce the mean absolute error from the order of 10 mm to 0.2 mm for both Franka and Kuka robots. We provide two additional experimental campaigns with the Franka Robot to render the improvements more tangible. First, we implement Cartesian control with and without the calibrated model and use it to perform a standard peg-in-the-hole task with a tolerance of 0.4 mm between the peg and the hole. Second, we perform a repeated drawing task combining Cartesian control with learning from demonstration. Both tasks consistently failed when the model was not calibrated, while they consistently succeeded after calibration. To increase the reliability of collaborative robots in performing daily tasks, we require them to be accurate and not only repeatable.然而，遗憾的是，拥有校准的运动学模型是一种奢侈，因为可用的校准工具通常比机器人本身更昂贵。通过这项工作，我们的目标是通过提供一种廉价但高效的现有工具替代方案，为协作机器人校准的民主化做出贡献。 The proposed minimalist calibration routine relies on a 3D-printable tool as the only physical aid to the calibration process. This two-socket spherical-joint tool kinematically constrains the robot at the end effector while collecting the training set.优化例程更新标称模型，以确保每个插槽的预测一致以及它们之间的不失真平均距离。 We validated the algorithm on three robotic platforms: Franka, Kuka, and Kinova Cobots. The calibrated models reduce the mean absolute error from the order of 10 mm to 0.2 mm for both Franka and Kuka robots. We provide two additional experimental campaigns with the Franka Robot to render the improvements more tangible.首先，我们在使用和不使用校准模型的情况下实施笛卡尔控制，并使用它来执行标准的孔中钉任务，钉与孔之间的公差为 0.4 毫米。 Second, we perform a repeated drawing task combining Cartesian control with learning from demonstration. authors_text: Emilio Cartoni,Gianluca Cioccolini,Gianluca Baldassarre
title: Focusing Robot Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning Through Users' Purposes
title_zh: 通过用户的目的聚焦机器人开放式强化学习
abstract: Open-Ended Learning (OEL) autonomous robots can acquire new skills and knowledge through direct interaction with their environment, relying on mechanisms such as intrinsic motivations and self-generated goals to guide learning processes. OEL robots are highly relevant for applications as they can autonomously leverage acquired knowledge to perform tasks beneficial to human users in unstructured environments, addressing challenges unforeseen at design time. However, OEL robots face a significant limitation: their openness may lead them to waste time learning information that is irrelevant to tasks desired by specific users. Here, we propose a solution called `Purpose-Directed Open-Ended Learning' (POEL), based on the novel concept of `purpose' introduced in previous work. A purpose specifies what users want the robot to achieve. The key insight of this work is that purpose can focus OEL on learning self-generated classes of tasks that, while unknown during autonomous learning (as typical in OEL), involve objects relevant to the purpose. This concept is operationalised in a novel robot architecture capable of receiving a human purpose through speech-to-text, analysing the scene to identify objects, and using a Large Language Model to reason about which objects are purpose-relevant. These objects are then used to bias OEL exploration towards their spatial proximity and to self-generate rewards that favour interactions with them. The solution is tested in a simulated scenario where a camera-arm-gripper robot interacts freely with purpose-related and distractor objects. For the first time, the results demonstrate the potential advantages of purpose-focused OEL over state-of-the-art OEL methods, enabling robots to handle unstructured environments while steering their learning toward knowledge acquisition relevant to users.
summary: Open-Ended Learning (OEL) autonomous robots can acquire new skills and knowledge through direct interaction with their environment, relying on mechanisms such as intrinsic motivations and self-generated goals to guide learning processes. OEL robots are highly relevant for applications as they can autonomously leverage acquired knowledge to perform tasks beneficial to human users in unstructured environments, addressing challenges unforeseen at design time. However, OEL robots face a significant limitation: their openness may lead them to waste time learning information that is irrelevant to tasks desired by specific users. Here, we propose a solution called `Purpose-Directed Open-Ended Learning' (POEL), based on the novel concept of `purpose' introduced in previous work. A purpose specifies what users want the robot to achieve. The key insight of this work is that purpose can focus OEL on learning self-generated classes of tasks that, while unknown during autonomous learning (as typical in OEL), involve objects relevant to the purpose. This concept is operationalised in a novel robot architecture capable of receiving a human purpose through speech-to-text, analysing the scene to identify objects, and using a Large Language Model to reason about which objects are purpose-relevant. These objects are then used to bias OEL exploration towards their spatial proximity and to self-generate rewards that favour interactions with them. The solution is tested in a simulated scenario where a camera-arm-gripper robot interacts freely with purpose-related and distractor objects. For the first time, the results demonstrate the potential advantages of purpose-focused OEL over state-of-the-art OEL methods, enabling robots to handle unstructured environments while steering their learning toward knowledge acquisition relevant to users.
abstract_zh: 开放式学习（OEL）自主机器人可以通过与环境的直接交互来获取新的技能和知识，依靠内在动机和自我生成的目标等机制来指导学习过程。 OEL 机器人与应用高度相关，因为它们可以自主地利用所获得的知识在非结构化环境中执行对人类用户有益的任务，从而解决设计时无法预见的挑战。然而，OEL 机器人面临着一个重大限制：它们的开放性可能导致它们浪费时间学习与特定用户所需任务无关的信息。在这里，我们基于之前工作中引入的“目的”的新颖概念，提出了一种名为“目的导向的开放式学习”（POEL）的解决方案。目的指定了用户希望机器人实现的目标。这项工作的关键见解是，目的可以将 OEL 集中于学习自我生成的任务类别，这些任务虽然在自主学习期间未知（如 OEL 中的典型情况），但涉及与目的相关的对象。这一概念在一种新颖的机器人架构中得以实现，该架构能够通过语音转文本接收人类目的，分析场景以识别对象，并使用大语言模型来推断哪些对象与目的相关。然后，这些物体被用来将 OEL 探索偏向于它们的空间接近度，并自我生成有利于与它们交互的奖励。该解决方案在模拟场景中进行了测试，其中相机-手臂-夹具机器人与目的相关和干扰物体自由交互。结果首次证明了以目的为中心的 OEL 相对于最先进的 OEL 方法的潜在优势，使机器人能够处理非结构化环境，同时将其学习转向与用户相关的知识获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于用户目的的开放端强化学习框架POEL，通过将用户目标融入机器人自主学习过程，解决传统开放端学习中资源浪费的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统开放端学习（OEL）机器人缺乏对用户具体需求的针对性，容易在非结构化环境中学习与用户目标无关的知识，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 通过语音识别获取用户目的，结合场景分析和大语言模型识别目标相关物体，利用这些物体的空间位置和交互奖励机制引导OEL探索方向。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，POEL相比现有OEL方法能更高效地聚焦于用户目标相关物体的学习，验证了其在非结构化环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: POEL通过将用户目的嵌入学习机制，实现了机器人自主学习与用户需求的动态对齐，为实际应用中的智能机器人系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dipesh Tamboli,Souradip Chakraborty,Aditya Malusare,Biplab Banerjee,Amrit Singh Bedi,Vaneet Aggarwal
title: BalancedDPO: Adaptive Multi-Metric Alignment
title_zh: BalancedDPO：自适应多指标对齐
comment: Transactions on Machine Learning Research, Apr 2026
comments: Transactions on Machine Learning Research, Apr 2026
abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress in text-to-image generation, yet aligning them with human preference remains challenging due to the presence of multiple, sometimes conflicting, evaluation metrics (e.g., semantic consistency, aesthetics, and human preference scores). Existing alignment methods typically optimize for a single metric or rely on scalarized reward aggregation, which can bias the model toward specific evaluation criteria. To address this challenge, we propose BalancedDPO, a framework that achieves multi-metric preference alignment within the Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) paradigm. Unlike prior DPO variants that rely on a single metric, BalancedDPO introduces a majority-vote consensus over multiple preference scorers and integrates it directly into the DPO training loop with dynamic reference model updates. This consensus-based formulation avoids reward-scale conflicts and ensures more stable gradient directions across heterogeneous metrics. Experiments on Pick-a-Pic, PartiPrompt, and HPD datasets demonstrate that BalancedDPO consistently improves preference win rates over the baselines across Stable Diffusion 1.5, Stable Diffusion 2.1 and SDXL backbones. Comprehensive ablations further validate the benefits of majority-vote aggregation and dynamic reference updating, highlighting the method's robustness and generalizability across diverse alignment settings.
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress in text-to-image generation, yet aligning them with human preference remains challenging due to the presence of multiple, sometimes conflicting, evaluation metrics (e.g., semantic consistency, aesthetics, and human preference scores). Existing alignment methods typically optimize for a single metric or rely on scalarized reward aggregation, which can bias the model toward specific evaluation criteria. To address this challenge, we propose BalancedDPO, a framework that achieves multi-metric preference alignment within the Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) paradigm. Unlike prior DPO variants that rely on a single metric, BalancedDPO introduces a majority-vote consensus over multiple preference scorers and integrates it directly into the DPO training loop with dynamic reference model updates. This consensus-based formulation avoids reward-scale conflicts and ensures more stable gradient directions across heterogeneous metrics. Experiments on Pick-a-Pic, PartiPrompt, and HPD datasets demonstrate that BalancedDPO consistently improves preference win rates over the baselines across Stable Diffusion 1.5, Stable Diffusion 2.1 and SDXL backbones. Comprehensive ablations further validate the benefits of majority-vote aggregation and dynamic reference updating, highlighting the method's robustness and generalizability across diverse alignment settings.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在文本到图像的生成方面取得了显着的进展，但由于存在多种有时相互冲突的评估指标（例如语义一致性、美观性和人类偏好分数），使其与人类偏好保持一致仍然具有挑战性。现有的对齐方法通常针对单个指标进行优化或依赖于标准化奖励聚合，这可能会使模型偏向特定的评估标准。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 BalancedDPO，这是一个在直接偏好优化 (DPO) 范例中实现多指标偏好对齐的框架。与之前依赖单一指标的 DPO 变体不同，BalancedDPO 引入了对多个偏好评分器的多数投票共识，并将其直接集成到具有动态参考模型更新的 DPO 训练循环中。这种基于共识的公式避免了奖励规模冲突，并确保跨异构指标的梯度方向更稳定。 Pick-a-Pic、PartiPrompt 和 HPD 数据集上的实验表明，BalancedDPO 相对于 Stable Diffusion 1.5、Stable Diffusion 2.1 和 SDXL 主干网的基线，持续提高了偏好获胜率。全面的消融进一步验证了多数投票聚合和动态参考更新的好处，突出了该方法在不同对齐设置中的稳健性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BalancedDPO框架，通过多指标共识机制解决文本到图像扩散模型与人类偏好对齐时的多指标冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅优化单一指标或使用标量奖励聚合，导致模型偏向特定评价标准，难以处理语义一致性、美学等多维度且可能冲突的评估指标。
AI.method: 引入多偏好评分器的多数投票共识机制，结合动态参考模型更新，直接整合到DPO训练循环中，避免奖励尺度冲突并稳定异构指标的梯度方向。
AI.result: 在Pick-a-Pic、PartiPrompt和HPD数据集上，BalancedDPO在Stable Diffusion 1.5/2.1/SDXL等不同主干模型中均显著提升偏好胜率，消融实验验证了多数投票和动态更新的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BalancedDPO通过多指标共识与动态训练机制，实现了更稳健的多维度偏好对齐，为扩散模型的人机协同优化提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: BalancedDPO: Adaptive Multi-Metric Alignment BalancedDPO：自适应多指标对齐 Diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress in text-to-image generation, yet aligning them with human preference remains challenging due to the presence of multiple, sometimes conflicting, evaluation metrics (e.g., semantic consistency, aesthetics, and human preference scores). Existing alignment methods typically optimize for a single metric or rely on scalarized reward aggregation, which can bias the model toward specific evaluation criteria. To address this challenge, we propose BalancedDPO, a framework that achieves multi-metric preference alignment within the Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) paradigm. Unlike prior DPO variants that rely on a single metric, BalancedDPO introduces a majority-vote consensus over multiple preference scorers and integrates it directly into the DPO training loop with dynamic reference model updates. This consensus-based formulation avoids reward-scale conflicts and ensures more stable gradient directions across heterogeneous metrics. Experiments on Pick-a-Pic, PartiPrompt, and HPD datasets demonstrate that BalancedDPO consistently improves preference win rates over the baselines across Stable Diffusion 1.5, Stable Diffusion 2.1 and SDXL backbones. Comprehensive ablations further validate the benefits of majority-vote aggregation and dynamic reference updating, highlighting the method's robustness and generalizability across diverse alignment settings. 扩散模型在文本到图像的生成方面取得了显着的进展，但由于存在多种有时相互冲突的评估指标（例如语义一致性、美观性和人类偏好分数），使其与人类偏好保持一致仍然具有挑战性。现有的对齐方法通常针对单个指标进行优化或依赖于标准化奖励聚合，这可能会使模型偏向特定的评估标准。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 BalancedDPO，这是一个在直接偏好优化 (DPO) 范例中实现多指标偏好对齐的框架。与之前依赖单一指标的 DPO 变体不同，BalancedDPO 引入了对多个偏好评分器的多数投票共识，并将其直接集成到具有动态参考模型更新的 DPO 训练循环中。这种基于共识的公式避免了奖励规模冲突，并确保跨异构指标的梯度方向更稳定。 Pick-a-Pic、PartiPrompt 和 HPD 数据集上的实验表明，BalancedDPO 相对于 Stable Diffusion 1.5、Stable Diffusion 2.1 和 SDXL 主干网的基线，持续提高了偏好获胜率。全面的消融进一步验证了多数投票聚合和动态参考更新的好处，突出了该方法在不同对齐设置中的稳健性和通用性。 本文提出BalancedDPO框架，通过多指标共识机制解决文本到图像扩散模型与人类偏好对齐时的多指标冲突问题。 Dipesh Tamboli,Souradip Chakraborty,Aditya Malusare,Biplab Banerjee,Amrit Singh Bedi,Vaneet Aggarwal cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Francesco Girlanda,Denys Rozumnyi,Marc Pollefeys,Martin R. Oswald
title: Deblur Gaussian Splatting SLAM
title_zh: 去模糊高斯泼溅 SLAM
abstract: We present Deblur-SLAM, a robust RGB SLAM pipeline designed to recover sharp reconstructions from motion-blurred inputs. The proposed method bridges the strengths of both frame-to-frame and frame-to-model approaches to model sub-frame camera trajectories that lead to high-fidelity reconstructions in motion-blurred settings. Moreover, our pipeline incorporates techniques such as online loop closure and global bundle adjustment to achieve a dense and precise global trajectory. We model the physical image formation process of motion-blurred images and minimize the error between the observed blurry images and rendered blurry images obtained by averaging sharp virtual sub-frame images. Additionally, by utilizing a monocular depth estimator alongside the online deformation of Gaussians, we ensure precise mapping and enhanced image deblurring. The proposed SLAM pipeline integrates all these components to improve the results. We achieve state-of-the-art results for sharp map estimation and sub-frame trajectory recovery both on synthetic and real-world blurry input data.
summary: We present Deblur-SLAM, a robust RGB SLAM pipeline designed to recover sharp reconstructions from motion-blurred inputs. The proposed method bridges the strengths of both frame-to-frame and frame-to-model approaches to model sub-frame camera trajectories that lead to high-fidelity reconstructions in motion-blurred settings. Moreover, our pipeline incorporates techniques such as online loop closure and global bundle adjustment to achieve a dense and precise global trajectory. We model the physical image formation process of motion-blurred images and minimize the error between the observed blurry images and rendered blurry images obtained by averaging sharp virtual sub-frame images. Additionally, by utilizing a monocular depth estimator alongside the online deformation of Gaussians, we ensure precise mapping and enhanced image deblurring. The proposed SLAM pipeline integrates all these components to improve the results. We achieve state-of-the-art results for sharp map estimation and sub-frame trajectory recovery both on synthetic and real-world blurry input data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Deblur-SLAM，这是一种强大的 RGB SLAM 管道，旨在从运动模糊输入中恢复清晰的重建。所提出的方法结合了帧到帧和帧到模型方法的优势来对子帧相机轨迹进行建模，从而在运动模糊设置中实现高保真度重建。此外，我们的管道结合了在线闭环和全局捆绑调整等技术，以实现密集且精确的全局轨迹。我们对运动模糊图像的物理图像形成过程进行建模，并最小化观察到的模糊图像与通过平均清晰的虚拟子帧图像获得的渲染模糊图像之间的误差。此外，通过利用单目深度估计器和高斯在线变形，我们确保了精确的映射和增强的图像去模糊。所提出的 SLAM 管道集成了所有这些组件以改进结果。我们在合成和现实世界的模糊输入数据上实现了清晰的地图估计和子帧轨迹恢复的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deblur-SLAM的RGB SLAM流水线，旨在从运动模糊输入中恢复清晰的重建结果。
AI.motivation: 运动模糊会严重影响SLAM系统的重建质量，传统方法难以同时处理帧间和全局轨迹优化，需结合物理成像模型与深度估计技术提升精度。
AI.method: 通过建模运动模糊图像的物理成像过程，结合在线回环闭合与全局光束法平差，利用单目深度估计与高斯变形优化，最小化观测模糊图像与渲染模糊图像间的误差。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界模糊数据集上均达到最先进的清晰地图估计与子帧轨迹恢复效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合物理模型、在线优化与深度估计，有效提升了运动模糊场景下的SLAM重建精度与全局轨迹一致性。

The proposed method bridges the strengths of both frame-to-frame and frame-to-model approaches to model sub-frame camera trajectories that lead to high-fidelity reconstructions in motion-blurred settings.
