search_text: Does Your Vision-Language Model Get Lost in the Long Video Sampling Dilemma? 您的视觉语言模型是否在长视频采样困境中迷失了方向？ The rise of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has significantly advanced video understanding. However, efficiently processing long videos remains a challenge due to the ``Sampling Dilemma'': low-density sampling risks missing critical information, while high-density sampling introduces redundancy. To address this issue, we introduce LSDBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate LVLMs on long-video tasks by constructing high Necessary Sampling Density (NSD) questions, where NSD represents the minimum sampling density required to accurately answer a given question. LSDBench focuses on dense, short-duration actions to rigorously assess the sampling strategies employed by LVLMs. To tackle the challenges posed by high-NSD questions, we propose a novel Reasoning-Driven Hierarchical Sampling (RHS) framework, which combines global localization of question-relevant cues with local dense sampling for precise inference. Additionally, we develop a lightweight Semantic-Guided Frame Selector to prioritize informative frames, enabling RHS to achieve comparable or superior performance with significantly fewer sampled frames. Together, our LSDBench and RHS framework address the unique challenges of high-NSD long-video tasks, setting a new standard for evaluating and improving LVLMs in this domain. Our benchmark and evaluation codes has been released at: https://github.com/dvlab-research/LSDBench 大视觉语言模型 (LVLM) 的兴起极大地提高了视频理解能力。然而，由于“采样困境”，有效处理长视频仍然是一个挑战：低密度采样有丢失关键信息的风险，而高密度采样会引入冗余。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 LSDBench，这是第一个旨在通过构建高必要采样密度（NSD）问题来评估长视频任务上的 LVLM 的基准测试，其中 NSD 表示准确回答给定问题所需的最小采样密度。 LSDBench 专注于密集、短持续时间的操作，以严格评估 LVLM 所采用的采样策略。为了解决高 NSD 问题带来的挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的推理驱动分层采样（RHS）框架，它将问题相关线索的全局本地化与局部密集采样相结合以进行精确推理。此外，我们开发了一个轻量级语义引导帧选择器来优先考虑信息帧，使 RHS 能够以显着更少的采样帧实现可比或卓越的性能。我们的 LSDBench 和 RHS 框架共同解决了高 NSD 长视频任务的独特挑战，为评估和改进该领域的 LVLM 制定了新标准。我们的基准测试和评估代码已发布于：https://github.com/dvlab-research/LSDBench 本文针对大视觉-语言模型（LVLM）在处理长视频时面临的采样困境，提出新的基准测试和采样框架。 Tianyuan Qu,Longxiang Tang,Bohao Peng,Senqiao Yang,Bei Yu,Jiaya Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Zhengyuan Peng,Jinpeng Ma,Zhimin Sun,Ran Yi,Haichuan Song,Xin Tan,Lizhuang Ma
title: MOS: Modeling Object-Scene Associations in Generalized Category Discovery
title_zh: MOS：广义类别发现中的对象场景关联建模
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2025.The code is available at https://github.com/JethroPeng/MOS
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2025.The code is available at https://github.com/JethroPeng/MOS
abstract: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) is a classification task that aims to classify both base and novel classes in unlabeled images, using knowledge from a labeled dataset. In GCD, previous research overlooks scene information or treats it as noise, reducing its impact during model training. However, in this paper, we argue that scene information should be viewed as a strong prior for inferring novel classes. We attribute the misinterpretation of scene information to a key factor: the Ambiguity Challenge inherent in GCD. Specifically, novel objects in base scenes might be wrongly classified into base categories, while base objects in novel scenes might be mistakenly recognized as novel categories. Once the ambiguity challenge is addressed, scene information can reach its full potential, significantly enhancing the performance of GCD models. To more effectively leverage scene information, we propose the Modeling Object-Scene Associations (MOS) framework, which utilizes a simple MLP-based scene-awareness module to enhance GCD performance. It achieves an exceptional average accuracy improvement of 4% on the challenging fine-grained datasets compared to state-of-the-art methods, emphasizing its superior performance in fine-grained GCD. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/JethroPeng/MOS
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) is a classification task that aims to classify both base and novel classes in unlabeled images, using knowledge from a labeled dataset. In GCD, previous research overlooks scene information or treats it as noise, reducing its impact during model training. However, in this paper, we argue that scene information should be viewed as a strong prior for inferring novel classes. We attribute the misinterpretation of scene information to a key factor: the Ambiguity Challenge inherent in GCD. Specifically, novel objects in base scenes might be wrongly classified into base categories, while base objects in novel scenes might be mistakenly recognized as novel categories. Once the ambiguity challenge is addressed, scene information can reach its full potential, significantly enhancing the performance of GCD models. To more effectively leverage scene information, we propose the Modeling Object-Scene Associations (MOS) framework, which utilizes a simple MLP-based scene-awareness module to enhance GCD performance. It achieves an exceptional average accuracy improvement of 4% on the challenging fine-grained datasets compared to state-of-the-art methods, emphasizing its superior performance in fine-grained GCD. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/JethroPeng/MOS
abstract_zh: 广义类别发现 (GCD) 是一项分类任务，旨在使用标记数据集中的知识对未标记图像中的基本类和新类进行分类。在GCD中，先前的研究忽略了场景信息或将其视为噪声，从而减少了其在模型训练期间的影响。然而，在本文中，我们认为场景信息应该被视为推断新类别的强大先验。我们将对场景信息的误解归因于一个关键因素：GCD 固有的模糊性挑战。具体而言，基础场景中的新对象可能被错误地分类为基础类别，而新场景中的基础对象可能被错误地识别为新类别。一旦解决了模糊性挑战，场景信息就可以充分发挥其潜力，从而显着提高 GCD 模型的性能。为了更有效地利用场景信息，我们提出了建模对象场景关联 (MOS) 框架，该框架利用简单的基于 MLP 的场景感知模块来增强 GCD 性能。与最先进的方法相比，它在具有挑战性的细粒度数据集上实现了 4% 的卓越平均准确率提高，强调了其在细粒度 GCD 中的卓越性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/JethroPeng/MOS 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOS框架，通过建模物体与场景的关联来提升广义类别发现（GCD）任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GCD方法忽视场景信息或将其视为噪声，导致模型无法有效利用场景作为先验知识，而场景信息实际上能帮助区分基础类和新类。
AI.method: 设计基于MLP的场景感知模块，建模物体与场景的关联关系，通过缓解场景与物体间的歧义挑战提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在细粒度数据集上相比现有方法平均准确率提升4%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 场景信息是GCD任务的重要先验，MOS框架通过有效建模场景-物体关联显著提升了模型性能。

authors_text: Enes Erdogan,Eren Erdal Aksoy,Sanem Sariel
title: Real-Time Manipulation Action Recognition with a Factorized Graph Sequence Encoder
title_zh: 使用因式分解图序列编码器进行实时操作动作识别
abstract: Recognition of human manipulation actions in real-time is essential for safe and effective human-robot interaction and collaboration. The challenge lies in developing a model that is both lightweight enough for real-time execution and capable of generalization. While some existing methods in the literature can run in real-time, they struggle with temporal scalability, i.e., they fail to adapt to long-duration manipulations effectively. To address this, leveraging the generalizable scene graph representations, we propose a new Factorized Graph Sequence Encoder network that not only runs in real-time but also scales effectively in the temporal dimension, thanks to its factorized encoder architecture. Additionally, we introduce Hand Pooling operation, a simple pooling operation for more focused extraction of the graph-level embeddings. Our model outperforms the previous state-of-the-art real-time approach, achieving a 14.3\% and 5.6\% improvement in F1-macro score on the KIT Bimanual Action (Bimacs) Dataset and Collaborative Action (CoAx) Dataset, respectively. Moreover, we conduct an extensive ablation study to validate our network design choices. Finally, we compare our model with its architecturally similar RGB-based model on the Bimacs dataset and show the limitations of this model in contrast to ours on such an object-centric manipulation dataset.
summary: Recognition of human manipulation actions in real-time is essential for safe and effective human-robot interaction and collaboration. The challenge lies in developing a model that is both lightweight enough for real-time execution and capable of generalization. While some existing methods in the literature can run in real-time, they struggle with temporal scalability, i.e., they fail to adapt to long-duration manipulations effectively. To address this, leveraging the generalizable scene graph representations, we propose a new Factorized Graph Sequence Encoder network that not only runs in real-time but also scales effectively in the temporal dimension, thanks to its factorized encoder architecture. Additionally, we introduce Hand Pooling operation, a simple pooling operation for more focused extraction of the graph-level embeddings. Our model outperforms the previous state-of-the-art real-time approach, achieving a 14.3\% and 5.6\% improvement in F1-macro score on the KIT Bimanual Action (Bimacs) Dataset and Collaborative Action (CoAx) Dataset, respectively. Moreover, we conduct an extensive ablation study to validate our network design choices. Finally, we compare our model with its architecturally similar RGB-based model on the Bimacs dataset and show the limitations of this model in contrast to ours on such an object-centric manipulation dataset.
abstract_zh: 实时识别人类操纵行为对于安全有效的人机交互和协作至关重要。挑战在于开发一个既足够轻量级以便实时执行又能够泛化的模型。虽然文献中的一些现有方法可以实时运行，但它们在时间可扩展性方面遇到困难，即它们无法有效地适应长时间的操作。为了解决这个问题，利用可概括的场景图表示，我们提出了一种新的分解图序列编码器网络，由于其分解编码器架构，它不仅可以实时运行，而且可以在时间维度上有效地扩展。此外，我们引入了 Hand Pooling 操作，这是一种简单的池操作，用于更集中地提取图级嵌入。我们的模型优于之前最先进的实时方法，在 KIT 双手动作 (Bimacs) 数据集和协作动作 (CoAx) 数据集上的 F1 宏观分数分别提高了 14.3% 和 5.6%。此外，我们进行了广泛的消融研究来验证我们的网络设计选择。最后，我们将我们的模型与 Bimacs 数据集上的架构相似的基于 RGB 的模型进行比较，并显示该模型与我们在这种以对象为中心的操作数据集上的模型相比的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时操作动作识别方法，通过分解图序列编码器和Hand Pooling操作提升模型的时间扩展性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有实时操作动作识别方法在处理长时序操作时存在时间扩展性不足的问题，需设计轻量且通用的模型以适应实际人机协作场景。
AI.method: 设计分解图序列编码器实现时间维度可扩展性，并引入Hand Pooling操作优化图级嵌入提取，结合场景图表示提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在Bimacs和CoAx数据集上分别提升14.3%和5.6%的F1-macro分数，消融实验验证设计有效性，并展示RGB模型在对象中心数据集上的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在保证实时性的同时显著优于现有方法，验证了分解架构与Hand Pooling的有效性，凸显了图表示在操作动作识别中的优势。

search_text: Real-Time Manipulation Action Recognition with a Factorized Graph Sequence Encoder 使用因式分解图序列编码器进行实时操作动作识别 Recognition of human manipulation actions in real-time is essential for safe and effective human-robot interaction and collaboration. The challenge lies in developing a model that is both lightweight enough for real-time execution and capable of generalization. While some existing methods in the literature can run in real-time, they struggle with temporal scalability, i.e., they fail to adapt to long-duration manipulations effectively. To address this, leveraging the generalizable scene graph representations, we propose a new Factorized Graph Sequence Encoder network that not only runs in real-time but also scales effectively in the temporal dimension, thanks to its factorized encoder architecture. Additionally, we introduce Hand Pooling operation, a simple pooling operation for more focused extraction of the graph-level embeddings. Our model outperforms the previous state-of-the-art real-time approach, achieving a 14.3\% and 5.6\% improvement in F1-macro score on the KIT Bimanual Action (Bimacs) Dataset and Collaborative Action (CoAx) Dataset, respectively. Moreover, we conduct an extensive ablation study to validate our network design choices. Finally, we compare our model with its architecturally similar RGB-based model on the Bimacs dataset and show the limitations of this model in contrast to ours on such an object-centric manipulation dataset. 实时识别人类操纵行为对于安全有效的人机交互和协作至关重要。挑战在于开发一个既足够轻量级以便实时执行又能够泛化的模型。虽然文献中的一些现有方法可以实时运行，但它们在时间可扩展性方面遇到困难，即它们无法有效地适应长时间的操作。为了解决这个问题，利用可概括的场景图表示，我们提出了一种新的分解图序列编码器网络，由于其分解编码器架构，它不仅可以实时运行，而且可以在时间维度上有效地扩展。此外，我们引入了 Hand Pooling 操作，这是一种简单的池操作，用于更集中地提取图级嵌入。我们的模型优于之前最先进的实时方法，在 KIT 双手动作 (Bimacs) 数据集和协作动作 (CoAx) 数据集上的 F1 宏观分数分别提高了 14.3% 和 5.6%。此外，我们进行了广泛的消融研究来验证我们的网络设计选择。最后，我们将我们的模型与 Bimacs 数据集上的架构相似的基于 RGB 的模型进行比较，并显示该模型与我们在这种以对象为中心的操作数据集上的模型相比的局限性。 本文提出一种实时操作动作识别方法，通过分解图序列编码器和Hand Pooling操作提升模型的时间扩展性与性能。 Enes Erdogan,Eren Erdal Aksoy,Sanem Sariel cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhenxin Li,Shihao Wang,Shiyi Lan,Zhiding Yu,Zuxuan Wu,Jose M. Alvarez
title: Hydra-NeXt: Robust Closed-Loop Driving with Open-Loop Training
title_zh: Hydra-NeXt：具有开环训练的鲁棒闭环驱动
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving research currently faces a critical challenge in bridging the gap between open-loop training and closed-loop deployment. Current approaches are trained to predict trajectories in an open-loop environment, which struggle with quick reactions to other agents in closed-loop environments and risk generating kinematically infeasible plans due to the gap between open-loop training and closed-loop driving. In this paper, we introduce Hydra-NeXt, a novel multi-branch planning framework that unifies trajectory prediction, control prediction, and a trajectory refinement network in one model. Unlike current open-loop trajectory prediction models that only handle general-case planning, Hydra-NeXt further utilizes a control decoder to focus on short-term actions, which enables faster responses to dynamic situations and reactive agents. Moreover, we propose the Trajectory Refinement module to augment and refine the planning decisions by effectively adhering to kinematic constraints in closed-loop environments. This unified approach bridges the gap between open-loop training and closed-loop driving, demonstrating superior performance of 65.89 Driving Score (DS) and 48.20% Success Rate (SR) on the Bench2Drive dataset without relying on external experts for data collection. Hydra-NeXt surpasses the previous state-of-the-art by 22.98 DS and 17.49 SR, marking a significant advancement in autonomous driving. Code will be available at https://github.com/woxihuanjiangguo/Hydra-NeXt.
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving research currently faces a critical challenge in bridging the gap between open-loop training and closed-loop deployment. Current approaches are trained to predict trajectories in an open-loop environment, which struggle with quick reactions to other agents in closed-loop environments and risk generating kinematically infeasible plans due to the gap between open-loop training and closed-loop driving. In this paper, we introduce Hydra-NeXt, a novel multi-branch planning framework that unifies trajectory prediction, control prediction, and a trajectory refinement network in one model. Unlike current open-loop trajectory prediction models that only handle general-case planning, Hydra-NeXt further utilizes a control decoder to focus on short-term actions, which enables faster responses to dynamic situations and reactive agents. Moreover, we propose the Trajectory Refinement module to augment and refine the planning decisions by effectively adhering to kinematic constraints in closed-loop environments. This unified approach bridges the gap between open-loop training and closed-loop driving, demonstrating superior performance of 65.89 Driving Score (DS) and 48.20% Success Rate (SR) on the Bench2Drive dataset without relying on external experts for data collection. Hydra-NeXt surpasses the previous state-of-the-art by 22.98 DS and 17.49 SR, marking a significant advancement in autonomous driving. Code will be available at https://github.com/woxihuanjiangguo/Hydra-NeXt.
abstract_zh: 端到端自动驾驶研究目前面临着弥合开环训练和闭环部署之间差距的严峻挑战。当前的方法经过训练来预测开环环境中的轨迹，这些方法很难对闭环环境中的其他智能体做出快速反应，并且由于开环训练和闭环驾驶之间的差距，可能会产生运动学​​上不可行的计划。在本文中，我们介绍了 Hydra-NeXt，这是一种新颖的多分支规划框架，它将轨迹预测、控制预测和轨迹细化网络统一在一个模型中。与当前仅处理一般情况规划的开环轨迹预测模型不同，Hydra-NeXt 进一步利用控制解码器来关注短期动作，从而能够更快地响应动态情况和反应代理。此外，我们提出了轨迹细化模块，通过有效遵守闭环环境中的运动学约束来增强和细化规划决策。这种统一的方法弥合了开环训练和闭环驾驶之间的差距，在 Bench2Drive 数据集上展示了 65.89 的驾驶分数 (DS) 和 48.20% 的成功率 (SR) 的卓越性能，而无需依赖外部专家进行数据收集。 Hydra-NeXt 以 22.98 DS 和 17.49 SR 的成绩超越了之前的最先进水平，标志着自动驾驶领域的重大进步。代码可在 https://github.com/woxihuan Jiangguo/Hydra-NeXt 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hydra-NeXt的多分支规划框架，用于解决端到端自动驾驶中开环训练与闭环部署之间的差距问题。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶研究中，开环训练模型在闭环环境中难以快速反应动态交通参与者，并且容易生成不符合运动学约束的轨迹计划。
AI.method: Hydra-NeXt结合轨迹预测、控制预测和轨迹优化模块，利用控制解码器专注于短期动作，并引入轨迹优化模块以确保在闭环环境中的运动学约束。
AI.result: Hydra-NeXt在Bench2Drive数据集上实现了65.89的驾驶得分和48.20%的成功率，优于先前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: Hydra-NeXt通过统一的框架显著提升了自动驾驶的性能，为闭环驾驶提供了更安全和高效的解决方案。

authors_text: F. Çengel,V. Adanova,S. Tari
title: Challenges in Plane Symmetry: From Theory to Perception
title_zh: 平面对称的挑战：从理论到感知
abstract: The planar ornaments are created by repeating a base unit using a combination of four primitive geometric operations: translation, rotation, reflection, and glide reflection. According to group theory, different combinations of these four geometric operations lead to different symmetry groups. In this work, we select a single challenging ornament, and analyze it both from the theoretical point of view and perceptual point of view. We present the perceptual experiment results, where one can see that the symmetries that the participants perceived from the ornaments do not match to what the theory dictates.
summary: The planar ornaments are created by repeating a base unit using a combination of four primitive geometric operations: translation, rotation, reflection, and glide reflection. According to group theory, different combinations of these four geometric operations lead to different symmetry groups. In this work, we select a single challenging ornament, and analyze it both from the theoretical point of view and perceptual point of view. We present the perceptual experiment results, where one can see that the symmetries that the participants perceived from the ornaments do not match to what the theory dictates.
abstract_zh: 平面装饰品是通过使用四种原始几何操作的组合重复基本单元而创建的：平移、旋转、反射和滑动反射。根据群论，这四种几何运算的不同组合会产生不同的对称群。在这项工作中，我们选择了一个具有挑战性的装饰品，并从理论和感性的角度对其进行分析。我们展示了感知实验结果，可以看到参与者从装饰品中感知到的对称性与理论所指示的不符。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了平面装饰图案的理论对称性与人类感知之间的差异，通过理论分析和感知实验揭示两者不匹配的现象。
AI.motivation: 尽管群论已明确平面图案的对称性分类，但人类实际感知可能与理论存在偏差，这种差异对艺术设计和认知研究具有重要意义。
AI.method: 选取具有挑战性的装饰图案，结合群论进行理论分析，并设计感知实验让参与者识别图案对称性，对比理论结果与实验数据。
AI.result: 实验表明参与者感知到的对称性与理论预测不符，说明人类对平面图案对称性的认知存在系统性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 理论模型与人类感知的不匹配提示需重新审视对称性认知机制，或在艺术设计中考虑感知偏差因素。

authors_text: Zihan Zhou,Changrui Dai,Aibo Song,Xiaolin Fang
title: Leveraging Motion Information for Better Self-Supervised Video Correspondence Learning
title_zh: 利用运动信息实现更好的自监督视频对应学习
abstract: Self-supervised video correspondence learning depends on the ability to accurately associate pixels between video frames that correspond to the same visual object. However, achieving reliable pixel matching without supervision remains a major challenge. To address this issue, recent research has focused on feature learning techniques that aim to encode unique pixel representations for matching. Despite these advances, existing methods still struggle to achieve exact pixel correspondences and often suffer from false matches, limiting their effectiveness in self-supervised settings. To this end, we explore an efficient self-supervised Video Correspondence Learning framework (MER) that aims to accurately extract object details from unlabeled videos. First, we design a dedicated Motion Enhancement Engine that emphasizes capturing the dynamic motion of objects in videos. In addition, we introduce a flexible sampling strategy for inter-pixel correspondence information (Multi-Cluster Sampler) that enables the model to pay more attention to the pixel changes of important objects in motion. Through experiments, our algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art competitors on video correspondence learning tasks such as video object segmentation and video object keypoint tracking.
summary: Self-supervised video correspondence learning depends on the ability to accurately associate pixels between video frames that correspond to the same visual object. However, achieving reliable pixel matching without supervision remains a major challenge. To address this issue, recent research has focused on feature learning techniques that aim to encode unique pixel representations for matching. Despite these advances, existing methods still struggle to achieve exact pixel correspondences and often suffer from false matches, limiting their effectiveness in self-supervised settings. To this end, we explore an efficient self-supervised Video Correspondence Learning framework (MER) that aims to accurately extract object details from unlabeled videos. First, we design a dedicated Motion Enhancement Engine that emphasizes capturing the dynamic motion of objects in videos. In addition, we introduce a flexible sampling strategy for inter-pixel correspondence information (Multi-Cluster Sampler) that enables the model to pay more attention to the pixel changes of important objects in motion. Through experiments, our algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art competitors on video correspondence learning tasks such as video object segmentation and video object keypoint tracking.
abstract_zh: 自监督视频对应学习取决于准确关联对应于同一视觉对象的视频帧之间的像素的能力。然而，在没有监督的情况下实现可靠​​的像素匹配仍然是一个重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究集中在特征学习技术上，旨在对独特的像素表示进行编码以进行匹配。尽管取得了这些进步，现有的方法仍然难以实现精确的像素对应，并且经常出现错误匹配，限制了它们在自我监督设置中的有效性。为此，我们探索了一种高效的自监督视频对应学习框架（MER），旨在从未标记的视频中准确提取对象细节。首先，我们设计了一个专用的运动增强引擎，强调捕捉视频中物体的动态运动。此外，我们还引入了灵活的像素间对应信息采样策略（Multi-Cluster Sampler），使模型能够更加关注运动中重要物体的像素变化。通过实验，我们的算法在视频对象分割和视频对象关键点跟踪等视频对应学习任务上优于最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用运动信息提升自监督视频对应学习的框架MER，旨在解决无监督环境下像素级匹配的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频对应学习方法难以实现精确像素匹配，常因虚假匹配导致效果受限，需通过运动信息增强特征学习能力。
AI.method: 设计运动增强引擎捕捉视频中物体动态，并引入多簇采样器（Multi-Cluster Sampler）聚焦运动物体的像素变化，优化跨帧对应关系学习。
AI.result: 在视频物体分割和关键点跟踪任务中，MER算法优于现有最先进方法，验证了运动信息与采样策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合运动感知与动态采样机制，MER框架显著提升了自监督视频对应学习的精度与鲁棒性。

search_text: Leveraging Motion Information for Better Self-Supervised Video Correspondence Learning 利用运动信息实现更好的自监督视频对应学习 Self-supervised video correspondence learning depends on the ability to accurately associate pixels between video frames that correspond to the same visual object. However, achieving reliable pixel matching without supervision remains a major challenge. To address this issue, recent research has focused on feature learning techniques that aim to encode unique pixel representations for matching. Despite these advances, existing methods still struggle to achieve exact pixel correspondences and often suffer from false matches, limiting their effectiveness in self-supervised settings. To this end, we explore an efficient self-supervised Video Correspondence Learning framework (MER) that aims to accurately extract object details from unlabeled videos. First, we design a dedicated Motion Enhancement Engine that emphasizes capturing the dynamic motion of objects in videos. In addition, we introduce a flexible sampling strategy for inter-pixel correspondence information (Multi-Cluster Sampler) that enables the model to pay more attention to the pixel changes of important objects in motion. Through experiments, our algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art competitors on video correspondence learning tasks such as video object segmentation and video object keypoint tracking. 自监督视频对应学习取决于准确关联对应于同一视觉对象的视频帧之间的像素的能力。然而，在没有监督的情况下实现可靠​​的像素匹配仍然是一个重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究集中在特征学习技术上，旨在对独特的像素表示进行编码以进行匹配。尽管取得了这些进步，现有的方法仍然难以实现精确的像素对应，并且经常出现错误匹配，限制了它们在自我监督设置中的有效性。为此，我们探索了一种高效的自监督视频对应学习框架（MER），旨在从未标记的视频中准确提取对象细节。首先，我们设计了一个专用的运动增强引擎，强调捕捉视频中物体的动态运动。此外，我们还引入了灵活的像素间对应信息采样策略（Multi-Cluster Sampler），使模型能够更加关注运动中重要物体的像素变化。通过实验，我们的算法在视频对象分割和视频对象关键点跟踪等视频对应学习任务上优于最先进的竞争对手。 本文提出了一种利用运动信息提升自监督视频对应学习的框架MER，旨在解决无监督环境下像素级匹配的挑战。 Zihan Zhou,Changrui Dai,Aibo Song,Xiaolin Fang cs.CV

authors_text: Byeongjun Park,Hyojun Go,Hyelin Nam,Byung-Hoon Kim,Hyungjin Chung,Changick Kim
title: SteerX: Creating Any Camera-Free 3D and 4D Scenes with Geometric Steering
title_zh: SteerX：使用几何转向创建任何无相机的 3D 和 4D 场景
abstract: Recent progress in 3D/4D scene generation emphasizes the importance of physical alignment throughout video generation and scene reconstruction. However, existing methods improve the alignment separately at each stage, making it difficult to manage subtle misalignments arising from another stage. Here, we present SteerX, a zero-shot inference-time steering method that unifies scene reconstruction into the generation process, tilting data distributions toward better geometric alignment. To this end, we introduce two geometric reward functions for 3D/4D scene generation by using pose-free feed-forward scene reconstruction models. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of SteerX in improving 3D/4D scene generation.
summary: Recent progress in 3D/4D scene generation emphasizes the importance of physical alignment throughout video generation and scene reconstruction. However, existing methods improve the alignment separately at each stage, making it difficult to manage subtle misalignments arising from another stage. Here, we present SteerX, a zero-shot inference-time steering method that unifies scene reconstruction into the generation process, tilting data distributions toward better geometric alignment. To this end, we introduce two geometric reward functions for 3D/4D scene generation by using pose-free feed-forward scene reconstruction models. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of SteerX in improving 3D/4D scene generation.
abstract_zh: 3D/4D 场景生成的最新进展强调了整个视频生成和场景重建过程中物理对齐的重要性。然而，现有的方法在每个阶段分别改进对齐，使得难以管理另一个阶段引起的细微错位。在这里，我们提出了 SteerX，一种零样本推理时间引导方法，它将场景重建统一到生成过程中，使数据分布朝着更好的几何对齐方向倾斜。为此，我们通过使用无位姿前馈场景重建模型引入了两个用于 3D/4D 场景生成的几何奖励函数。通过大量的实验，我们证明了 SteerX 在改进 3D/4D 场景生成方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SteerX方法，通过几何引导在无需相机的情况下生成高质量的3D/4D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有3D/4D场景生成方法在各阶段独立优化对齐问题，难以处理跨阶段产生的细微几何错位。
AI.method: 设计两种几何奖励函数，利用无姿态前馈重建模型，在生成过程中统一场景重建与生成步骤。
AI.result: 实验表明SteerX能有效提升生成场景的几何对齐质量，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一生成与重建流程，SteerX解决了跨阶段几何对齐难题，推动了物理一致的3D/4D场景生成发展。

authors_text: Jiafan He,Quanquan Gu
title: Variance-Dependent Regret Lower Bounds for Contextual Bandits
title_zh: 上下文强盗的方差相关遗憾下界
abstract: Variance-dependent regret bounds for linear contextual bandits, which improve upon the classical $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{K})$ regret bound to $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2})$, where $d$ is the context dimension, $K$ is the number of rounds, and $σ^2_k$ is the noise variance in round $k$, has been widely studied in recent years. However, most existing works focus on the regret upper bounds instead of lower bounds. To our knowledge, the only lower bound is from Jia et al. (2024), which proved that for any eluder dimension $d_{\textbf{elu}}$ and total variance budget $Λ$, there exists an instance with $\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2\leq Λ$ for which any algorithm incurs a variance-dependent lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{d_{\textbf{elu}}Λ})$. However, this lower bound has a $\sqrt{d}$ gap with existing upper bounds. Moreover, it only considers a fixed total variance budget $Λ$ and does not apply to a general variance sequence $\{σ_1^2,\ldots,σ_K^2\}$. In this paper, to overcome the limitations of Jia et al. (2024), we consider the general variance sequence under two settings. For a prefixed sequence, where the entire variance sequence is revealed to the learner at the beginning of the learning process, we establish a variance-dependent lower bound of $Ω(d \sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2 }/\log K)$ for linear contextual bandits. For an adaptive sequence, where an adversary can generate the variance $σ_k^2$ in each round $k$ based on historical observations, we show that when the adversary must generate $σ_k^2$ before observing the decision set $\mathcal{D}_k$, a similar lower bound of $Ω(d\sqrt{ \sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2} /\log^6(dK))$ holds. In both settings, our results match the upper bounds of the SAVE algorithm (Zhao et al., 2023) up to logarithmic factors.
summary: Variance-dependent regret bounds for linear contextual bandits, which improve upon the classical $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{K})$ regret bound to $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2})$, where $d$ is the context dimension, $K$ is the number of rounds, and $σ^2_k$ is the noise variance in round $k$, has been widely studied in recent years. However, most existing works focus on the regret upper bounds instead of lower bounds. To our knowledge, the only lower bound is from Jia et al. (2024), which proved that for any eluder dimension $d_{\textbf{elu}}$ and total variance budget $Λ$, there exists an instance with $\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2\leq Λ$ for which any algorithm incurs a variance-dependent lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{d_{\textbf{elu}}Λ})$. However, this lower bound has a $\sqrt{d}$ gap with existing upper bounds. Moreover, it only considers a fixed total variance budget $Λ$ and does not apply to a general variance sequence $\{σ_1^2,\ldots,σ_K^2\}$. In this paper, to overcome the limitations of Jia et al. (2024), we consider the general variance sequence under two settings. For a prefixed sequence, where the entire variance sequence is revealed to the learner at the beginning of the learning process, we establish a variance-dependent lower bound of $Ω(d \sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2 }/\log K)$ for linear contextual bandits. For an adaptive sequence, where an adversary can generate the variance $σ_k^2$ in each round $k$ based on historical observations, we show that when the adversary must generate $σ_k^2$ before observing the decision set $\mathcal{D}_k$, a similar lower bound of $Ω(d\sqrt{ \sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2} /\log^6(dK))$ holds. In both settings, our results match the upper bounds of the SAVE algorithm (Zhao et al., 2023) up to logarithmic factors.
abstract_zh: 线性上下文老虎机的方差相关后悔界限，改进了经典的 $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{K})$ 后悔绑定到 $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2})$，其中 $d$ 是上下文维度，$K$ 是轮数，$σ^2_k$ 是轮 $k$ 中的噪声方差，近年来得到了广泛的研究年。然而，大多数现有的工作都关注遗憾的上限而不是下限。据我们所知，唯一的下限来自 Jia 等人。 (2024)，证明对于任何逃避维度 $d_{\textbf{elu}}$ 和总方差预算 $Λ$，都存在一个 $\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2\leq Λ$ 的实例，任何算法都会产生 $Ω(\sqrt{d_{\textbf{elu}}Λ})$ 的方差相关下界。然而，这个下限与现有上限有 $\sqrt{d}$ 差距。而且，它只考虑固定的总方差预算$Λ$，不适用于一般方差序列$\{σ_1^2,\ldots,σ_K^2\}$。本文旨在克服贾等人的局限性。 （2024），我们考虑两种设置下的一般方差序列。对于前缀序列，整个方差序列在学习过程开始时就向学习者揭示，我们为线性上下文老虎机建立了 $Ω(d \sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2 }/\log K)$ 的方差相关下界。对于自适应序列，对手可以根据历史观察在每轮 $k$ 中生成方差 $σ_k^2$，我们表明，当对手必须在观察决策集 $\mathcal{D}_k$ 之前生成 $σ_k^2$ 时，$Ω(d\sqrt{ \sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2} /\log^6(dK))$ 的类似下限成立。在这两种设置中，我们的结果都与 SAVE 算法的上限（Zhao 等人，2023）匹配到对数因子。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在针对上下文老虎机问题，研究方差依赖的遗憾下界，弥补现有研究在一般方差序列下的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方差依赖的遗憾下界存在与上界差距及适用范围受限的问题，需建立更普适的下界分析框架。
AI.method: 通过分析预设方差序列和自适应方差序列两种场景，构造对抗实例并结合算法性能分析推导下界。
AI.result: 在预设序列下证明Ω(d√Σσ_k²/log K)下界，在自适应序列下证明Ω(d√Σσ_k²/log^6(dK))下界，与SAVE算法上界匹配。
AI.conclusion: 填补了方差序列下界研究的空白，理论结果与现有最优上界一致，完善了上下文老虎机的 regret 分析体系。

motivation: 现有方差依赖的遗憾下界存在与上界差距及适用范围受限的问题，需建立更普适的下界分析框架。

conclusion: 填补了方差序列下界研究的空白，理论结果与现有最优上界一致，完善了上下文老虎机的 regret 分析体系。
search_text: Variance-Dependent Regret Lower Bounds for Contextual Bandits 上下文强盗的方差相关遗憾下界 Variance-dependent regret bounds for linear contextual bandits, which improve upon the classical $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{K})$ regret bound to $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2})$, where $d$ is the context dimension, $K$ is the number of rounds, and $σ^2_k$ is the noise variance in round $k$, has been widely studied in recent years. However, most existing works focus on the regret upper bounds instead of lower bounds. To our knowledge, the only lower bound is from Jia et al. (2024), which proved that for any eluder dimension $d_{\textbf{elu}}$ and total variance budget $Λ$, there exists an instance with $\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2\leq Λ$ for which any algorithm incurs a variance-dependent lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{d_{\textbf{elu}}Λ})$. However, this lower bound has a $\sqrt{d}$ gap with existing upper bounds. Moreover, it only considers a fixed total variance budget $Λ$ and does not apply to a general variance sequence $\{σ_1^2,\ldots,σ_K^2\}$. In this paper, to overcome the limitations of Jia et al. (2024), we consider the general variance sequence under two settings. For a prefixed sequence, where the entire variance sequence is revealed to the learner at the beginning of the learning process, we establish a variance-dependent lower bound of $Ω(d \sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2 }/\log K)$ for linear contextual bandits. For an adaptive sequence, where an adversary can generate the variance $σ_k^2$ in each round $k$ based on historical observations, we show that when the adversary must generate $σ_k^2$ before observing the decision set $\mathcal{D}_k$, a similar lower bound of $Ω(d\sqrt{ \sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2} /\log^6(dK))$ holds. In both settings, our results match the upper bounds of the SAVE algorithm (Zhao et al., 2023) up to logarithmic factors. 线性上下文老虎机的方差相关后悔界限，改进了经典的 $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{K})$ 后悔绑定到 $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2})$，其中 $d$ 是上下文维度，$K$ 是轮数，$σ^2_k$ 是轮 $k$ 中的噪声方差，近年来得到了广泛的研究年。然而，大多数现有的工作都关注遗憾的上限而不是下限。据我们所知，唯一的下限来自 Jia 等人。 (2024)，证明对于任何逃避维度 $d_{\textbf{elu}}$ 和总方差预算 $Λ$，都存在一个 $\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2\leq Λ$ 的实例，任何算法都会产生 $Ω(\sqrt{d_{\textbf{elu}}Λ})$ 的方差相关下界。然而，这个下限与现有上限有 $\sqrt{d}$ 差距。而且，它只考虑固定的总方差预算$Λ$，不适用于一般方差序列$\{σ_1^2,\ldots,σ_K^2\}$。本文旨在克服贾等人的局限性。 （2024），我们考虑两种设置下的一般方差序列。对于前缀序列，整个方差序列在学习过程开始时就向学习者揭示，我们为线性上下文老虎机建立了 $Ω(d \sqrt{\sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2 }/\log K)$ 的方差相关下界。对于自适应序列，对手可以根据历史观察在每轮 $k$ 中生成方差 $σ_k^2$，我们表明，当对手必须在观察决策集 $\mathcal{D}_k$ 之前生成 $σ_k^2$ 时，$Ω(d\sqrt{ \sum_{k=1}^Kσ_k^2} /\log^6(dK))$ 的类似下限成立。在这两种设置中，我们的结果都与 SAVE 算法的上限（Zhao 等人，2023）匹配到对数因子。 本文旨在针对上下文老虎机问题，研究方差依赖的遗憾下界，弥补现有研究在一般方差序列下的不足。 Jiafan He,Quanquan Gu cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Zhe Jin,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Compose Your Aesthetics: Empowering Text-to-Image Models with the Principles of Art
title_zh: 构建你的美学：用艺术原理赋予文本到图像模型权力
abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) diffusion models (DM) have garnered widespread adoption due to their capability in generating high-fidelity outputs and accessibility to anyone able to put imagination into words. However, DMs are often predisposed to generate unappealing outputs, much like the random images on the internet they were trained on. Existing approaches to address this are founded on the implicit premise that visual aesthetics is universal, which is limiting. Aesthetics in the T2I context should be about personalization and we propose the novel task of aesthetics alignment which seeks to align user-specified aesthetics with the T2I generation output. Inspired by how artworks provide an invaluable perspective to approach aesthetics, we codify visual aesthetics using the compositional framework artists employ, known as the Principles of Art (PoA). To facilitate this study, we introduce CompArt, a large-scale compositional art dataset building on top of WikiArt with PoA analysis annotated by a capable Multimodal LLM. Leveraging the expressive power of LLMs and training a lightweight and transferrable adapter, we demonstrate that T2I DMs can effectively offer 10 compositional controls through user-specified PoA conditions. Additionally, we design an appropriate evaluation framework to assess the efficacy of our approach.
summary: Text-to-Image (T2I) diffusion models (DM) have garnered widespread adoption due to their capability in generating high-fidelity outputs and accessibility to anyone able to put imagination into words. However, DMs are often predisposed to generate unappealing outputs, much like the random images on the internet they were trained on. Existing approaches to address this are founded on the implicit premise that visual aesthetics is universal, which is limiting. Aesthetics in the T2I context should be about personalization and we propose the novel task of aesthetics alignment which seeks to align user-specified aesthetics with the T2I generation output. Inspired by how artworks provide an invaluable perspective to approach aesthetics, we codify visual aesthetics using the compositional framework artists employ, known as the Principles of Art (PoA). To facilitate this study, we introduce CompArt, a large-scale compositional art dataset building on top of WikiArt with PoA analysis annotated by a capable Multimodal LLM. Leveraging the expressive power of LLMs and training a lightweight and transferrable adapter, we demonstrate that T2I DMs can effectively offer 10 compositional controls through user-specified PoA conditions. Additionally, we design an appropriate evaluation framework to assess the efficacy of our approach.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像 (T2I) 扩散模型 (DM) 已获得广泛采用，因为它们能够生成高保真输出，并且任何能够将想象力转化为文字的人都可以使用。然而，DM 通常倾向于生成不吸引人的输出，就像他们接受训练时所使用的互联网上的随机图像一样。解决这个问题的现有方法建立在视觉美学是普遍的隐含前提之上，这是有限制的。 T2I 背景下的美学应该是个性化，我们提出了美学对齐的新任务，旨在将用户指定的美学与 T2I 生成输出保持一致。受艺术品如何提供宝贵的美学视角的启发，我们使用艺术家采用的构图框架（称为艺术原理（PoA））来编纂视觉美学。为了促进这项研究，我们引入了 CompArt，这是一个建立在 WikiArt 之上的大型构图艺术数据集，具有由强大的多模态法学硕士注释的 PoA 分析。利用 LLM 的表达能力并训练轻量级可转移适配器，我们证明 T2I DM 可以通过用户指定的 PoA 条件有效地提供 10 种成分控制。此外，我们设计了一个适当的评估框架来评估我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过艺术原则（PoA）实现文本到图像模型的美学对齐任务，使生成图像符合用户指定的个性化美学标准。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型生成结果缺乏个性化美学控制，传统方法基于普适美学假设存在局限性，需探索用户自定义美学的实现路径。
AI.method: 构建CompArt数据集（基于WikiArt的多模态LLM美学标注），设计轻量可迁移适配器，通过PoA框架实现10个组合控制维度的美学条件输入。
AI.result: 验证了模型在10个艺术原则维度上的可控性，建立了包含主观美学评估的评价体系，生成结果在美学相关性指标上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过艺术原则编码实现用户美学偏好对齐，为文本到图像生成提供了可解释的个性化控制框架，拓展了扩散模型的创作边界。

authors_text: Donglin Yang,Paul Vicol,Xiaojuan Qi,Renjie Liao,Xiaofan Zhang
title: QDM: Quadtree-Based Region-Adaptive Sparse Diffusion Models for Efficient Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: QDM：基于四叉树的区域自适应稀疏扩散模型，实现高效图像超分辨率
abstract: Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) methods often perform pixel-wise computations uniformly across entire images, even in homogeneous regions where high-resolution refinement is redundant. We propose the Quadtree Diffusion Model (QDM), a region-adaptive diffusion framework that leverages a quadtree structure to selectively enhance detail-rich regions while reducing computations in homogeneous areas. By guiding the diffusion with a quadtree derived from the low-quality input, QDM identifies key regions-represented by leaf nodes-where fine detail is essential and applies minimal refinement elsewhere. This mask-guided, two-stream architecture adaptively balances quality and efficiency, producing high-fidelity outputs with low computational redundancy. Experiments demonstrate QDM's effectiveness in high-resolution SR tasks across diverse image types, particularly in medical imaging (e.g., CT scans), where large homogeneous regions are prevalent. Furthermore, QDM outperforms or is comparable to state-of-the-art SR methods on standard benchmarks while significantly reducing computational costs, highlighting its efficiency and suitability for resource-limited environments. Our code is available at https://github.com/linYDTHU/QDM.
summary: Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) methods often perform pixel-wise computations uniformly across entire images, even in homogeneous regions where high-resolution refinement is redundant. We propose the Quadtree Diffusion Model (QDM), a region-adaptive diffusion framework that leverages a quadtree structure to selectively enhance detail-rich regions while reducing computations in homogeneous areas. By guiding the diffusion with a quadtree derived from the low-quality input, QDM identifies key regions-represented by leaf nodes-where fine detail is essential and applies minimal refinement elsewhere. This mask-guided, two-stream architecture adaptively balances quality and efficiency, producing high-fidelity outputs with low computational redundancy. Experiments demonstrate QDM's effectiveness in high-resolution SR tasks across diverse image types, particularly in medical imaging (e.g., CT scans), where large homogeneous regions are prevalent. Furthermore, QDM outperforms or is comparable to state-of-the-art SR methods on standard benchmarks while significantly reducing computational costs, highlighting its efficiency and suitability for resource-limited environments. Our code is available at https://github.com/linYDTHU/QDM.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的超分辨率 (SR) 方法通常在整个图像上统一执行像素级计算，即使是在高分辨率细化冗余的同质区域中也是如此。我们提出了四叉树扩散模型（QDM），这是一种区域自适应扩散框架，利用四叉树结构有选择地增强细节丰富的区域，同时减少均匀区域的计算。通过使用源自低质量输入的四叉树引导扩散，QDM 识别由叶节点表示的关键区域，其中精细细节至关重要，并在其他地方应用最小的细化。这种掩模引导的双流架构自适应地平衡质量和效率，以低计算冗余产生高保真输出。实验证明了 QDM 在跨不同图像类型的高分辨率 SR 任务中的有效性，特别是在普遍存在大的均匀区域的医学成像（例如 CT 扫描）中。此外，QDM 在标准基准上优于或与最先进的 SR 方法相当，同时显着降低了计算成本，突出了其效率和对资源有限环境的适用性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/linYDTHU/QDM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于四叉树结构的区域自适应稀疏扩散模型QDM，用于高效图像超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 传统的深度学习超分辨率方法在整个图像上进行统一的像素级计算，即使在同质区域中也会进行不必要的高分辨率细化，导致计算资源浪费。
AI.method: QDM利用四叉树结构，根据低质量输入图像生成的四叉树选择性地增强细节丰富的区域，而在同质区域减少计算量。通过掩码引导的双流架构，QDM自适应地平衡质量和效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，QDM在多种图像类型，特别是医学图像（如CT扫描）的高分辨率超分辨率任务中表现出色，同时显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: QDM在保持高保真输出的同时显著提高了计算效率，适用于资源受限的环境。

method: QDM利用四叉树结构，根据低质量输入图像生成的四叉树选择性地增强细节丰富的区域，而在同质区域减少计算量。通过掩码引导的双流架构，QDM自适应地平衡质量和效率。
result: 实验表明，QDM在多种图像类型，特别是医学图像（如CT扫描）的高分辨率超分辨率任务中表现出色，同时显著降低了计算成本。
conclusion: QDM在保持高保真输出的同时显著提高了计算效率，适用于资源受限的环境。
search_text: QDM: Quadtree-Based Region-Adaptive Sparse Diffusion Models for Efficient Image Super-Resolution QDM：基于四叉树的区域自适应稀疏扩散模型，实现高效图像超分辨率 Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) methods often perform pixel-wise computations uniformly across entire images, even in homogeneous regions where high-resolution refinement is redundant. We propose the Quadtree Diffusion Model (QDM), a region-adaptive diffusion framework that leverages a quadtree structure to selectively enhance detail-rich regions while reducing computations in homogeneous areas. By guiding the diffusion with a quadtree derived from the low-quality input, QDM identifies key regions-represented by leaf nodes-where fine detail is essential and applies minimal refinement elsewhere. This mask-guided, two-stream architecture adaptively balances quality and efficiency, producing high-fidelity outputs with low computational redundancy. Experiments demonstrate QDM's effectiveness in high-resolution SR tasks across diverse image types, particularly in medical imaging (e.g., CT scans), where large homogeneous regions are prevalent. Furthermore, QDM outperforms or is comparable to state-of-the-art SR methods on standard benchmarks while significantly reducing computational costs, highlighting its efficiency and suitability for resource-limited environments. Our code is available at https://github.com/linYDTHU/QDM. 基于深度学习的超分辨率 (SR) 方法通常在整个图像上统一执行像素级计算，即使是在高分辨率细化冗余的同质区域中也是如此。我们提出了四叉树扩散模型（QDM），这是一种区域自适应扩散框架，利用四叉树结构有选择地增强细节丰富的区域，同时减少均匀区域的计算。通过使用源自低质量输入的四叉树引导扩散，QDM 识别由叶节点表示的关键区域，其中精细细节至关重要，并在其他地方应用最小的细化。这种掩模引导的双流架构自适应地平衡质量和效率，以低计算冗余产生高保真输出。实验证明了 QDM 在跨不同图像类型的高分辨率 SR 任务中的有效性，特别是在普遍存在大的均匀区域的医学成像（例如 CT 扫描）中。此外，QDM 在标准基准上优于或与最先进的 SR 方法相当，同时显着降低了计算成本，突出了其效率和对资源有限环境的适用性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/linYDTHU/QDM 获取。 本文提出了一种基于四叉树结构的区域自适应稀疏扩散模型QDM，用于高效图像超分辨率。 Donglin Yang,Paul Vicol,Xiaojuan Qi,Renjie Liao,Xiaofan Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Shun Zou,Yi Zou,Mingya Zhang,Shipeng Luo,Guangwei Gao,Guojun Qi
title: Learning Dual-Domain Multi-Scale Representations for Single Image Deraining
title_zh: 学习单图像去雨的双域多尺度表示
abstract: Existing image deraining methods typically rely on single-input, single-output, and single-scale architectures, which overlook the joint multi-scale information between external and internal features. Furthermore, single-domain representations are often too restrictive, limiting their ability to handle the complexities of real-world rain scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Dual-Domain Multi-Scale Representation Network (DMSR). The key idea is to exploit joint multi-scale representations from both external and internal domains in parallel while leveraging the strengths of both spatial and frequency domains to capture more comprehensive properties. Specifically, our method consists of two main components: the Multi-Scale Progressive Spatial Refinement Module (MPSRM) and the Frequency Domain Scale Mixer (FDSM). The MPSRM enables the interaction and coupling of multi-scale expert information within the internal domain using a hierarchical modulation and fusion strategy. The FDSM extracts multi-scale local information in the spatial domain, while also modeling global dependencies in the frequency domain. Extensive experiments show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance across six benchmark datasets.
summary: Existing image deraining methods typically rely on single-input, single-output, and single-scale architectures, which overlook the joint multi-scale information between external and internal features. Furthermore, single-domain representations are often too restrictive, limiting their ability to handle the complexities of real-world rain scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Dual-Domain Multi-Scale Representation Network (DMSR). The key idea is to exploit joint multi-scale representations from both external and internal domains in parallel while leveraging the strengths of both spatial and frequency domains to capture more comprehensive properties. Specifically, our method consists of two main components: the Multi-Scale Progressive Spatial Refinement Module (MPSRM) and the Frequency Domain Scale Mixer (FDSM). The MPSRM enables the interaction and coupling of multi-scale expert information within the internal domain using a hierarchical modulation and fusion strategy. The FDSM extracts multi-scale local information in the spatial domain, while also modeling global dependencies in the frequency domain. Extensive experiments show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance across six benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 现有的图像去雨方法通常依赖于单输入、单输出和单尺度架构，忽略了外部和内部特征之间的联合多尺度信息。此外，单域表示通常限制性太大，限制了它们处理现实世界降雨场景复杂性的能力。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的双域多尺度表示网络（DMSR）。关键思想是并行利用外部和内部域的联合多尺度表示，同时利用空间域和频域的优势来捕获更全面的属性。具体来说，我们的方法由两个主要组件组成：多尺度渐进空间细化模块（MPSRM）和频域尺度混合器（FDSM）。 MPSRM 使用分层调制和融合策略实现内部域内多尺度专家信息的交互和耦合。 FDSM 在空间域中提取多尺度局部信息，同时还在频域中对全局依赖性进行建模。大量实验表明，我们的模型在六个基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双域多尺度表示网络（DMSR），用于单幅图像去雨任务，通过联合外部和内部多尺度信息提升去雨效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去雨方法受限于单输入单输出架构，无法有效捕捉多尺度特征及跨域信息，导致复杂雨情处理效果不足。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度渐进空间 refinement 模块（MPSRM）和频域尺度混合器（FDSM）的双域网络，分别在空间域提取局部信息并建模全局依赖，在频域增强多尺度特征交互。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上达到当时最先进的去雨性能，验证了双域多尺度表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双域多尺度联合建模能更全面捕捉雨图像特征，为单幅图像去雨任务提供了新思路和有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xin Jin,Haisheng Su,Kai Liu,Cong Ma,Wei Wu,Fei Hui,Junchi Yan
title: UniMamba: Unified Spatial-Channel Representation Learning with Group-Efficient Mamba for LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: UniMamba：使用群组高效 Mamba 进行统一空间通道表示学习，用于基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测
abstract: Recent advances in LiDAR 3D detection have demonstrated the effectiveness of Transformer-based frameworks in capturing the global dependencies from point cloud spaces, which serialize the 3D voxels into the flattened 1D sequence for iterative self-attention. However, the spatial structure of 3D voxels will be inevitably destroyed during the serialization process. Besides, due to the considerable number of 3D voxels and quadratic complexity of Transformers, multiple sequences are grouped before feeding to Transformers, leading to a limited receptive field. Inspired by the impressive performance of State Space Models (SSM) achieved in the field of 2D vision tasks, in this paper, we propose a novel Unified Mamba (UniMamba), which seamlessly integrates the merits of 3D convolution and SSM in a concise multi-head manner, aiming to perform "local and global" spatial context aggregation efficiently and simultaneously. Specifically, a UniMamba block is designed which mainly consists of spatial locality modeling, complementary Z-order serialization and local-global sequential aggregator. The spatial locality modeling module integrates 3D submanifold convolution to capture the dynamic spatial position embedding before serialization. Then the efficient Z-order curve is adopted for serialization both horizontally and vertically. Furthermore, the local-global sequential aggregator adopts the channel grouping strategy to efficiently encode both "local and global" spatial inter-dependencies using multi-head SSM. Additionally, an encoder-decoder architecture with stacked UniMamba blocks is formed to facilitate multi-scale spatial learning hierarchically. Extensive experiments are conducted on three popular datasets: nuScenes, Waymo and Argoverse 2. Particularly, our UniMamba achieves 70.2 mAP on the nuScenes dataset.
summary: Recent advances in LiDAR 3D detection have demonstrated the effectiveness of Transformer-based frameworks in capturing the global dependencies from point cloud spaces, which serialize the 3D voxels into the flattened 1D sequence for iterative self-attention. However, the spatial structure of 3D voxels will be inevitably destroyed during the serialization process. Besides, due to the considerable number of 3D voxels and quadratic complexity of Transformers, multiple sequences are grouped before feeding to Transformers, leading to a limited receptive field. Inspired by the impressive performance of State Space Models (SSM) achieved in the field of 2D vision tasks, in this paper, we propose a novel Unified Mamba (UniMamba), which seamlessly integrates the merits of 3D convolution and SSM in a concise multi-head manner, aiming to perform "local and global" spatial context aggregation efficiently and simultaneously. Specifically, a UniMamba block is designed which mainly consists of spatial locality modeling, complementary Z-order serialization and local-global sequential aggregator. The spatial locality modeling module integrates 3D submanifold convolution to capture the dynamic spatial position embedding before serialization. Then the efficient Z-order curve is adopted for serialization both horizontally and vertically. Furthermore, the local-global sequential aggregator adopts the channel grouping strategy to efficiently encode both "local and global" spatial inter-dependencies using multi-head SSM. Additionally, an encoder-decoder architecture with stacked UniMamba blocks is formed to facilitate multi-scale spatial learning hierarchically. Extensive experiments are conducted on three popular datasets: nuScenes, Waymo and Argoverse 2. Particularly, our UniMamba achieves 70.2 mAP on the nuScenes dataset.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 3D 检测的最新进展证明了基于 Transformer 的框架在捕获点云空间的全局依赖性方面的有效性，该框架将 3D 体素序列化为扁平化的 1D 序列以进行迭代自注意力。然而，3D体素的空间结构在序列化过程中将不可避免地被破坏。此外，由于 Transformers 具有大量的 3D 体素和二次复杂度，多个序列在输入到 Transformers 之前会被分组，导致感受野有限。受到状态空间模型（SSM）在2D视觉任务领域取得的令人印象深刻的性能的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的统一Mamba（UniMamba），它以简洁的多头方式无缝集成3D卷积和SSM的优点，旨在高效、同时地执行“局部和全局”空间上下文聚合。具体来说，设计了一个UniMamba块，主要由空间局部性建模、互补Z顺序序列化和局部全局顺序聚合器组成。空间局部性建模模块集成了 3D 子流形卷积，以在序列化之前捕获动态空间位置嵌入。然后采用高效的Z阶曲线进行水平和垂直序列化。此外，局部-全局顺序聚合器采用通道分组策略，使用多头 SSM 有效地编码“局部和全局”空间相互依赖性。此外，还形成了具有堆叠 UniMamba 块的编码器-解码器架构，以促进分层的多尺度空间学习。在三个流行的数据集上进行了大量的实验：nuScenes、Waymo 和 Argoverse 2。特别是，我们的 UniMamba 在 nuScenes 数据集上达到了 70.2 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniMamba模型，通过结合3D卷积与状态空间模型（SSM），提升基于LiDAR的3D目标检测中空间-通道表示学习的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer框架在处理LiDAR点云时因序列化操作破坏3D空间结构，且存在二次复杂度与感受野受限问题，而SSM在2D视觉任务中表现出色，需探索其在3D检测中的应用。
AI.method: 设计UniMamba模块，包含空间局部性建模（3D子流形卷积）、Z字形序列化及局部-全局时序聚合器，通过多头SSM实现通道分组的高效空间依赖编码，并构建编码-解码架构实现多尺度学习。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Waymo和Argoverse 2数据集上验证，其中在nuScenes数据集上达到70.2 mAP，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: UniMamba通过统一整合3D卷积与SSM的优势，有效解决了空间结构破坏与计算效率问题，在LiDAR-based 3D目标检测中展现出卓越性能。

Then the efficient Z-order curve is adopted for serialization both horizontally and vertically. Furthermore, the local-global sequential aggregator adopts the channel grouping strategy to efficiently encode both "local and global" spatial inter-dependencies using multi-head SSM. Additionally, an encoder-decoder architecture with stacked UniMamba blocks is formed to facilitate multi-scale spatial learning hierarchically. Extensive experiments are conducted on three popular datasets: nuScenes, Waymo and Argoverse 2. Particularly, our UniMamba achieves 70.2 mAP on the nuScenes dataset. LiDAR 3D 检测的最新进展证明了基于 Transformer 的框架在捕获点云空间的全局依赖性方面的有效性，该框架将 3D 体素序列化为扁平化的 1D 序列以进行迭代自注意力。然而，3D体素的空间结构在序列化过程中将不可避免地被破坏。此外，由于 Transformers 具有大量的 3D 体素和二次复杂度，多个序列在输入到 Transformers 之前会被分组，导致感受野有限。受到状态空间模型（SSM）在2D视觉任务领域取得的令人印象深刻的性能的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的统一Mamba（UniMamba），它以简洁的多头方式无缝集成3D卷积和SSM的优点，旨在高效、同时地执行“局部和全局”空间上下文聚合。具体来说，设计了一个UniMamba块，主要由空间局部性建模、互补Z顺序序列化和局部全局顺序聚合器组成。空间局部性建模模块集成了 3D 子流形卷积，以在序列化之前捕获动态空间位置嵌入。然后采用高效的Z阶曲线进行水平和垂直序列化。此外，局部-全局顺序聚合器采用通道分组策略，使用多头 SSM 有效地编码“局部和全局”空间相互依赖性。此外，还形成了具有堆叠 UniMamba 块的编码器-解码器架构，以促进分层的多尺度空间学习。在三个流行的数据集上进行了大量的实验：nuScenes、Waymo 和 Argoverse 2。特别是，我们的 UniMamba 在 nuScenes 数据集上达到了 70.2 mAP。 本文提出UniMamba模型，通过结合3D卷积与状态空间模型（SSM），提升基于LiDAR的3D目标检测中空间-通道表示学习的效率与性能。 Xin Jin,Haisheng Su,Kai Liu,Cong Ma,Wei Wu,Fei Hui,Junchi Yan cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoyu Wu,Yifei Pang,Terrance Liu,Steven Wu
title: Winning the MIDST Challenge: New Membership Inference Attacks on Diffusion Models for Tabular Data Synthesis
title_zh: 赢得 MIDST 挑战：针对表格数据合成的扩散模型的新成员推理攻击
abstract: Tabular data synthesis using diffusion models has gained significant attention for its potential to balance data utility and privacy. However, existing privacy evaluations often rely on heuristic metrics or weak membership inference attacks (MIA), leaving privacy risks inadequately assessed. In this work, we conduct a rigorous MIA study on diffusion-based tabular synthesis, revealing that state-of-the-art attacks designed for image models fail in this setting. We identify noise initialization as a key factor influencing attack efficacy and propose a machine-learning-driven approach that leverages loss features across different noises and time steps. Our method, implemented with a lightweight MLP, effectively learns membership signals, eliminating the need for manual optimization. Experimental results from the MIDST Challenge @ SaTML 2025 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, securing first place across all tracks. Code is available at https://github.com/Nicholas0228/Tartan_Federer_MIDST.
summary: Tabular data synthesis using diffusion models has gained significant attention for its potential to balance data utility and privacy. However, existing privacy evaluations often rely on heuristic metrics or weak membership inference attacks (MIA), leaving privacy risks inadequately assessed. In this work, we conduct a rigorous MIA study on diffusion-based tabular synthesis, revealing that state-of-the-art attacks designed for image models fail in this setting. We identify noise initialization as a key factor influencing attack efficacy and propose a machine-learning-driven approach that leverages loss features across different noises and time steps. Our method, implemented with a lightweight MLP, effectively learns membership signals, eliminating the need for manual optimization. Experimental results from the MIDST Challenge @ SaTML 2025 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, securing first place across all tracks. Code is available at https://github.com/Nicholas0228/Tartan_Federer_MIDST.
abstract_zh: 使用扩散模型的表格数据合成因其平衡数据效用和隐私的潜力而受到广泛关注。然而，现有的隐私评估通常依赖于启发式指标或弱成员推理攻击（MIA），导致隐私风险评估不充分。在这项工作中，我们对基于扩散的表格合成进行了严格的 MIA 研究，揭示了为图像模型设计的最先进的攻击在这种情况下失败了。我们将噪声初始化确定为影响攻击效力的关键因素，并提出了一种机器学习驱动的方法，该方法利用不同噪声和时间步长的损失特征。我们的方法采用轻量级 MLP 实现，可以有效地学习隶属信号，从而无需手动优化。 MIDST Challenge @ SaTML 2025 的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，确保了所有赛道的第一名。代码可在 https://github.com/Nicholas0228/Tartan_Federer_MIDST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对基于扩散模型的表格数据合成的新会员推理攻击方法，并在MIDST挑战赛中取得第一名。
AI.motivation: 现有的隐私评估方法在表格数据合成中效果不佳，而针对图像模型的会员推理攻击方法在该场景下并不适用，因此需要新的攻击方法来更准确地评估隐私风险。
AI.method: 该方法利用损失特征，结合不同噪声和时间步的信息，通过轻量级的MLP模型学习会员信号，无需手动优化。
AI.result: 该方法在MIDST挑战赛中取得所有赛道的第一名，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了噪声初始化对攻击效果的影响，并提出了一种有效的会员推理攻击方法，为表格数据合成的隐私评估提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhe Shan,Yang Liu,Lei Zhou,Cheng Yan,Heng Wang,Xia Xie
title: ROS-SAM: High-Quality Interactive Segmentation for Remote Sensing Moving Object
title_zh: ROS-SAM：遥感运动物体的高质量交互式分割
abstract: The availability of large-scale remote sensing video data underscores the importance of high-quality interactive segmentation. However, challenges such as small object sizes, ambiguous features, and limited generalization make it difficult for current methods to achieve this goal. In this work, we propose ROS-SAM, a method designed to achieve high-quality interactive segmentation while preserving generalization across diverse remote sensing data. The ROS-SAM is built upon three key innovations: 1) LoRA-based fine-tuning, which enables efficient domain adaptation while maintaining SAM's generalization ability, 2) Enhancement of deep network layers to improve the discriminability of extracted features, thereby reducing misclassifications, and 3) Integration of global context with local boundary details in the mask decoder to generate high-quality segmentation masks. Additionally, we design the data pipeline to ensure the model learns to better handle objects at varying scales during training while focusing on high-quality predictions during inference. Experiments on remote sensing video datasets show that the redesigned data pipeline boosts the IoU by 6%, while ROS-SAM increases the IoU by 13%. Finally, when evaluated on existing remote sensing object tracking datasets, ROS-SAM demonstrates impressive zero-shot capabilities, generating masks that closely resemble manual annotations. These results confirm ROS-SAM as a powerful tool for fine-grained segmentation in remote sensing applications. Code is available at https://github.com/ShanZard/ROS-SAM.
summary: The availability of large-scale remote sensing video data underscores the importance of high-quality interactive segmentation. However, challenges such as small object sizes, ambiguous features, and limited generalization make it difficult for current methods to achieve this goal. In this work, we propose ROS-SAM, a method designed to achieve high-quality interactive segmentation while preserving generalization across diverse remote sensing data. The ROS-SAM is built upon three key innovations: 1) LoRA-based fine-tuning, which enables efficient domain adaptation while maintaining SAM's generalization ability, 2) Enhancement of deep network layers to improve the discriminability of extracted features, thereby reducing misclassifications, and 3) Integration of global context with local boundary details in the mask decoder to generate high-quality segmentation masks. Additionally, we design the data pipeline to ensure the model learns to better handle objects at varying scales during training while focusing on high-quality predictions during inference. Experiments on remote sensing video datasets show that the redesigned data pipeline boosts the IoU by 6%, while ROS-SAM increases the IoU by 13%. Finally, when evaluated on existing remote sensing object tracking datasets, ROS-SAM demonstrates impressive zero-shot capabilities, generating masks that closely resemble manual annotations. These results confirm ROS-SAM as a powerful tool for fine-grained segmentation in remote sensing applications. Code is available at https://github.com/ShanZard/ROS-SAM.
abstract_zh: 大规模遥感视频数据的可用性强调了高质量交互式分割的重要性。然而，诸如对象尺寸小、特征模糊和泛化能力有限等挑战使得当前方法难以实现这一目标。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ROS-SAM，一种旨在实现高质量交互式分割的方法，同时保持不同遥感数据的泛化性。 ROS-SAM 基于三项关键创新：1) 基于 LoRA 的微调，可实现高效的域适应，同时保持 SAM 的泛化能力；2) 增强深层网络层以提高提取特征的可辨别性，从而减少错误分类；3) 在掩码解码器中将全局上下文与局部边界细节集成，以生成高质量的分割掩码。此外，我们设计数据管道以确保模型在训练期间学习更好地处理不同规模的对象，同时在推理期间专注于高质量的预测。在遥感视频数据集上的实验表明，重新设计的数据管道将 IoU 提高了 6%，而 ROS-SAM 将 IoU 提高了 13%。最后，当对现有遥感对象跟踪数据集进行评估时，ROS-SAM 展示了令人印象深刻的零样本功能，生成与手动注释非常相似的掩模。这些结果证实 ROS-SAM 是遥感应用中细粒度分割的强大工具。代码可在 https://github.com/ShanZard/ROS-SAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROS-SAM方法，旨在实现高精度的遥感动态目标交互分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理遥感视频中的小目标、模糊特征及跨域泛化能力不足，导致分割质量难以满足需求。
AI.method: 基于LoRA微调提升领域适应性，增强深层网络特征判别力，并融合全局上下文与局部边界细节；设计数据管道优化多尺度目标学习。
AI.result: 数据管道使IoU提升6%，ROS-SAM整体提升13%，并在零样本测试中生成接近人工标注的分割结果。
AI.conclusion: ROS-SAM通过创新设计有效解决了遥感分割的挑战，成为细粒度分割的有力工具。

authors_text: Mark Pustilnik,Antonio Loquercio,Francesco Borrelli
title: Non-Normalized Solutions of Generalized Nash Equilibrium in Autonomous Racing
title_zh: 自动赛车中广义纳什均衡的非标准化解
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2502.19569
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2502.19569
abstract: In dynamic games with shared constraints, Generalized Nash Equilibria (GNE) are often computed using the normalized solution concept, which assumes identical Lagrange multipliers for shared constraints across all players. While widely used, this approach excludes other potentially valuable GNE. This paper addresses the limitations of normalized solutions in racing scenarios through three key contributions. First, we highlight the shortcomings of normalized solutions with a simple racing example. Second, we propose a novel method based on the Mixed Complementarity Problem (MCP) formulation to compute non-normalized Generalized Nash Equilibria (GNE). Third, we demonstrate that our proposed method overcomes the limitations of normalized GNE solutions and enables richer multi-modal interactions in realistic racing scenarios.
summary: In dynamic games with shared constraints, Generalized Nash Equilibria (GNE) are often computed using the normalized solution concept, which assumes identical Lagrange multipliers for shared constraints across all players. While widely used, this approach excludes other potentially valuable GNE. This paper addresses the limitations of normalized solutions in racing scenarios through three key contributions. First, we highlight the shortcomings of normalized solutions with a simple racing example. Second, we propose a novel method based on the Mixed Complementarity Problem (MCP) formulation to compute non-normalized Generalized Nash Equilibria (GNE). Third, we demonstrate that our proposed method overcomes the limitations of normalized GNE solutions and enables richer multi-modal interactions in realistic racing scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在具有共享约束的动态博弈中，广义纳什均衡 (GNE) 通常使用归一化解概念进行计算，该概念假设所有玩家的共享约束具有相同的拉格朗日乘数。虽然这种方法被广泛使用，但排除了其他潜在有价值的 GNE。本文通过三个关键贡献解决了赛车场景中标准化解决方案的局限性。首先，我们通过一个简单的赛车示例来强调标准化解决方案的缺点。其次，我们提出了一种基于混合互补问题（MCP）公式的新方法来计算非归一化广义纳什均衡（GNE）。第三，我们证明了我们提出的方法克服了标准化 GNE 解决方案的局限性，并在现实的赛车场景中实现了更丰富的多模式交互。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决归一化解在自主赛车场景中的局限性，提出计算非归一化广义纳什均衡的新方法。
AI.motivation: 归一化解在赛车场景中可能排除其他有价值的均衡解，需寻找更灵活的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于混合互补问题（MCP）的新型算法，以计算非归一化的广义纳什均衡。
AI.result: 新方法有效克服归一化解限制，支持真实赛车场景中更丰富的多模态交互。
AI.conclusion: 非归一化解方法能更灵活处理赛车中的共享约束，提升多智能体交互的多样性。

search_text: Non-Normalized Solutions of Generalized Nash Equilibrium in Autonomous Racing 自动赛车中广义纳什均衡的非标准化解 In dynamic games with shared constraints, Generalized Nash Equilibria (GNE) are often computed using the normalized solution concept, which assumes identical Lagrange multipliers for shared constraints across all players. While widely used, this approach excludes other potentially valuable GNE. This paper addresses the limitations of normalized solutions in racing scenarios through three key contributions. First, we highlight the shortcomings of normalized solutions with a simple racing example. Second, we propose a novel method based on the Mixed Complementarity Problem (MCP) formulation to compute non-normalized Generalized Nash Equilibria (GNE). Third, we demonstrate that our proposed method overcomes the limitations of normalized GNE solutions and enables richer multi-modal interactions in realistic racing scenarios. 在具有共享约束的动态博弈中，广义纳什均衡 (GNE) 通常使用归一化解概念进行计算，该概念假设所有玩家的共享约束具有相同的拉格朗日乘数。虽然这种方法被广泛使用，但排除了其他潜在有价值的 GNE。本文通过三个关键贡献解决了赛车场景中标准化解决方案的局限性。首先，我们通过一个简单的赛车示例来强调标准化解决方案的缺点。其次，我们提出了一种基于混合互补问题（MCP）公式的新方法来计算非归一化广义纳什均衡（GNE）。第三，我们证明了我们提出的方法克服了标准化 GNE 解决方案的局限性，并在现实的赛车场景中实现了更丰富的多模式交互。 本文旨在解决归一化解在自主赛车场景中的局限性，提出计算非归一化广义纳什均衡的新方法。 Mark Pustilnik,Antonio Loquercio,Francesco Borrelli cs.RO,cs.GT,math.OC

authors_text: Peizhen Zheng,Longfei Wei,Dongjing Jiang,Jianfei Zhang
title: 3D Gaussian Splatting against Moving Objects for High-Fidelity Street Scene Reconstruction
title_zh: 针对移动物体的 3D 高斯泼溅，用于高保真街景重建
abstract: The accurate reconstruction of dynamic street scenes is critical for applications in autonomous driving, augmented reality, and virtual reality. Traditional methods relying on dense point clouds and triangular meshes struggle with moving objects, occlusions, and real-time processing constraints, limiting their effectiveness in complex urban environments. While multi-view stereo and neural radiance fields have advanced 3D reconstruction, they face challenges in computational efficiency and handling scene dynamics. This paper proposes a novel 3D Gaussian point distribution method for dynamic street scene reconstruction. Our approach introduces an adaptive transparency mechanism that eliminates moving objects while preserving high-fidelity static scene details. Additionally, iterative refinement of Gaussian point distribution enhances geometric accuracy and texture representation. We integrate directional encoding with spatial position optimization to optimize storage and rendering efficiency, reducing redundancy while maintaining scene integrity. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves high reconstruction quality, improved rendering performance, and adaptability in large-scale dynamic environments. These contributions establish a robust framework for real-time, high-precision 3D reconstruction, advancing the practicality of dynamic scene modeling across multiple applications.
summary: The accurate reconstruction of dynamic street scenes is critical for applications in autonomous driving, augmented reality, and virtual reality. Traditional methods relying on dense point clouds and triangular meshes struggle with moving objects, occlusions, and real-time processing constraints, limiting their effectiveness in complex urban environments. While multi-view stereo and neural radiance fields have advanced 3D reconstruction, they face challenges in computational efficiency and handling scene dynamics. This paper proposes a novel 3D Gaussian point distribution method for dynamic street scene reconstruction. Our approach introduces an adaptive transparency mechanism that eliminates moving objects while preserving high-fidelity static scene details. Additionally, iterative refinement of Gaussian point distribution enhances geometric accuracy and texture representation. We integrate directional encoding with spatial position optimization to optimize storage and rendering efficiency, reducing redundancy while maintaining scene integrity. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves high reconstruction quality, improved rendering performance, and adaptability in large-scale dynamic environments. These contributions establish a robust framework for real-time, high-precision 3D reconstruction, advancing the practicality of dynamic scene modeling across multiple applications.
abstract_zh: 动态街道场景的准确重建对于自动驾驶、增强现实和虚拟现实的应用至关重要。依赖密集点云和三角网格的传统方法难以应对移动物体、遮挡和实时处理约束，限制了其在复杂城市环境中的有效性。虽然多视图立体和神经辐射场具有先进的 3D 重建能力，但它们在计算效率和处理场景动态方面面临挑战。本文提出了一种用于动态街道场景重建的新型 3D 高斯点分布方法。我们的方法引入了一种自适应透明度机制，可以消除移动物体，同时保留高保真静态场景细节。此外，高斯点分布的迭代细化增强了几何精度和纹理表示。我们将定向编码与空间位置优化相结合，以优化存储和渲染效率，减少冗余，同时保持场景完整性。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了较高的重建质量，提高了渲染性能以及大规模动态环境的适应性。这些贡献为实时、高精度 3D 重建建立了强大的框架，提高了跨多种应用的动态场景建模的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D高斯点分布的方法，用于动态街道场景的高保真重建，通过消除移动物体并优化静态场景细节。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理动态街道场景时存在移动物体、遮挡及实时性限制等问题，难以满足复杂城市环境下的高精度重建需求。
AI.method: 引入自适应透明度机制剔除移动物体，结合高斯点分布迭代优化几何精度与纹理表现，并通过方向编码与空间位置优化提升存储与渲染效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在大规模动态场景中实现高质量重建、改进的渲染性能及良好的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的框架为实时高精度动态场景建模提供了可靠解决方案，推动了自动驾驶、增强现实等领域的应用实践。

authors_text: Tongxuan Tian,Haoyang Li,Bo Ai,Xiaodi Yuan,Zhiao Huang,Hao Su
title: Diffusion Dynamics Models with Generative State Estimation for Cloth Manipulation
title_zh: 用于布料操纵的具有生成状态估计的扩散动力学模型
abstract: Cloth manipulation is challenging due to its highly complex dynamics, near-infinite degrees of freedom, and frequent self-occlusions, which complicate both state estimation and dynamics modeling. Inspired by recent advances in generative models, we hypothesize that these expressive models can effectively capture intricate cloth configurations and deformation patterns from data. Therefore, we propose a diffusion-based generative approach for both perception and dynamics modeling. Specifically, we formulate state estimation as reconstructing full cloth states from partial observations and dynamics modeling as predicting future states given the current state and robot actions. Leveraging a transformer-based diffusion model, our method achieves accurate state reconstruction and reduces long-horizon dynamics prediction errors by an order of magnitude compared to prior approaches. We integrate our dynamics models with model predictive control and show that our framework enables effective cloth folding on real robotic systems, demonstrating the potential of generative models for deformable object manipulation under partial observability and complex dynamics.
summary: Cloth manipulation is challenging due to its highly complex dynamics, near-infinite degrees of freedom, and frequent self-occlusions, which complicate both state estimation and dynamics modeling. Inspired by recent advances in generative models, we hypothesize that these expressive models can effectively capture intricate cloth configurations and deformation patterns from data. Therefore, we propose a diffusion-based generative approach for both perception and dynamics modeling. Specifically, we formulate state estimation as reconstructing full cloth states from partial observations and dynamics modeling as predicting future states given the current state and robot actions. Leveraging a transformer-based diffusion model, our method achieves accurate state reconstruction and reduces long-horizon dynamics prediction errors by an order of magnitude compared to prior approaches. We integrate our dynamics models with model predictive control and show that our framework enables effective cloth folding on real robotic systems, demonstrating the potential of generative models for deformable object manipulation under partial observability and complex dynamics.
abstract_zh: 由于其高度复杂的动力学、接近无限的自由度和频繁的自遮挡，布料操纵具有挑战性，这使得状态估计和动力学建模变得复杂。受生成模型最新进展的启发，我们假设这些表达模型可以有效地从数据中捕获复杂的布料配置和变形模式。因此，我们提出了一种基于扩散的感知和动力学建模生成方法。具体来说，我们将状态估计公式化为根据部分观察重建完整布料状态，并将动态建模公式化为根据当前状态和机器人动作预测未来状态。利用基于变压器的扩散模型，我们的方法实现了准确的状态重建，并将长时域动态预测误差比之前的方法减少了一个数量级。我们将动力学模型与模型预测控制相结合，并表明我们的框架能够在真实的机器人系统上实现有效的布料折叠，展示了生成模型在部分可观测性和复杂动力学下操纵可变形物体的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的生成状态估计方法，用于解决布料操作中的复杂动力学建模和状态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 布料操作因复杂动力学、无限自由度及自遮挡问题，导致状态估计和动力学建模困难，传统方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 采用扩散模型结合Transformer架构，将状态估计重构为从部分观测恢复完整布料状态，动力学建模则预测当前状态与机器人动作下的未来状态，并整合模型预测控制实现实际操作。
AI.result: 方法在状态重建精度和长时域动力学预测误差上较现有方法提升一个数量级，并在真实机器人系统中实现了有效的布料折叠。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型，特别是扩散模型，在部分可观测和复杂动力学场景下的可变形物体操作中展现出显著潜力。

search_text: Diffusion Dynamics Models with Generative State Estimation for Cloth Manipulation 用于布料操纵的具有生成状态估计的扩散动力学模型 Cloth manipulation is challenging due to its highly complex dynamics, near-infinite degrees of freedom, and frequent self-occlusions, which complicate both state estimation and dynamics modeling. Inspired by recent advances in generative models, we hypothesize that these expressive models can effectively capture intricate cloth configurations and deformation patterns from data. Therefore, we propose a diffusion-based generative approach for both perception and dynamics modeling. Specifically, we formulate state estimation as reconstructing full cloth states from partial observations and dynamics modeling as predicting future states given the current state and robot actions. Leveraging a transformer-based diffusion model, our method achieves accurate state reconstruction and reduces long-horizon dynamics prediction errors by an order of magnitude compared to prior approaches. We integrate our dynamics models with model predictive control and show that our framework enables effective cloth folding on real robotic systems, demonstrating the potential of generative models for deformable object manipulation under partial observability and complex dynamics. 由于其高度复杂的动力学、接近无限的自由度和频繁的自遮挡，布料操纵具有挑战性，这使得状态估计和动力学建模变得复杂。受生成模型最新进展的启发，我们假设这些表达模型可以有效地从数据中捕获复杂的布料配置和变形模式。因此，我们提出了一种基于扩散的感知和动力学建模生成方法。具体来说，我们将状态估计公式化为根据部分观察重建完整布料状态，并将动态建模公式化为根据当前状态和机器人动作预测未来状态。利用基于变压器的扩散模型，我们的方法实现了准确的状态重建，并将长时域动态预测误差比之前的方法减少了一个数量级。我们将动力学模型与模型预测控制相结合，并表明我们的框架能够在真实的机器人系统上实现有效的布料折叠，展示了生成模型在部分可观测性和复杂动力学下操纵可变形物体的潜力。 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的生成状态估计方法，用于解决布料操作中的复杂动力学建模和状态估计问题。 Tongxuan Tian,Haoyang Li,Bo Ai,Xiaodi Yuan,Zhiao Huang,Hao Su cs.RO,cs.CV,eess.SY

authors_text: Shun Zou,Yi Zou,Mingya Zhang,Shipeng Luo,Zhihao Chen,Guangwei Gao
title: Fraesormer: Learning Adaptive Sparse Transformer for Efficient Food Recognition
title_zh: Fraesormer：学习自适应稀疏变压器以实现高效食物识别
abstract: In recent years, Transformer has witnessed significant progress in food recognition. However, most existing approaches still face two critical challenges in lightweight food recognition: (1) the quadratic complexity and redundant feature representation from interactions with irrelevant tokens; (2) static feature recognition and single-scale representation, which overlook the unstructured, non-fixed nature of food images and the need for multi-scale features. To address these, we propose an adaptive and efficient sparse Transformer architecture (Fraesormer) with two core designs: Adaptive Top-k Sparse Partial Attention (ATK-SPA) and Hierarchical Scale-Sensitive Feature Gating Network (HSSFGN). ATK-SPA uses a learnable Gated Dynamic Top-K Operator (GDTKO) to retain critical attention scores, filtering low query-key matches that hinder feature aggregation. It also introduces a partial channel mechanism to reduce redundancy and promote expert information flow, enabling local-global collaborative modeling. HSSFGN employs gating mechanism to achieve multi-scale feature representation, enhancing contextual semantic information. Extensive experiments show that Fraesormer outperforms state-of-the-art methods. code is available at https://zs1314.github.io/Fraesormer.
summary: In recent years, Transformer has witnessed significant progress in food recognition. However, most existing approaches still face two critical challenges in lightweight food recognition: (1) the quadratic complexity and redundant feature representation from interactions with irrelevant tokens; (2) static feature recognition and single-scale representation, which overlook the unstructured, non-fixed nature of food images and the need for multi-scale features. To address these, we propose an adaptive and efficient sparse Transformer architecture (Fraesormer) with two core designs: Adaptive Top-k Sparse Partial Attention (ATK-SPA) and Hierarchical Scale-Sensitive Feature Gating Network (HSSFGN). ATK-SPA uses a learnable Gated Dynamic Top-K Operator (GDTKO) to retain critical attention scores, filtering low query-key matches that hinder feature aggregation. It also introduces a partial channel mechanism to reduce redundancy and promote expert information flow, enabling local-global collaborative modeling. HSSFGN employs gating mechanism to achieve multi-scale feature representation, enhancing contextual semantic information. Extensive experiments show that Fraesormer outperforms state-of-the-art methods. code is available at https://zs1314.github.io/Fraesormer.
abstract_zh: 近年来，Transformer 在食品识别方面取得了重大进展。然而，大多数现有方法在轻量级食品识别中仍然面临两个关键挑战：（1）与不相关标记交互的二次复杂性和冗余特征表示； （2）静态特征识别和单尺度表示，忽视了食物图像的非结构化、非固定性以及对多尺度特征的需求。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种自适应且高效的稀疏 Transformer 架构（Fraesormer），其具有两个核心设计：自适应 Top-k 稀疏部分注意力（ATK-SPA）和分层尺度敏感特征门控网络（HSSFGN）。 ATK-SPA 使用可学习的门控动态 Top-K 运算符 (GDTKO) 来保留关键注意力分数，过滤阻碍特征聚合的低查询键匹配。它还引入了部分通道机制，以减少冗余并促进专家信息流动，从而实现本地-全球协作建模。 HSSFGN采用门控机制来实现多尺度特征表示，增强上下文语义信息。大量实验表明 Fraesormer 的性能优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://zs1314.github.io/Fraesormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的自适应稀疏Transformer架构Fraesormer，用于解决食物识别中的计算复杂度高和多尺度特征提取不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer在食物识别中存在二次复杂度导致的冗余计算，以及静态特征提取无法适应食物图像非固定结构和多尺度特征需求的缺陷。
AI.method: 设计了自适应Top-k稀疏注意力机制（ATK-SPA）和分层尺度敏感特征门控网络（HSSFGN），通过动态过滤低相关性特征和多尺度特征融合实现高效建模。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Fraesormer通过自适应稀疏注意力和多尺度特征融合有效解决了食物识别中的效率与表征能力矛盾。

authors_text: Dharani Chandra
title: Applications of Large Language Model Reasoning in Feature Generation
title_zh: 大语言模型推理在特征生成中的应用
comment: I just updated the format of the references in the paper
comments: I just updated the format of the references in the paper
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized natural language processing through their state of art reasoning capabilities. This paper explores the convergence of LLM reasoning techniques and feature generation for machine learning tasks. We examine four key reasoning approaches: Chain of Thought, Tree of Thoughts, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Thought Space Exploration. Our analysis reveals how these approaches can be used to identify effective feature generation rules without having to manually specify search spaces. The paper categorizes LLM-based feature generation methods across various domains including finance, healthcare, and text analytics. LLMs can extract key information from clinical notes and radiology reports in healthcare, by enabling more efficient data utilization. In finance, LLMs facilitate text generation, summarization, and entity extraction from complex documents. We analyze evaluation methodologies for assessing feature quality and downstream performance, with particular attention to OCTree's decision tree reasoning approach that provides language-based feedback for iterative improvements. Current challenges include hallucination, computational efficiency, and domain adaptation. As of March 2025, emerging approaches include inference-time compute scaling, reinforcement learning, and supervised fine-tuning with model distillation. Future directions point toward multimodal feature generation, self-improving systems, and neuro-symbolic approaches. This paper provides a detailed overview of an emerging field that promises to automate and enhance feature engineering through language model reasoning.

abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过其最先进的推理能力彻底改变了自然语言处理。本文探讨了 LLM 推理技术和机器学习任务特征生成的融合。我们研究了四种关键的推理方法：思想链、思想树、检索增强生成和思想空间探索。我们的分析揭示了如何使用这些方法来识别有效的特征生成规则，而无需手动指定搜索空间。该论文对金融、医疗保健和文本分析等各个领域的基于 LLM 的特征生成方法进行了分类。法学硕士可以通过更有效地利用数据，从医疗保健领域的临床记录和放射学报告中提取关键信息。在金融领域，法学硕士有助于从复杂文档中生成文本、摘要和实体提取。我们分析了用于评估特征质量和下游性能的评估方法，特别关注 OCTree 的决策树推理方法，该方法为迭代改进提供基于语言的反馈。当前的挑战包括幻觉、计算效率和领域适应。截至 2025 年 3 月，新兴方法包括推理时间计算扩展、强化学习和通过模型蒸馏进行监督微调。未来的方向指向多模态特征生成、自我改进系统和神经符号方法。本文详细概述了一个新兴领域，该领域有望通过语言模型推理来自动化和增强特征工程。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）推理技术在机器学习特征生成中的应用，分析了多种推理方法并评估其在不同领域的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统特征工程依赖人工设计，效率低且复杂。LLM的推理能力可自动化生成特征，提升数据利用效率并适应多领域需求。
AI.method: 研究了四种LLM推理方法（Chain of Thought、Tree of Thoughts、Retrieval-Augmented Generation、Thought Space Exploration），并分类讨论其在金融、医疗等领域的应用，结合OCTree决策树评估方法。
AI.result: LLM能有效提取医疗文本关键信息，生成金融文档摘要与实体，并通过语言反馈优化特征质量，但存在幻觉、计算效率及领域适配等挑战。
AI.conclusion: LLM推理为特征工程自动化提供新方向，未来需结合多模态数据、自我优化系统及神经符号方法以克服当前局限。
