This paper provides a detailed overview of an emerging field that promises to automate and enhance feature engineering through language model reasoning. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过其最先进的推理能力彻底改变了自然语言处理。本文探讨了 LLM 推理技术和机器学习任务特征生成的融合。我们研究了四种关键的推理方法：思想链、思想树、检索增强生成和思想空间探索。我们的分析揭示了如何使用这些方法来识别有效的特征生成规则，而无需手动指定搜索空间。该论文对金融、医疗保健和文本分析等各个领域的基于 LLM 的特征生成方法进行了分类。法学硕士可以通过更有效地利用数据，从医疗保健领域的临床记录和放射学报告中提取关键信息。在金融领域，法学硕士有助于从复杂文档中生成文本、摘要和实体提取。我们分析了用于评估特征质量和下游性能的评估方法，特别关注 OCTree 的决策树推理方法，该方法为迭代改进提供基于语言的反馈。当前的挑战包括幻觉、计算效率和领域适应。截至 2025 年 3 月，新兴方法包括推理时间计算扩展、强化学习和通过模型蒸馏进行监督微调。未来的方向指向多模态特征生成、自我改进系统和神经符号方法。本文详细概述了一个新兴领域，该领域有望通过语言模型推理来自动化和增强特征工程。 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）推理技术在机器学习特征生成中的应用，分析了多种推理方法并评估其在不同领域的有效性。 Dharani Chandra cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Charaka Vinayak Kumar,Ashok Urlana,Gopichand Kanumolu,Bala Mallikarjunarao Garlapati,Pruthwik Mishra
title: No LLM is Free From Bias: A Comprehensive Study of Bias Evaluation in Large Language Models
title_zh: 法学硕士不存在偏见：大型语言模型中偏见评估的综合研究
abstract: Advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have increased the performance of different natural language understanding as well as generation tasks. Although LLMs have breached the state-of-the-art performance in various tasks, they often reflect different forms of bias present in the training data. In the light of this perceived limitation, we provide a unified evaluation of benchmarks using a set of representative small and medium-sized LLMs that cover different forms of biases starting from physical characteristics to socio-economic categories. Moreover, we propose five prompting approaches to carry out the bias detection task across different aspects of bias. Further, we formulate three research questions to gain valuable insight in detecting biases in LLMs using different approaches and evaluation metrics across benchmarks. The results indicate that each of the selected LLMs suffer from one or the other form of bias with the Phi-3.5B model being the least biased. Finally, we conclude the paper with the identification of key challenges and possible future directions.
summary: Advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have increased the performance of different natural language understanding as well as generation tasks. Although LLMs have breached the state-of-the-art performance in various tasks, they often reflect different forms of bias present in the training data. In the light of this perceived limitation, we provide a unified evaluation of benchmarks using a set of representative small and medium-sized LLMs that cover different forms of biases starting from physical characteristics to socio-economic categories. Moreover, we propose five prompting approaches to carry out the bias detection task across different aspects of bias. Further, we formulate three research questions to gain valuable insight in detecting biases in LLMs using different approaches and evaluation metrics across benchmarks. The results indicate that each of the selected LLMs suffer from one or the other form of bias with the Phi-3.5B model being the least biased. Finally, we conclude the paper with the identification of key challenges and possible future directions.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的进步提高了不同自然语言理解和生成任务的性能。尽管法学硕士在各种任务中都突破了最先进的表现，但它们通常反映了训练数据中存在的不同形式的偏差。鉴于这种明显的局限性，我们使用一组具有代表性的中小型法学硕士提供了统一的基准评估，涵盖了从身体特征到社会经济类别的不同形式的偏见。此外，我们提出了五种提示方法来执行跨偏见不同方面的偏见检测任务。此外，我们提出了三个研究问题，以便在使用不同的方法和跨基准评估指标来检测法学硕士的偏差方面获得宝贵的见解。结果表明，每个选定的法学硕士都遭受一种或另一种形式的偏差，其中 Phi-3.5B 模型偏差最小。最后，我们通过确定关键挑战和未来可能的方向来总结本文。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过多种方法和基准全面评估大型语言模型（LLMs）中的偏见问题，分析不同模型在不同偏见方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在自然语言处理任务中表现出色，但其训练数据中的偏见可能导致模型输出存在偏见，需系统性研究以揭示问题并指导改进。
AI.method: 采用代表性的小型和中型LLMs作为基准，提出五种提示方法检测不同维度的偏见，并通过三个研究问题结合多指标评估模型表现。
AI.result: 所有测试模型均存在不同程度的偏见，其中Phi-3.5B模型偏见程度最低。
AI.conclusion: 当前偏见检测面临数据多样性、评估标准统一性等挑战，未来需探索更鲁棒的检测方法和去偏技术。

authors_text: Utkarsh Nath,Rajeev Goel,Rahul Khurana,Kyle Min,Mark Ollila,Pavan Turaga,Varun Jampani,Tejaswi Gowda
title: DecompDreamer: A Composition-Aware Curriculum for Structured 3D Asset Generation
title_zh: DecompDreamer：用于结构化 3D 资产生成的组合感知课程
abstract: Current text-to-3D methods excel at generating single objects but falter on compositional prompts. We argue this failure is fundamental to their optimization schedules, as simultaneous or iterative heuristics predictably collapse under a combinatorial explosion of conflicting gradients, leading to entangled geometry or catastrophic divergence. In this paper, we reframe the core challenge of compositional generation as one of optimization scheduling. We introduce DecompDreamer, a framework built on a novel staged optimization strategy that functions as an implicit curriculum. Our method first establishes a coherent structural scaffold by prioritizing inter-object relationships before shifting to the high-fidelity refinement of individual components. This temporal decoupling of competing objectives provides a robust solution to gradient conflict. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations on diverse compositional prompts demonstrate that DecompDreamer outperforms state-of-the-art methods in fidelity, disentanglement, and spatial coherence.
summary: Current text-to-3D methods excel at generating single objects but falter on compositional prompts. We argue this failure is fundamental to their optimization schedules, as simultaneous or iterative heuristics predictably collapse under a combinatorial explosion of conflicting gradients, leading to entangled geometry or catastrophic divergence. In this paper, we reframe the core challenge of compositional generation as one of optimization scheduling. We introduce DecompDreamer, a framework built on a novel staged optimization strategy that functions as an implicit curriculum. Our method first establishes a coherent structural scaffold by prioritizing inter-object relationships before shifting to the high-fidelity refinement of individual components. This temporal decoupling of competing objectives provides a robust solution to gradient conflict. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations on diverse compositional prompts demonstrate that DecompDreamer outperforms state-of-the-art methods in fidelity, disentanglement, and spatial coherence.
abstract_zh: 当前的文本转 3D 方法擅长生成单个对象，但在组合提示方面却表现不佳。我们认为这种失败对于他们的优化计划至关重要，因为同时或迭代启发式在冲突梯度的组合爆炸下可预见地崩溃，导致几何纠缠或灾难性发散。在本文中，我们将组合生成的核心挑战重新定义为优化调度之一。我们引入了 DecompDreamer，这是一个基于新颖的分阶段优化策略构建的框架，其功能相当于隐式课程。我们的方法首先通过优先考虑对象间关系来建立连贯的结构支架，然后再转向各个组件的高保真细化。这种竞争目标的时间解耦为梯度冲突提供了稳健的解决方案。对不同构图提示的定性和定量评估表明，DecompDreamer 在保真度、解缠结和空间连贯性方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DecompDreamer框架，通过优化调度策略解决文本到3D资产生成中组合性提示的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法在处理组合性提示时因梯度冲突导致几何纠缠或发散，核心问题在于优化时间表的设计缺陷。
AI.method: 设计分阶段优化策略作为隐式课程，先构建物体间关系框架再细化单个组件，实现目标解耦以缓解梯度冲突。
AI.result: 在多样化组合提示测试中，DecompDreamer在保真度、解耦性和空间一致性上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段优化课程有效解决了组合生成中的根本性挑战，为结构化3D资产生成提供稳健方案。

authors_text: Runfa Blark Li,Mahdi Shaghaghi,Keito Suzuki,Xinshuang Liu,Varun Moparthi,Bang Du,Walker Curtis,Martin Renschler,Ki Myung Brian Lee,Nikolay Atanasov,Truong Nguyen
title: DynaGSLAM: Real-Time Gaussian-Splatting SLAM for Online Rendering, Tracking, Motion Predictions of Moving Objects in Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: DynaGSLAM：实时高斯溅射 SLAM，用于动态场景中移动物体的在线渲染、跟踪和运动预测
abstract: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is one of the most important environment-perception and navigation algorithms for computer vision, robotics, and autonomous cars/drones. Hence, high quality and fast mapping becomes a fundamental problem. With the advent of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) as an explicit representation with excellent rendering quality and speed, state-of-the-art (SOTA) works introduce GS to SLAM. Compared to classical pointcloud-SLAM, GS-SLAM generates photometric information by learning from input camera views and synthesize unseen views with high-quality textures. However, these GS-SLAM fail when moving objects occupy the scene that violate the static assumption of bundle adjustment. The failed updates of moving GS affects the static GS and contaminates the full map over long frames. Although some efforts have been made by concurrent works to consider moving objects for GS-SLAM, they simply detect and remove the moving regions from GS rendering ("anti'' dynamic GS-SLAM), where only the static background could benefit from GS. To this end, we propose the first real-time GS-SLAM, "DynaGSLAM'', that achieves high-quality online GS rendering, tracking, motion predictions of moving objects in dynamic scenes while jointly estimating accurate ego motion. Our DynaGSLAM outperforms SOTA static & "Anti'' dynamic GS-SLAM on three dynamic real datasets, while keeping speed and memory efficiency in practice.
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is one of the most important environment-perception and navigation algorithms for computer vision, robotics, and autonomous cars/drones. Hence, high quality and fast mapping becomes a fundamental problem. With the advent of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) as an explicit representation with excellent rendering quality and speed, state-of-the-art (SOTA) works introduce GS to SLAM. Compared to classical pointcloud-SLAM, GS-SLAM generates photometric information by learning from input camera views and synthesize unseen views with high-quality textures. However, these GS-SLAM fail when moving objects occupy the scene that violate the static assumption of bundle adjustment. The failed updates of moving GS affects the static GS and contaminates the full map over long frames. Although some efforts have been made by concurrent works to consider moving objects for GS-SLAM, they simply detect and remove the moving regions from GS rendering ("anti'' dynamic GS-SLAM), where only the static background could benefit from GS. To this end, we propose the first real-time GS-SLAM, "DynaGSLAM'', that achieves high-quality online GS rendering, tracking, motion predictions of moving objects in dynamic scenes while jointly estimating accurate ego motion. Our DynaGSLAM outperforms SOTA static & "Anti'' dynamic GS-SLAM on three dynamic real datasets, while keeping speed and memory efficiency in practice.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 是计算机视觉、机器人和自动驾驶汽车/无人机最重要的环境感知和导航算法之一。因此，高质量和快速的映射成为一个基本问题。随着 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 作为具有出色渲染质量和速度的显式表示的出现，最先进的 (SOTA) 作品将 GS 引入 SLAM。与经典的点云 SLAM 相比，GS-SLAM 通过学习输入摄像机视图来生成光度信息，并用高质量纹理合成看不见的视图。然而，当移动物体占据场景而违反捆绑调整的静态假设时，这些 GS-SLAM 就会失败。移动 GS 的失败更新会影响静态 GS 并污染长帧上的完整地图。尽管并行工作已经做出了一些努力来考虑 GS-SLAM 的运动物体，但它们只是从 GS 渲染中检测并删除运动区域（“反”动态 GS-SLAM），只有静态背景才能从 GS 中受益。为此，我们提出了第一个实时 GS-SLAM“DynaGSLAM”，它实现了动态场景中运动物体的高质量在线 GS 渲染、跟踪和运动预测，同时联合估计准确的自我运动。我们的 DynaGSLAM 在三个动态真实数据集上优于 SOTA 静态和“反”动态 GS-SLAM，同时在实践中保持速度和内存效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynaGSLAM，一种实时高斯泼溅SLAM方法，用于动态场景中移动物体的在线渲染、跟踪和运动预测。
AI.motivation: 传统GS-SLAM在动态场景中因移动物体违反静态假设而失效，现有方法仅通过移除动态区域无法充分利用GS优势。
AI.method: 设计DynaGSLAM框架，联合估计自运动并跟踪移动物体，实现动态场景下高质量在线渲染与运动预测。
AI.result: 在三个动态数据集上优于现有静态及反动态GS-SLAM方法，同时保持速度与内存效率。
AI.conclusion: DynaGSLAM首次实现动态场景中移动物体与静态背景的联合优化，提升SLAM在复杂环境中的鲁棒性。

search_text: DynaGSLAM: Real-Time Gaussian-Splatting SLAM for Online Rendering, Tracking, Motion Predictions of Moving Objects in Dynamic Scenes DynaGSLAM：实时高斯溅射 SLAM，用于动态场景中移动物体的在线渲染、跟踪和运动预测 Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is one of the most important environment-perception and navigation algorithms for computer vision, robotics, and autonomous cars/drones. Hence, high quality and fast mapping becomes a fundamental problem. With the advent of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) as an explicit representation with excellent rendering quality and speed, state-of-the-art (SOTA) works introduce GS to SLAM. Compared to classical pointcloud-SLAM, GS-SLAM generates photometric information by learning from input camera views and synthesize unseen views with high-quality textures. However, these GS-SLAM fail when moving objects occupy the scene that violate the static assumption of bundle adjustment. The failed updates of moving GS affects the static GS and contaminates the full map over long frames. Although some efforts have been made by concurrent works to consider moving objects for GS-SLAM, they simply detect and remove the moving regions from GS rendering ("anti'' dynamic GS-SLAM), where only the static background could benefit from GS. To this end, we propose the first real-time GS-SLAM, "DynaGSLAM'', that achieves high-quality online GS rendering, tracking, motion predictions of moving objects in dynamic scenes while jointly estimating accurate ego motion. Our DynaGSLAM outperforms SOTA static & "Anti'' dynamic GS-SLAM on three dynamic real datasets, while keeping speed and memory efficiency in practice. 同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 是计算机视觉、机器人和自动驾驶汽车/无人机最重要的环境感知和导航算法之一。因此，高质量和快速的映射成为一个基本问题。随着 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 作为具有出色渲染质量和速度的显式表示的出现，最先进的 (SOTA) 作品将 GS 引入 SLAM。与经典的点云 SLAM 相比，GS-SLAM 通过学习输入摄像机视图来生成光度信息，并用高质量纹理合成看不见的视图。然而，当移动物体占据场景而违反捆绑调整的静态假设时，这些 GS-SLAM 就会失败。移动 GS 的失败更新会影响静态 GS 并污染长帧上的完整地图。尽管并行工作已经做出了一些努力来考虑 GS-SLAM 的运动物体，但它们只是从 GS 渲染中检测并删除运动区域（“反”动态 GS-SLAM），只有静态背景才能从 GS 中受益。为此，我们提出了第一个实时 GS-SLAM“DynaGSLAM”，它实现了动态场景中运动物体的高质量在线 GS 渲染、跟踪和运动预测，同时联合估计准确的自我运动。我们的 DynaGSLAM 在三个动态真实数据集上优于 SOTA 静态和“反”动态 GS-SLAM，同时在实践中保持速度和内存效率。 本文提出DynaGSLAM，一种实时高斯泼溅SLAM方法，用于动态场景中移动物体的在线渲染、跟踪和运动预测。 Runfa Blark Li,Mahdi Shaghaghi,Keito Suzuki,Xinshuang Liu,Varun Moparthi,Bang Du,Walker Curtis,Martin Renschler,Ki Myung Brian Lee,Nikolay Atanasov,Truong Nguyen cs.CV

authors_text: Eric M. Chen,Di Liu,Sizhuo Ma,Michael Vasilkovsky,Bing Zhou,Qiang Gao,Wenzhou Wang,Jiahao Luo,Dimitris N. Metaxas,Vincent Sitzmann,Jian Wang
title: Snapmoji: Instant Generation of Animatable Dual-Stylized Avatars
title_zh: Snapmoji：即时生成可动画的双风格头像
abstract: Despite the increasing popularity of avatar systems such as Snapchat Bitmojis, existing production avatar platforms face several limitations, such as a limited number of predefined assets, tedious customization processes, and inefficient rendering requirements. Addressing these shortcomings, we introduce Snapmoji, an avatar generation system that instantly creates 3D avatars, and enables customization in a process we call dual-stylization. Snapmoji first maps a selfie of a user to a primary avatar (e.g., Bitmoji style) using a new technique we name Gaussian Domain Adaptation (GDA), then applies a secondary style (e.g., skeleton, yarn, toy) to the primary avatar, all while preserving the user's identity. The generated 3D avatars can then be rendered an animated on mobile devices at 30-40 FPS.
summary: Despite the increasing popularity of avatar systems such as Snapchat Bitmojis, existing production avatar platforms face several limitations, such as a limited number of predefined assets, tedious customization processes, and inefficient rendering requirements. Addressing these shortcomings, we introduce Snapmoji, an avatar generation system that instantly creates 3D avatars, and enables customization in a process we call dual-stylization. Snapmoji first maps a selfie of a user to a primary avatar (e.g., Bitmoji style) using a new technique we name Gaussian Domain Adaptation (GDA), then applies a secondary style (e.g., skeleton, yarn, toy) to the primary avatar, all while preserving the user's identity. The generated 3D avatars can then be rendered an animated on mobile devices at 30-40 FPS.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Snapchat Bitmojis 等头像系统越来越受欢迎，但现有的头像制作平台仍面临着一些限制，例如预定义资产数量有限、定制流程繁琐以及渲染要求低效。为了解决这些缺点，我们引入了 Snapmoji，这是一种头像生成系统，可以立即创建 3D 头像，并可以在我们称为双风格化的过程中进行自定义。 Snapmoji 首先使用我们称为高斯域适应 (GDA) 的新技术将用户的自拍照映射到主要头像（例如 Bitmoji 风格），然后将辅助风格（例如骨架、纱线、玩具）应用于主要头像，同时保留用户的身份。然后，生成的 3D 头像可以在移动设备上以 30-40 FPS 的速度呈现动画。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Snapmoji系统，通过双风格化技术快速生成可动画的3D虚拟形象，解决现有平台资源有限、定制繁琐和渲染效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟形象平台存在预设资源不足、定制流程复杂及渲染效率低下等缺陷，需开发更高效灵活的生成方案。
AI.method: 采用高斯域适应（GDA）技术将用户自拍映射至基础风格（如Bitmoji），再叠加二次风格（如骨架、毛线），同时保留身份特征。
AI.result: 生成的3D虚拟形象可在移动设备以30-40 FPS流畅动画渲染，实现快速定制与高效实时表现。
AI.conclusion: Snapmoji通过双风格化技术有效平衡了个性化与性能需求，为虚拟形象生成提供了一种高效可行的新范式。

authors_text: Zhang di
title: Effect factors of motion aftereffect in depth: Adaptation direction and induced eyes vergence
title_zh: 深度运动后效应的影响因素：适应方向和诱导眼辐散度
abstract: Motion aftereffect (MAE) offers valuable insights into the mechanisms underlying motion-in-depth (MID) perception. This study investigates two critical aspects of MAE in depth: (1) the potential directional asymmetry between motion toward versus away from the observer, and (2) the effect of induced eye vergence on MAE magnitude. We conducted two experiments using random dot stereograms (RDS) to isolate the interocular velocity difference (IOVD) mechanism. In Experiment 1, we compared MAE magnitude following adaptation to motion-toward versus motion-away stimuli with a static fixation point. In Experiment 2, we introduced a fixation point oscillating in depth to induce vergence eye movements during adaptation and testing. Our results revealed a directional asymmetry in MAE strength, with motion-toward adaptation producing stronger aftereffects than motion-away adaptation in Experiment 1. When eye vergence was induced in Experiment 2, this pattern was reversed, with motion-away adaptation yielding stronger MAEs. These findings suggest an important interaction between adaptation direction and eye vergence state in MID perception, highlighting the complex integration of retinal and extra-retinal signals in the visual system's processing of motion through depth.
summary: Motion aftereffect (MAE) offers valuable insights into the mechanisms underlying motion-in-depth (MID) perception. This study investigates two critical aspects of MAE in depth: (1) the potential directional asymmetry between motion toward versus away from the observer, and (2) the effect of induced eye vergence on MAE magnitude. We conducted two experiments using random dot stereograms (RDS) to isolate the interocular velocity difference (IOVD) mechanism. In Experiment 1, we compared MAE magnitude following adaptation to motion-toward versus motion-away stimuli with a static fixation point. In Experiment 2, we introduced a fixation point oscillating in depth to induce vergence eye movements during adaptation and testing. Our results revealed a directional asymmetry in MAE strength, with motion-toward adaptation producing stronger aftereffects than motion-away adaptation in Experiment 1. When eye vergence was induced in Experiment 2, this pattern was reversed, with motion-away adaptation yielding stronger MAEs. These findings suggest an important interaction between adaptation direction and eye vergence state in MID perception, highlighting the complex integration of retinal and extra-retinal signals in the visual system's processing of motion through depth.
abstract_zh: 运动后效应 (MAE) 为深度运动 (MID) 感知的机制提供了宝贵的见解。这项研究深入研究了 MAE 的两个关键方面：(1) 朝向观察者和远离观察者的运动之间潜在的方向不对称性，以及 (2) 诱发的眼睛辐辏对 MAE 幅度的影响。我们使用随机点立体图（RDS）进行了两项实验来分离眼间速度差（IOVD）机制。在实验 1 中，我们比较了使用静态注视点适应朝向运动刺激和远离运动刺激后的 MAE 幅度。在实验 2 中，我们引入了一个深度振荡的注视点，以在适应和测试过程中诱导眼球的聚散运动。我们的结果揭示了 MAE 强度的方向不对称性，在实验 1 中，朝运动适应产生的后效应比远离运动适应更强。当实验 2 中诱发眼睛辐辏时，这种模式发生逆转，远离运动适应产生更强的 MAE。这些发现表明，在 MID 感知中，适应方向和眼睛聚散状态之间存在重要的相互作用，强调了视觉系统处理深度运动时视网膜和视网膜外信号的复杂整合。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了深度运动后效（MAE）的影响因素，重点分析运动方向（朝向或远离观察者）与诱导眼汇聚状态对MAE强度的作用。
AI.motivation: 运动后效（MAE）为理解深度运动（MID）感知机制提供重要线索，但现有研究对方向不对称性及眼汇聚影响的机制尚不明确，需进一步探究其交互作用。
AI.method: 通过两组随机点立体图（RDS）实验：实验1比较朝向/远离运动适应后MAE强度；实验2在适应与测试阶段引入深度振荡注视点以诱导眼汇聚运动，分离视网膜与非视网膜信号的影响。
AI.result: 实验1显示朝向运动适应产生更强MAE，而实验2中诱导汇聚后，远离运动适应的MAE强度反转增强，揭示了适应方向与眼汇聚状态的交互作用。
AI.conclusion: 深度运动感知中，MAE强度受适应方向与眼汇聚状态的共同调控，表明视网膜信号与非视网膜信号在视觉系统中存在复杂整合机制。

search_text: Effect factors of motion aftereffect in depth: Adaptation direction and induced eyes vergence 深度运动后效应的影响因素：适应方向和诱导眼辐散度 Motion aftereffect (MAE) offers valuable insights into the mechanisms underlying motion-in-depth (MID) perception. This study investigates two critical aspects of MAE in depth: (1) the potential directional asymmetry between motion toward versus away from the observer, and (2) the effect of induced eye vergence on MAE magnitude. We conducted two experiments using random dot stereograms (RDS) to isolate the interocular velocity difference (IOVD) mechanism. In Experiment 1, we compared MAE magnitude following adaptation to motion-toward versus motion-away stimuli with a static fixation point. In Experiment 2, we introduced a fixation point oscillating in depth to induce vergence eye movements during adaptation and testing. Our results revealed a directional asymmetry in MAE strength, with motion-toward adaptation producing stronger aftereffects than motion-away adaptation in Experiment 1. When eye vergence was induced in Experiment 2, this pattern was reversed, with motion-away adaptation yielding stronger MAEs. These findings suggest an important interaction between adaptation direction and eye vergence state in MID perception, highlighting the complex integration of retinal and extra-retinal signals in the visual system's processing of motion through depth. 运动后效应 (MAE) 为深度运动 (MID) 感知的机制提供了宝贵的见解。这项研究深入研究了 MAE 的两个关键方面：(1) 朝向观察者和远离观察者的运动之间潜在的方向不对称性，以及 (2) 诱发的眼睛辐辏对 MAE 幅度的影响。我们使用随机点立体图（RDS）进行了两项实验来分离眼间速度差（IOVD）机制。在实验 1 中，我们比较了使用静态注视点适应朝向运动刺激和远离运动刺激后的 MAE 幅度。在实验 2 中，我们引入了一个深度振荡的注视点，以在适应和测试过程中诱导眼球的聚散运动。我们的结果揭示了 MAE 强度的方向不对称性，在实验 1 中，朝运动适应产生的后效应比远离运动适应更强。当实验 2 中诱发眼睛辐辏时，这种模式发生逆转，远离运动适应产生更强的 MAE。这些发现表明，在 MID 感知中，适应方向和眼睛聚散状态之间存在重要的相互作用，强调了视觉系统处理深度运动时视网膜和视网膜外信号的复杂整合。 该论文研究了深度运动后效（MAE）的影响因素，重点分析运动方向（朝向或远离观察者）与诱导眼汇聚状态对MAE强度的作用。 Zhang di cs.HC

authors_text: Nakul Poudel,Zixin Yang,Kelly Merrell,Richard Simon,Cristian A. Linte
title: Evaluation of Intra-operative Patient-specific Methods for Point Cloud Completion for Minimally Invasive Liver Interventions
title_zh: 微创肝脏干预的术中患者特定点云完成方法的评估
abstract: The registration between the pre-operative model and the intra-operative surface is crucial in image-guided liver surgery, as it facilitates the effective use of pre-operative information during the procedure. However, the intra-operative surface, usually represented as a point cloud, often has limited coverage, especially in laparoscopic surgery, and is prone to holes and noise, posing significant challenges for registration methods. Point cloud completion methods have the potential to alleviate these issues. Thus, we explore six state-of-the-art point cloud completion methods to identify the optimal completion method for liver surgery applications. We focus on a patient-specific approach for liver point cloud completion from a partial liver surface under three cases: canonical pose, non-canonical pose, and canonical pose with noise. The transformer-based method, AdaPoinTr, outperforms all other methods to generate a complete point cloud from the given partial liver point cloud under the canonical pose. On the other hand, our findings reveal substantial performance degradation of these methods under non-canonical poses and noisy settings, highlighting the limitations of these methods, which suggests the need for a robust point completion method for its application in image-guided liver surgery.
summary: The registration between the pre-operative model and the intra-operative surface is crucial in image-guided liver surgery, as it facilitates the effective use of pre-operative information during the procedure. However, the intra-operative surface, usually represented as a point cloud, often has limited coverage, especially in laparoscopic surgery, and is prone to holes and noise, posing significant challenges for registration methods. Point cloud completion methods have the potential to alleviate these issues. Thus, we explore six state-of-the-art point cloud completion methods to identify the optimal completion method for liver surgery applications. We focus on a patient-specific approach for liver point cloud completion from a partial liver surface under three cases: canonical pose, non-canonical pose, and canonical pose with noise. The transformer-based method, AdaPoinTr, outperforms all other methods to generate a complete point cloud from the given partial liver point cloud under the canonical pose. On the other hand, our findings reveal substantial performance degradation of these methods under non-canonical poses and noisy settings, highlighting the limitations of these methods, which suggests the need for a robust point completion method for its application in image-guided liver surgery.
abstract_zh: 术前模型和术中表面之间的配准在图像引导肝脏手术中至关重要，因为它有助于在手术过程中有效利用术前信息。然而，术中表面通常表示为点云，通常覆盖范围有限，尤其是在腹腔镜手术中，并且容易出现孔洞和噪声，这对配准方法提出了重大挑战。点云补全方法有可能缓解这些问题。因此，我们探索了六种最先进的点云完成方法，以确定肝脏手术应用的最佳完成方法。我们专注于在三种情况下从部分肝脏表面完成肝脏点云的患者特定方法：规范姿势、非规范姿势和带噪声的规范姿势。基于变压器的方法 AdaPoinTr 优于所有其他方法，可以根据规范姿势下给定的部分肝脏点云生成完整的点云。另一方面，我们的研究结果揭示了这些方法在非规范姿势和噪声环境下的性能大幅下降，突出了这些方法的局限性，这表明需要一种稳健的点完成方法来应用于图像引导肝脏手术。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了六种点云补全方法在微创肝脏手术中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 术中点云数据通常存在覆盖不足、孔洞和噪声，这对术中注册方法提出了挑战，因此需要有效的点云补全方法。
AI.method: 研究者评估了六种最先进的点云补全方法，并在三种情况下进行测试：标准姿态、非标准姿态和带噪声的标准姿态。
AI.result: 基于Transformer的方法AdaPoinTr在标准姿态下表现最佳，但在非标准姿态和噪声环境下性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 当前点云补全方法在非标准姿态和噪声环境下存在局限性，需要开发更鲁棒的补全方法以适用于图像引导的肝脏手术。

authors_text: Badr Souani,Ezekiel Soremekun,Mike Papadakis,Setsuko Yokoyama,Sudipta Chattopadhyay,Yves Le Traon
title: HInter: Exposing Hidden Intersectional Bias in Large Language Models
title_zh: HInter：揭示大型语言模型中隐藏的交叉偏差
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) may portray discrimination towards certain individuals, especially those characterized by multiple attributes (aka intersectional bias). Discovering intersectional bias in LLMs is challenging, as it involves complex inputs on multiple attributes (e.g. race and gender). To address this challenge, we propose HInter, a test technique that synergistically combines mutation analysis, dependency parsing and metamorphic oracles to automatically detect intersectional bias in LLMs. HInter generates test inputs by systematically mutating sentences using multiple mutations, validates inputs via a dependency invariant and detects biases by checking the LLM response on the original and mutated sentences. We evaluate HInter using six LLM architectures and 18 LLM models (GPT3.5, Llama2, BERT, etc) and find that 14.61% of the inputs generated by HInter expose intersectional bias. Results also show that our dependency invariant reduces false positives (incorrect test inputs) by an order of magnitude. Finally, we observed that 16.62% of intersectional bias errors are hidden, meaning that their corresponding atomic cases do not trigger biases. Overall, this work emphasize the importance of testing LLMs for intersectional bias.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) may portray discrimination towards certain individuals, especially those characterized by multiple attributes (aka intersectional bias). Discovering intersectional bias in LLMs is challenging, as it involves complex inputs on multiple attributes (e.g. race and gender). To address this challenge, we propose HInter, a test technique that synergistically combines mutation analysis, dependency parsing and metamorphic oracles to automatically detect intersectional bias in LLMs. HInter generates test inputs by systematically mutating sentences using multiple mutations, validates inputs via a dependency invariant and detects biases by checking the LLM response on the original and mutated sentences. We evaluate HInter using six LLM architectures and 18 LLM models (GPT3.5, Llama2, BERT, etc) and find that 14.61% of the inputs generated by HInter expose intersectional bias. Results also show that our dependency invariant reduces false positives (incorrect test inputs) by an order of magnitude. Finally, we observed that 16.62% of intersectional bias errors are hidden, meaning that their corresponding atomic cases do not trigger biases. Overall, this work emphasize the importance of testing LLMs for intersectional bias.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 可能会描绘对某些个人的歧视，尤其是那些具有多种属性的人（也称为交叉偏见）。发现法学硕士中的交叉偏见具有挑战性，因为它涉及多个属性（例如种族和性别）的复杂输入。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 HInter，这是一种测试技术，它协同结合突变分析、依存解析和变形预言，自动检测法学硕士中的交叉偏差。 HInter 通过使用多个突变系统地突变句子来生成测试输入，通过依赖不变量验证输入，并通过检查原始句子和突变句子的 LLM 响应来检测偏差。我们使用 6 个 LLM 架构和 18 个 LLM 模型（GPT3.5、Llama2、BERT 等）评估 HInter，发现 HInter 生成的输入中有 14.61% 存在交叉偏差。结果还表明，我们的依赖不变性将误报（不正确的测试输入）减少了一个数量级。最后，我们观察到 16.62% 的交叉偏差错误被隐藏，这意味着它们相应的原子情况不会触发偏差。总的来说，这项工作强调了测试法学硕士交叉偏见的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HInter方法，用于自动检测大型语言模型中的隐藏交叉歧视偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效识别由多个属性（如种族和性别）组合产生的复杂交叉歧视偏差，需更精准的检测技术。
AI.method: 结合突变分析、依存句法解析和 metamorphic oracle 技术，系统生成测试输入并验证模型响应，通过依存不变性减少误报。
AI.result: 在6种架构18个模型中，HInter发现14.61%的输入存在交叉偏差，且16.62%的偏差未被原子案例触发，依存不变性使误报降低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 交叉歧视检测对LLM评估至关重要，HInter为揭示隐藏偏差提供了有效技术路径。

search_text: HInter: Exposing Hidden Intersectional Bias in Large Language Models HInter：揭示大型语言模型中隐藏的交叉偏差 Large Language Models (LLMs) may portray discrimination towards certain individuals, especially those characterized by multiple attributes (aka intersectional bias). Discovering intersectional bias in LLMs is challenging, as it involves complex inputs on multiple attributes (e.g. race and gender). To address this challenge, we propose HInter, a test technique that synergistically combines mutation analysis, dependency parsing and metamorphic oracles to automatically detect intersectional bias in LLMs. HInter generates test inputs by systematically mutating sentences using multiple mutations, validates inputs via a dependency invariant and detects biases by checking the LLM response on the original and mutated sentences. We evaluate HInter using six LLM architectures and 18 LLM models (GPT3.5, Llama2, BERT, etc) and find that 14.61% of the inputs generated by HInter expose intersectional bias. Results also show that our dependency invariant reduces false positives (incorrect test inputs) by an order of magnitude. Finally, we observed that 16.62% of intersectional bias errors are hidden, meaning that their corresponding atomic cases do not trigger biases. Overall, this work emphasize the importance of testing LLMs for intersectional bias. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 可能会描绘对某些个人的歧视，尤其是那些具有多种属性的人（也称为交叉偏见）。发现法学硕士中的交叉偏见具有挑战性，因为它涉及多个属性（例如种族和性别）的复杂输入。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 HInter，这是一种测试技术，它协同结合突变分析、依存解析和变形预言，自动检测法学硕士中的交叉偏差。 HInter 通过使用多个突变系统地突变句子来生成测试输入，通过依赖不变量验证输入，并通过检查原始句子和突变句子的 LLM 响应来检测偏差。我们使用 6 个 LLM 架构和 18 个 LLM 模型（GPT3.5、Llama2、BERT 等）评估 HInter，发现 HInter 生成的输入中有 14.61% 存在交叉偏差。结果还表明，我们的依赖不变性将误报（不正确的测试输入）减少了一个数量级。最后，我们观察到 16.62% 的交叉偏差错误被隐藏，这意味着它们相应的原子情况不会触发偏差。总的来说，这项工作强调了测试法学硕士交叉偏见的重要性。 本文提出HInter方法，用于自动检测大型语言模型中的隐藏交叉歧视偏差。 Badr Souani,Ezekiel Soremekun,Mike Papadakis,Setsuko Yokoyama,Sudipta Chattopadhyay,Yves Le Traon cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chong Su,Yingbin Fu,Zheyuan Hu,Jing Yang,Param Hanji,Shaojun Wang,Xuan Zhao,Cengiz Öztireli,Fangcheng Zhong
title: CHOrD: Generation of Collision-Free, House-Scale, and Organized Digital Twins for 3D Indoor Scenes with Controllable Floor Plans and Optimal Layouts
title_zh: CHorD：为具有可控平面图和最佳布局的 3D 室内场景生成无碰撞、房屋规模和有组织的数字孪生
comment: Chong Su and Yingbin Fu contributed equally to this work
comments: Chong Su and Yingbin Fu contributed equally to this work
abstract: We introduce CHOrD, a novel framework for scalable synthesis of 3D indoor scenes, designed to create house-scale, collision-free, and hierarchically structured indoor digital twins. In contrast to existing methods that directly synthesize the scene layout as a scene graph or object list, CHOrD incorporates a 2D image-based intermediate layout representation, enabling effective prevention of collision artifacts by successfully capturing them as out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios during generation. Furthermore, unlike existing methods, CHOrD is capable of generating scene layouts that adhere to complex floor plans with multi-modal controls, enabling the creation of coherent, house-wide layouts robust to both geometric and semantic variations in room structures. Additionally, we propose a novel dataset with expanded coverage of household items and room configurations, as well as significantly improved data quality. CHOrD demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on both the 3D-FRONT and our proposed datasets, delivering photorealistic, spatially coherent indoor scene synthesis adaptable to arbitrary floor plan variations.
summary: We introduce CHOrD, a novel framework for scalable synthesis of 3D indoor scenes, designed to create house-scale, collision-free, and hierarchically structured indoor digital twins. In contrast to existing methods that directly synthesize the scene layout as a scene graph or object list, CHOrD incorporates a 2D image-based intermediate layout representation, enabling effective prevention of collision artifacts by successfully capturing them as out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios during generation. Furthermore, unlike existing methods, CHOrD is capable of generating scene layouts that adhere to complex floor plans with multi-modal controls, enabling the creation of coherent, house-wide layouts robust to both geometric and semantic variations in room structures. Additionally, we propose a novel dataset with expanded coverage of household items and room configurations, as well as significantly improved data quality. CHOrD demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on both the 3D-FRONT and our proposed datasets, delivering photorealistic, spatially coherent indoor scene synthesis adaptable to arbitrary floor plan variations.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 CHOrD，这是一种用于可扩展合成 3D 室内场景的新颖框架，旨在创建房屋规模、无碰撞和分层结构的室内数字双胞胎。与直接将场景布局合成为场景图或对象列表的现有方法相比，CHOrD 结合了基于 2D 图像的中间布局表示，通过在生成过程中成功将碰撞伪影捕获为分布外 (OOD) 场景，可以有效防止碰撞伪影。此外，与现有方法不同，CHOrD 能够生成符合具有多模式控制的复杂平面图的场景布局，从而能够创建连贯的、全屋范围的布局，对房间结构的几何和语义变化都具有鲁棒性。此外，我们提出了一个新颖的数据集，扩大了家居用品和房间配置的覆盖范围，并显着提高了数据质量。 CHOrD 在 3D-FRONT 和我们提出的数据集上展示了最先进的性能，提供逼真、空间连贯的室内场景合成，可适应任意平面图变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHOrD框架，用于生成可扩展、无碰撞且层次结构化的3D室内场景数字孪生体，支持可控的平面布局和最优布局。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成室内场景时易出现碰撞问题且难以处理复杂平面布局，CHOrD通过引入2D图像中间表示和多模态控制解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用2D图像作为中间布局表示，将碰撞检测作为分布外场景处理；结合多模态控制生成符合复杂平面的布局，并构建包含更多家居物品和房间配置的新数据集。
AI.result: 在3D-FRONT和自建数据集上均达到最先进水平，生成的场景具有逼真视觉效果和空间一致性，可适配任意平面变化。
AI.conclusion: CHOrD通过创新的中间表示和多模态控制，有效生成高质量、无碰撞的室内数字孪生体，推动了房屋尺度场景合成技术的发展。

authors_text: Sepideh Shafiei,Shapour Hakam
title: Computational Extraction of Intonation and Tuning Systems from Multiple Microtonal Monophonic Vocal Recordings with Diverse Modes
title_zh: 从不同模式的多个微音单声道录音中计算提取语调和调音系统
abstract: This paper presents a computational methodology for analyzing intonation and deriving tuning systems in microtonal oral traditions, utilizing pitch histograms, Dynamic Time Warping (DTW), and optimization techniques, with a case study on a complete repertoire performed by a master of Iranian Classical Vocal Music (145 pieces). Pitch frequencies are extracted directly from vocal performances, and while alignment with MIDI notes is not a standard practice in our approach, we incorporate it where available, using DTW to refine interval analysis. By modeling intonation variations across multiple recordings, we derive structured tuning frameworks that capture both the flexibility of performance and the underlying systematic tendencies. Optimization techniques are applied to align intervals across the oral tradition repertoire, capturing the specific tunings and modal structures involved. Our methodology highlights the potential of computational techniques in advancing musicological and ethnomusicological research, offering a data-driven approach to defining tuning systems in microtonal vocal traditions.
summary: This paper presents a computational methodology for analyzing intonation and deriving tuning systems in microtonal oral traditions, utilizing pitch histograms, Dynamic Time Warping (DTW), and optimization techniques, with a case study on a complete repertoire performed by a master of Iranian Classical Vocal Music (145 pieces). Pitch frequencies are extracted directly from vocal performances, and while alignment with MIDI notes is not a standard practice in our approach, we incorporate it where available, using DTW to refine interval analysis. By modeling intonation variations across multiple recordings, we derive structured tuning frameworks that capture both the flexibility of performance and the underlying systematic tendencies. Optimization techniques are applied to align intervals across the oral tradition repertoire, capturing the specific tunings and modal structures involved. Our methodology highlights the potential of computational techniques in advancing musicological and ethnomusicological research, offering a data-driven approach to defining tuning systems in microtonal vocal traditions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种利用音高直方图、动态时间规整 (DTW) 和优化技术来分析微音口头传统中的语调和推导调音系统的计算方法，并以伊朗古典声乐大师演奏的完整曲目（145 首）为案例研究。音高频率直接从声乐表演中提取，虽然与 MIDI 音符对齐不是我们方法中的标准做法，但我们会在可用的情况下将其纳入其中，并使用 DTW 来完善音程分析。通过对多个录音的语调变化进行建模，我们得出了结构化的调音框架，可以捕捉演奏的灵活性和潜在的系统趋势。应用优化技术来调整口头传统曲目的音程，捕获所涉​​及的特定调音和调式结构。我们的方法强调了计算技术在推进音乐学和民族音乐学研究方面的潜力，提供了一种数据驱动的方法来定义微音声乐传统中的调音系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种计算方法，通过分析微分音口述传统中的音高和调音系统，利用音高直方图、动态时间规整（DTW）和优化技术，以伊朗古典声乐作品为例进行研究。
AI.motivation: 微分音音乐的调音系统复杂且缺乏标准化记录，传统分析方法难以捕捉其表演灵活性与系统性。本文旨在通过计算方法推动音乐学和民族音乐学研究，提供数据驱动的分析框架。
AI.method: 从声乐录音中提取音高频率，结合音高直方图与DTW进行区间分析，利用优化技术对齐不同录音中的区间，构建调音框架并捕捉模态结构。
AI.result: 基于145首伊朗古典声乐作品的分析，成功提取出反映表演灵活性与系统调音倾向的结构化框架，验证了计算方法在微分音传统研究中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 计算技术为微分音声乐传统的调音系统研究提供了新路径，有助于深入理解口述音乐的复杂性与系统性，推动跨学科研究发展。

Our methodology highlights the potential of computational techniques in advancing musicological and ethnomusicological research, offering a data-driven approach to defining tuning systems in microtonal vocal traditions. 本文提出了一种利用音高直方图、动态时间规整 (DTW) 和优化技术来分析微音口头传统中的语调和推导调音系统的计算方法，并以伊朗古典声乐大师演奏的完整曲目（145 首）为案例研究。音高频率直接从声乐表演中提取，虽然与 MIDI 音符对齐不是我们方法中的标准做法，但我们会在可用的情况下将其纳入其中，并使用 DTW 来完善音程分析。通过对多个录音的语调变化进行建模，我们得出了结构化的调音框架，可以捕捉演奏的灵活性和潜在的系统趋势。应用优化技术来调整口头传统曲目的音程，捕获所涉​​及的特定调音和调式结构。我们的方法强调了计算技术在推进音乐学和民族音乐学研究方面的潜力，提供了一种数据驱动的方法来定义微音声乐传统中的调音系统。 本文提出一种计算方法，通过分析微分音口述传统中的音高和调音系统，利用音高直方图、动态时间规整（DTW）和优化技术，以伊朗古典声乐作品为例进行研究。 Sepideh Shafiei,Shapour Hakam cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ahcen Aliouat,Elsa Dupraz
title: Goal-Oriented Source Coding using LDPC Codes for Compressed-Domain Image Classification
title_zh: 使用 LDPC 码进行压缩域图像分类的面向目标源编码
comment: 11 pages, 13 figures, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Communications (Under Review)
comments: 11 pages, 13 figures, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Communications (Under Review)
abstract: In the emerging field of goal-oriented communications, the focus has shifted from reconstructing data to directly performing specific learning tasks, such as classification, segmentation, or pattern recognition, on the received coded data. In the commonly studied scenario of classification from compressed images, a key objective is to enable learning directly on entropy-coded data, thereby bypassing the computationally intensive step of data reconstruction. Conventional entropy-coding methods, such as Huffman and Arithmetic coding, are effective for compression but disrupt the data structure, making them less suitable for direct learning without decoding. This paper investigates the use of low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes -- originally designed for channel coding -- as an alternative entropy-coding approach. It is hypothesized that the structured nature of LDPC codes can be leveraged more effectively by deep learning models for tasks like classification. At the receiver side, gated recurrent unit (GRU) models are trained to perform image classification directly on LDPC-coded data. Experiments on datasets like MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR show that LDPC codes outperform Huffman and Arithmetic coding in classification tasks, while requiring significantly smaller learning models. Furthermore, the paper analyzes why LDPC codes preserve data structure more effectively than traditional entropy-coding techniques and explores the impact of key code parameters on classification performance. These results suggest that LDPC-based entropy coding offers an optimal balance between learning efficiency and model complexity, eliminating the need for prior decoding.

Furthermore, the paper analyzes why LDPC codes preserve data structure more effectively than traditional entropy-coding techniques and explores the impact of key code parameters on classification performance. These results suggest that LDPC-based entropy coding offers an optimal balance between learning efficiency and model complexity, eliminating the need for prior decoding.
abstract_zh: 在面向目标的通信这一新兴领域，重点已从重建数据转移到直接对接收到的编码数据执行特定的学习任务，例如分类、分割或模式识别。在通常研究的压缩图像分类场景中，一个关键目标是能够直接在熵编码数据上进行学习，从而绕过数据重建的计算密集型步骤。传统的熵编码方法，例如霍夫曼和算术编码，对于压缩有效，但会破坏数据结构，使其不太适合无需解码的直接学习。本文研究了低密度奇偶校验（LDPC）码（最初设计用于信道编码）作为替代熵编码方法的使用。据推测，深度学习模型可以更有效地利用 LDPC 码的结构化性质来完成分类等任务。在接收端，门控循环单元 (GRU) 模型经过训练，可直接对 LDPC 编码数据执行图像分类。在 MNIST、Fashion-MNIST 和 CIFAR 等数据集上进行的实验表明，LDPC 编码在分类任务中优于 Huffman 和算术编码，同时需要的学习模型要小得多。此外，本文还分析了为什么 LDPC 码比传统熵编码技术更有效地保存数据结构，并探讨了关键代码参数对分类性能的影响。这些结果表明，基于 LDPC 的熵编码在学习效率和模型复杂性之间提供了最佳平衡，无需事先解码。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用LDPC码进行压缩域图像分类的源编码方法，无需解码即可直接进行分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统熵编码方法（如霍夫曼编码）会破坏数据结构，不利于直接学习。LDPC码的结构特性可能更适合深度学习模型利用。
AI.method: 采用LDPC码替代传统熵编码，在接收端训练GRU模型直接对LDPC编码数据进行图像分类，并分析码参数对分类性能的影响。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR数据集上，LDPC码在分类任务中优于霍夫曼和算术编码，且所需学习模型更小。
AI.conclusion: 基于LDPC的熵编码在学习效率和模型复杂度间取得平衡，无需解码即可实现压缩域分类。

authors_text: Priyanka Mandikal,Tushar Nagarajan,Alex Stoken,Zihui Xue,Kristen Grauman
title: SPOC: Spatially-Progressing Object State Change Segmentation in Video
title_zh: SPOC：视频中的空间渐进对象状态变化分割
abstract: Object state changes in video reveal critical cues about human and agent activity. However, existing methods are limited to temporal localization of when the object is in its initial state (e.g., cheese block) versus when it has completed a state change (e.g., grated cheese), offering no insight into where the change is unfolding. We propose to deepen the problem by introducing the spatially-progressing object state change segmentation task. The goal is to segment at the pixel-level those regions of an object that are actionable and those that are transformed. We show that state-of-the-art VLMs and video segmentation methods struggle at this task, underscoring its difficulty and novelty. As an initial baseline, we design a VLM-based pseudo-labeling approach, state-change dynamics constraints, and a novel WhereToChange benchmark built on in-the-wild Internet videos. Experiments on two datasets validate both the challenge of the new task as well as the promise of our model for localizing exactly where and how fast objects are changing in video. We further demonstrate useful implications for tracking activity progress to benefit robotic agents. Overall, our work positions spatial OSC segmentation as a new frontier task for video understanding: one that challenges current SOTA methods and invites the community to build more robust, state-change-sensitive representations. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/spoc-spatially-progressing-osc
summary: Object state changes in video reveal critical cues about human and agent activity. However, existing methods are limited to temporal localization of when the object is in its initial state (e.g., cheese block) versus when it has completed a state change (e.g., grated cheese), offering no insight into where the change is unfolding. We propose to deepen the problem by introducing the spatially-progressing object state change segmentation task. The goal is to segment at the pixel-level those regions of an object that are actionable and those that are transformed. We show that state-of-the-art VLMs and video segmentation methods struggle at this task, underscoring its difficulty and novelty. As an initial baseline, we design a VLM-based pseudo-labeling approach, state-change dynamics constraints, and a novel WhereToChange benchmark built on in-the-wild Internet videos. Experiments on two datasets validate both the challenge of the new task as well as the promise of our model for localizing exactly where and how fast objects are changing in video. We further demonstrate useful implications for tracking activity progress to benefit robotic agents. Overall, our work positions spatial OSC segmentation as a new frontier task for video understanding: one that challenges current SOTA methods and invites the community to build more robust, state-change-sensitive representations. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/spoc-spatially-progressing-osc
abstract_zh: 视频中对象状态的变化揭示了有关人类和代理活动的关键线索。然而，现有的方法仅限于对象处于初始状态（例如奶酪块）与完成状态变化（例如磨碎的奶酪）时的时间定位，无法洞察变化发生的位置。我们建议通过引入空间进展对象状态变化分割任务来深化该问题。目标是在像素级分割对象的可操作区域和已变换区域。我们展示了最先进的 VLM 和视频分割方法在这项任务上的表现，强调了它的难度和新颖性。作为初始基线，我们设计了基于 VLM 的伪标签方法、状态更改动态约束以及基于野外互联网视频的新颖的WhereToChange 基准。对两个数据集的实验验证了新任务的挑战以及我们的模型在准确定位视频中对象变化的位置和速度方面的前景。我们进一步展示了跟踪活动进度以使机器人代理受益的有用含义。总的来说，我们的工作将空间 OSC 分割定位为视频理解的一项新前沿任务：挑战当前的 SOTA 方法并邀请社区构建更强大、状态变化敏感的表示。项目页面：https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/spoc-spatially-progressing-osc

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视频分割任务——空间渐进物体状态变化分割（SPOC），旨在通过像素级分割识别物体中可操作区域与已变化区域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能定位物体状态变化的时间点，无法提供变化发生的空间位置信息，限制了对物体状态变化过程的深入理解及机器人等应用的指导价值。
AI.method: 设计基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的伪标签方法、状态变化动态约束，并构建基于互联网视频的WhereToChange基准测试集。
AI.result: 实验验证了新任务的挑战性，模型能有效定位物体变化的位置与速度，且对机器人活动跟踪具有实用价值。
AI.conclusion: SPOC任务为视频理解开辟了新方向，凸显当前SOTA方法的局限性，推动构建更敏感于状态变化的鲁棒表示模型。

authors_text: Edward Y. Chang,Longling Geng
title: SagaLLM: Context Management, Validation, and Transaction Guarantees for Multi-Agent LLM Planning
title_zh: SagaLLM：多代理 LLM 规划的上下文管理、验证和事务保证
abstract: This paper introduces SagaLLM, a structured multi-agent architecture designed to address four foundational limitations of current LLM-based planning systems: unreliable self-validation, context loss, lack of transactional safeguards, and insufficient inter-agent coordination. While recent frameworks leverage LLMs for task decomposition and multi-agent communication, they often fail to ensure consistency, rollback, or constraint satisfaction across distributed workflows. SagaLLM bridges this gap by integrating the Saga transactional pattern with persistent memory, automated compensation, and independent validation agents. It leverages LLMs' generative reasoning to automate key tasks traditionally requiring hand-coded coordination logic, including state tracking, dependency analysis, log schema generation, and recovery orchestration. Although SagaLLM relaxes strict ACID guarantees, it ensures workflow-wide consistency and recovery through modular checkpointing and compensable execution. Empirical evaluations across planning domains demonstrate that standalone LLMs frequently violate interdependent constraints or fail to recover from disruptions. In contrast, SagaLLM achieves significant improvements in consistency, validation accuracy, and adaptive coordination under uncertainty, establishing a robust foundation for real-world, scalable LLM-based multi-agent systems.

abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 SagaLLM，这是一种结构化的多智能体架构，旨在解决当前基于 LLM 的规划系统的四个基本限制：不可靠的自我验证、上下文丢失、缺乏事务保障以及智能体间协调不足。虽然最近的框架利用 LLM 进行任务分解和多代理通信，但它们通常无法确保分布式工作流程中的一致性、回滚或约束满足。 SagaLLM 通过将 Saga 事务模式与持久内存、自动补偿和独立验证代理集成来弥补这一差距。它利用法学硕士的生成推理来自动执行传统上需要手动编码协调逻辑的关键任务，包括状态跟踪、依赖性分析、日志模式生成和恢复编排。尽管 SagaLLM 放宽了严格的 ACID 保证，但它通过模块化检查点和可补偿执行来确保工作流程范围内的一致性和恢复。跨规划领域的实证评估表明，独立的法学硕士经常违反相互依赖的约束或无法从中断中恢复。相比之下，SagaLLM 在不确定性下的一致性、验证准确性和自适应协调方面取得了显着改进，为现实世界中、可扩展的基于 LLM 的多智能体系统奠定了坚实的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SagaLLM，一种通过上下文管理、验证和事务保障解决多智能体LLM规划系统基础限制的结构化架构。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的规划系统存在自我验证不可靠、上下文丢失、缺乏事务安全机制及智能体间协调不足等问题，导致分布式工作流一致性与恢复能力不足。
AI.method: 融合Saga事务模式与持久化内存、自动化补偿机制及独立验证代理，利用LLM生成推理能力自动处理状态追踪、依赖分析等传统需人工编码的协调逻辑。
AI.result: 实验表明，独立LLM常违反约束或无法恢复，而SagaLLM在一致性、验证准确率及不确定环境下的自适应协调能力上显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SagaLLM通过模块化检查点与可补偿执行确保工作流一致性，为可扩展的现实世界多智能体LLM系统奠定基础。

search_text: SagaLLM: Context Management, Validation, and Transaction Guarantees for Multi-Agent LLM Planning SagaLLM：多代理 LLM 规划的上下文管理、验证和事务保证 This paper introduces SagaLLM, a structured multi-agent architecture designed to address four foundational limitations of current LLM-based planning systems: unreliable self-validation, context loss, lack of transactional safeguards, and insufficient inter-agent coordination. While recent frameworks leverage LLMs for task decomposition and multi-agent communication, they often fail to ensure consistency, rollback, or constraint satisfaction across distributed workflows. SagaLLM bridges this gap by integrating the Saga transactional pattern with persistent memory, automated compensation, and independent validation agents. It leverages LLMs' generative reasoning to automate key tasks traditionally requiring hand-coded coordination logic, including state tracking, dependency analysis, log schema generation, and recovery orchestration. Although SagaLLM relaxes strict ACID guarantees, it ensures workflow-wide consistency and recovery through modular checkpointing and compensable execution. Empirical evaluations across planning domains demonstrate that standalone LLMs frequently violate interdependent constraints or fail to recover from disruptions. In contrast, SagaLLM achieves significant improvements in consistency, validation accuracy, and adaptive coordination under uncertainty, establishing a robust foundation for real-world, scalable LLM-based multi-agent systems. 本文介绍了 SagaLLM，这是一种结构化的多智能体架构，旨在解决当前基于 LLM 的规划系统的四个基本限制：不可靠的自我验证、上下文丢失、缺乏事务保障以及智能体间协调不足。虽然最近的框架利用 LLM 进行任务分解和多代理通信，但它们通常无法确保分布式工作流程中的一致性、回滚或约束满足。 SagaLLM 通过将 Saga 事务模式与持久内存、自动补偿和独立验证代理集成来弥补这一差距。它利用法学硕士的生成推理来自动执行传统上需要手动编码协调逻辑的关键任务，包括状态跟踪、依赖性分析、日志模式生成和恢复编排。尽管 SagaLLM 放宽了严格的 ACID 保证，但它通过模块化检查点和可补偿执行来确保工作流程范围内的一致性和恢复。跨规划领域的实证评估表明，独立的法学硕士经常违反相互依赖的约束或无法从中断中恢复。相比之下，SagaLLM 在不确定性下的一致性、验证准确性和自适应协调方面取得了显着改进，为现实世界中、可扩展的基于 LLM 的多智能体系统奠定了坚实的基础。 本文提出SagaLLM，一种通过上下文管理、验证和事务保障解决多智能体LLM规划系统基础限制的结构化架构。 Edward Y. authors_text: Ankur Barthwal,Molly Campbell,Ajay Kumar Shrestha
title: Privacy Ethics Alignment in AI: A Stakeholder-Centric Framework for Ethical AI
title_zh: 人工智能中的隐私道德一致性：以利益相关者为中心的人工智能道德框架
abstract: The increasing integration of artificial intelligence (AI) in digital ecosystems has reshaped privacy dynamics, particularly for young digital citizens navigating data-driven environments. This study explores evolving privacy concerns across three key stakeholder groups-young digital citizens, parents/educators, and AI professionals-and assesses differences in data ownership, trust, transparency, parental mediation, education, and risk-benefit perceptions. Employing a grounded theory methodology, this research synthesizes insights from key participants through structured surveys, qualitative interviews, and focus groups to identify distinct privacy expectations. Young digital citizens emphasized autonomy and digital agency, while parents and educators prioritized oversight and AI literacy. AI professionals focused on balancing ethical design with system performance. The analysis revealed significant gaps in transparency and digital literacy, underscoring the need for inclusive, stakeholder-driven privacy frameworks. Drawing on comparative thematic analysis, this study introduces the Privacy-Ethics Alignment in AI (PEA-AI) model, which conceptualizes privacy decision-making as a dynamic negotiation among stakeholders. By aligning empirical findings with governance implications, this research provides a scalable foundation for adaptive, youth-centered AI privacy governance.
summary: The increasing integration of artificial intelligence (AI) in digital ecosystems has reshaped privacy dynamics, particularly for young digital citizens navigating data-driven environments. This study explores evolving privacy concerns across three key stakeholder groups-young digital citizens, parents/educators, and AI professionals-and assesses differences in data ownership, trust, transparency, parental mediation, education, and risk-benefit perceptions. Employing a grounded theory methodology, this research synthesizes insights from key participants through structured surveys, qualitative interviews, and focus groups to identify distinct privacy expectations. Young digital citizens emphasized autonomy and digital agency, while parents and educators prioritized oversight and AI literacy. AI professionals focused on balancing ethical design with system performance. The analysis revealed significant gaps in transparency and digital literacy, underscoring the need for inclusive, stakeholder-driven privacy frameworks. Drawing on comparative thematic analysis, this study introduces the Privacy-Ethics Alignment in AI (PEA-AI) model, which conceptualizes privacy decision-making as a dynamic negotiation among stakeholders. By aligning empirical findings with governance implications, this research provides a scalable foundation for adaptive, youth-centered AI privacy governance.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 在数字生态系统中的日益融合重塑了隐私动态，特别是对于在数据驱动环境中导航的年轻数字公民而言。这项研究探讨了三个主要利益相关者群体（年轻数字公民、家长/教育工作者和人工智能专业人士）不断变化的隐私问题，并评估了数据所有权、信任、透明度、家长调解、教育和风险收益认知方面的差异。这项研究采用扎根的理论方法，通过结构化调查、定性访谈和焦点小组综合了主要参与者的见解，以确定不同的隐私期望。年轻的数字公民强调自主性和数字代理，而家长和教育工作者则优先考虑监督和人工智能素养。人工智能专业人士专注于平衡道德设计与系统性能。分析揭示了透明度和数字素养方面的巨大差距，强调了建立包容性、利益相关者驱动的隐私框架的必要性。基于比较主题分析，本研究引入了人工智能中的隐私与道德一致性（PEA-AI）模型，该模型将隐私决策概念化为利益相关者之间的动态协商。通过将实证研究结果与治理影响相结合，这项研究为自适应、以青年为中心的人工智能隐私治理提供了可扩展的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个以利益相关者为中心的框架，用于解决人工智能中的隐私伦理问题，重点关注年轻数字公民、家长/教育者和AI专业人士的隐私需求差异。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在数字生态系统的广泛应用，隐私动态发生改变，尤其年轻数字公民面临数据驱动环境的挑战，现有隐私框架未能满足多方利益相关者的差异化需求。
AI.method: 采用扎根理论方法，通过结构化问卷、定性访谈和焦点小组讨论，对三类关键利益相关者进行多维度数据收集与主题分析。
AI.result: 发现年轻用户强调自主权与数字代理权，家长/教育者关注监督与AI素养，AI从业者侧重伦理设计与系统性能平衡，揭示透明度和数字素养存在显著缺口。
AI.conclusion: 提出隐私-伦理对齐AI（PEA-AI）模型，构建动态协商机制，为适应性、以青年为中心的AI隐私治理提供可扩展的框架基础。

authors_text: Thivya Thogesan,Anupiya Nugaliyadde,Kok Wai Wong
title: Integration of Explainable AI Techniques with Large Language Models for Enhanced Interpretability for Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能技术与大型语言模型的集成，以增强情感分析的可解释性
abstract: Interpretability remains a key difficulty in sentiment analysis with Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly in high-stakes applications where it is crucial to comprehend the rationale behind forecasts. This research addressed this by introducing a technique that applies SHAP (Shapley Additive Explanations) by breaking down LLMs into components such as embedding layer,encoder,decoder and attention layer to provide a layer-by-layer knowledge of sentiment prediction. The approach offers a clearer overview of how model interpret and categorise sentiment by breaking down LLMs into these parts. The method is evaluated using the Stanford Sentiment Treebank (SST-2) dataset, which shows how different sentences affect different layers. The effectiveness of layer-wise SHAP analysis in clarifying sentiment-specific token attributions is demonstrated by experimental evaluations, which provide a notable enhancement over current whole-model explainability techniques. These results highlight how the suggested approach could improve the reliability and transparency of LLM-based sentiment analysis in crucial applications.
summary: Interpretability remains a key difficulty in sentiment analysis with Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly in high-stakes applications where it is crucial to comprehend the rationale behind forecasts. This research addressed this by introducing a technique that applies SHAP (Shapley Additive Explanations) by breaking down LLMs into components such as embedding layer,encoder,decoder and attention layer to provide a layer-by-layer knowledge of sentiment prediction. The approach offers a clearer overview of how model interpret and categorise sentiment by breaking down LLMs into these parts. The method is evaluated using the Stanford Sentiment Treebank (SST-2) dataset, which shows how different sentences affect different layers. The effectiveness of layer-wise SHAP analysis in clarifying sentiment-specific token attributions is demonstrated by experimental evaluations, which provide a notable enhancement over current whole-model explainability techniques. These results highlight how the suggested approach could improve the reliability and transparency of LLM-based sentiment analysis in crucial applications.
abstract_zh: 可解释性仍然是大型语言模型 (LLM) 情感分析的一个关键困难，特别是在高风险应用中，理解预测背后的基本原理至关重要。本研究通过引入一种应用SHAP（Shapley Additive Explanations）的技术来解决这个问题，将LLM分解为嵌入层、编码器、解码器和注意力层等组件，以提供逐层的情感预测知识。该方法通过将法学硕士分解为这些部分，更清晰地概述了模型如何解释和分类情绪。该方法使用斯坦福情感树库（SST-2）数据集进行评估，该数据集显示了不同句子如何影响不同层。实验评估证明了分层 SHAP 分析在澄清情绪特定标记归因方面的有效性，这比当前的整体模型可解释性技术提供了显着增强。这些结果凸显了所建议的方法如何提高关键应用中基于法学硕士的情感分析的可靠性和透明度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将SHAP方法与大型语言模型结合，通过分层解析提升情感分析的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在情感分析中的可解释性不足，尤其在高风险场景下需明确预测依据。
AI.method: 采用SHAP技术将LLM分解为嵌入层、编码器、解码器和注意力层，逐层分析情感预测逻辑。
AI.result: 在SST-2数据集实验中，分层SHAP分析显著优于整体模型解释方法，提升情感分类透明度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可增强LLM情感分析的可靠性与可解释性，适用于医疗、金融等关键领域。

search_text: Integration of Explainable AI Techniques with Large Language Models for Enhanced Interpretability for Sentiment Analysis 可解释的人工智能技术与大型语言模型的集成，以增强情感分析的可解释性 Interpretability remains a key difficulty in sentiment analysis with Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly in high-stakes applications where it is crucial to comprehend the rationale behind forecasts. This research addressed this by introducing a technique that applies SHAP (Shapley Additive Explanations) by breaking down LLMs into components such as embedding layer,encoder,decoder and attention layer to provide a layer-by-layer knowledge of sentiment prediction. The approach offers a clearer overview of how model interpret and categorise sentiment by breaking down LLMs into these parts. The method is evaluated using the Stanford Sentiment Treebank (SST-2) dataset, which shows how different sentences affect different layers. The effectiveness of layer-wise SHAP analysis in clarifying sentiment-specific token attributions is demonstrated by experimental evaluations, which provide a notable enhancement over current whole-model explainability techniques. These results highlight how the suggested approach could improve the reliability and transparency of LLM-based sentiment analysis in crucial applications. 可解释性仍然是大型语言模型 (LLM) 情感分析的一个关键困难，特别是在高风险应用中，理解预测背后的基本原理至关重要。本研究通过引入一种应用SHAP（Shapley Additive Explanations）的技术来解决这个问题，将LLM分解为嵌入层、编码器、解码器和注意力层等组件，以提供逐层的情感预测知识。该方法通过将法学硕士分解为这些部分，更清晰地概述了模型如何解释和分类情绪。该方法使用斯坦福情感树库（SST-2）数据集进行评估，该数据集显示了不同句子如何影响不同层。实验评估证明了分层 SHAP 分析在澄清情绪特定标记归因方面的有效性，这比当前的整体模型可解释性技术提供了显着增强。这些结果凸显了所建议的方法如何提高关键应用中基于法学硕士的情感分析的可靠性和透明度。 本文提出将SHAP方法与大型语言模型结合，通过分层解析提升情感分析的可解释性。 Thivya Thogesan,Anupiya Nugaliyadde,Kok Wai Wong cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Austin Shouli,Ankur Barthwal,Molly Campbell,Ajay Kumar Shrestha
title: Ethical AI for Young Digital Citizens: A Call to Action on Privacy Governance
title_zh: 面向年轻数字公民的道德人工智能：隐私治理行动呼吁
comment: Preprint Version | Published version is at journal "Security and Privacy"
comments: Preprint Version | Published version is at journal "Security and Privacy"
abstract: The rapid expansion of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in digital platforms used by youth has created significant challenges related to privacy, autonomy, and data protection. While AI-driven personalization offers enhanced user experiences, it often operates without clear ethical boundaries, leaving young users vulnerable to data exploitation and algorithmic biases. This paper presents a call to action for ethical AI governance, advocating for a structured framework that ensures youth-centred privacy protections, transparent data practices, and regulatory oversight. We outline key areas requiring urgent intervention, including algorithmic transparency, privacy education, parental data-sharing ethics, and accountability measures. Through this approach, we seek to empower youth with greater control over their digital identities and propose actionable strategies for policymakers, AI developers, and educators to build a fairer and more accountable AI ecosystem.
summary: The rapid expansion of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in digital platforms used by youth has created significant challenges related to privacy, autonomy, and data protection. While AI-driven personalization offers enhanced user experiences, it often operates without clear ethical boundaries, leaving young users vulnerable to data exploitation and algorithmic biases. This paper presents a call to action for ethical AI governance, advocating for a structured framework that ensures youth-centred privacy protections, transparent data practices, and regulatory oversight. We outline key areas requiring urgent intervention, including algorithmic transparency, privacy education, parental data-sharing ethics, and accountability measures. Through this approach, we seek to empower youth with greater control over their digital identities and propose actionable strategies for policymakers, AI developers, and educators to build a fairer and more accountable AI ecosystem.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 在年轻人使用的数字平台中的快速扩张带来了与隐私、自主和数据保护相关的重大挑战。虽然人工智能驱动的个性化提供了增强的用户体验，但它通常没有明确的道德界限，使年轻用户容易受到数据利用和算法偏见的影响。本文呼吁采取道德人工智能治理行动，倡导建立一个结构化框架，确保以青年为中心的隐私保护、透明的数据实践和监管监督。我们概述了需要紧急干预的关键领域，包括算法透明度、隐私教育、家长数据共享道德和问责措施。通过这种方法，我们寻求让年轻人更好地控制自己的数字身份，并为政策制定者、人工智能开发人员和教育工作者提出可行的策略，以建立一个更公平、更负责任的人工智能生态系统。

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁建立以青少年为中心的伦理AI治理框架，强化隐私保护与数据透明性。
AI.motivation: AI驱动的个性化服务使青少年面临数据滥用和算法偏见风险，现有技术缺乏明确伦理边界。
AI.method: 通过提出隐私保护框架、透明化算法、隐私教育及问责机制等行动策略进行呼吁。
AI.result: 为政策制定者、开发者和教育者提供可操作的伦理AI治理方案，推动青少年数字权利保障。
AI.conclusion: 需多方协作构建公平、透明的AI生态系统，赋予青少年对数字身份的自主控制权。

authors_text: Naresh Kumar Devulapally,Mingzhen Huang,Vishal Asnani,Shruti Agarwal,Siwei Lyu,Vishnu Suresh Lokhande
title: Your Text Encoder Can Be An Object-Level Watermarking Controller
title_zh: 您的文本编码器可以是对象级水印控制器
abstract: Invisible watermarking of AI-generated images can help with copyright protection, enabling detection and identification of AI-generated media. In this work, we present a novel approach to watermark images of T2I Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs). By only fine-tuning text token embeddings $W_*$, we enable watermarking in selected objects or parts of the image, offering greater flexibility compared to traditional full-image watermarking. Our method leverages the text encoder's compatibility across various LDMs, allowing plug-and-play integration for different LDMs. Moreover, introducing the watermark early in the encoding stage improves robustness to adversarial perturbations in later stages of the pipeline. Our approach achieves $99\%$ bit accuracy ($48$ bits) with a $10^5 \times$ reduction in model parameters, enabling efficient watermarking.
summary: Invisible watermarking of AI-generated images can help with copyright protection, enabling detection and identification of AI-generated media. In this work, we present a novel approach to watermark images of T2I Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs). By only fine-tuning text token embeddings $W_*$, we enable watermarking in selected objects or parts of the image, offering greater flexibility compared to traditional full-image watermarking. Our method leverages the text encoder's compatibility across various LDMs, allowing plug-and-play integration for different LDMs. Moreover, introducing the watermark early in the encoding stage improves robustness to adversarial perturbations in later stages of the pipeline. Our approach achieves $99\%$ bit accuracy ($48$ bits) with a $10^5 \times$ reduction in model parameters, enabling efficient watermarking.
abstract_zh: 人工智能生成图像的隐形水印有助于版权保护，从而能够检测和识别人工智能生成的媒体。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种处理 T2I 潜在扩散模型 (LDM) 水印图像的新颖方法。通过仅微调文本标记嵌入 $W_*$，我们可以在选定的对象或图像部分中启用水印，与传统的全图像水印相比，提供更大的灵活性。我们的方法利用文本编码器在各种 LDM 之间的兼容性，允许不同 LDM 的即插即用集成。此外，在编码阶段早期引入水印可以提高管道后期阶段对对抗性扰动的鲁棒性。我们的方法实现了 $99\%$ 位精度（$48$ 位），模型参数减少了 $10^5 \times$，从而实现了高效的水印。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本编码器的图像水印方法，实现对潜在扩散模型生成图像的对象级水印。
AI.motivation: 传统图像水印方法通常覆盖整个图像，缺乏灵活性，且参数量大影响效率，需更高效和灵活的方案。
AI.method: 通过微调文本嵌入矩阵W*，在编码阶段早期注入水印，利用文本编码器跨LDMs的兼容性，实现对象级水印的灵活控制。
AI.result: 在48比特水印下达到99%准确率，模型参数量减少10^5倍，实现高效水印。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在保持高准确率的同时，显著减少参数量，提升水印灵活性和对抗扰动鲁棒性，为AI生成图像版权保护提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Melvin Mokhtari
title: Human Digital Twins in Personalized Healthcare: An Overview and Future Perspectives
title_zh: 个性化医疗保健中的人类数字孪生：概述和未来展望
abstract: Digital twins (DTs) are redefining healthcare by paving the way for more personalized, proactive, and intelligent medical interventions. As the shift toward personalized care intensifies, there is a growing need for an individual's virtual replica that delivers the right treatment at the optimal time and in the most effective manner. The emerging concept of a Human Digital Twin (HDT) holds the potential to revolutionize the traditional healthcare system much like digital twins have transformed manufacturing and aviation. An HDT mirrors the physical entity of a human body through a dynamic virtual model that continuously reflects changes in molecular, physiological, emotional, and lifestyle factors. This digital representation not only supports remote monitoring, diagnosis, and prescription but also facilitates surgery, rehabilitation, and overall personalized care, thereby relieving pressure on conventional healthcare frameworks. Despite its promising advantages, there are considerable research challenges to overcome as HDT technology evolves. In this study, I will initially delineate the distinctions between traditional digital twins and HDTs, followed by an exploration of the networking architecture integral to their operation--from data acquisition and communication to computation, management, and decision-making--thereby offering insights into how these innovations may reshape the modern healthcare industry.
summary: Digital twins (DTs) are redefining healthcare by paving the way for more personalized, proactive, and intelligent medical interventions. As the shift toward personalized care intensifies, there is a growing need for an individual's virtual replica that delivers the right treatment at the optimal time and in the most effective manner. The emerging concept of a Human Digital Twin (HDT) holds the potential to revolutionize the traditional healthcare system much like digital twins have transformed manufacturing and aviation. An HDT mirrors the physical entity of a human body through a dynamic virtual model that continuously reflects changes in molecular, physiological, emotional, and lifestyle factors. This digital representation not only supports remote monitoring, diagnosis, and prescription but also facilitates surgery, rehabilitation, and overall personalized care, thereby relieving pressure on conventional healthcare frameworks. Despite its promising advantages, there are considerable research challenges to overcome as HDT technology evolves. In this study, I will initially delineate the distinctions between traditional digital twins and HDTs, followed by an exploration of the networking architecture integral to their operation--from data acquisition and communication to computation, management, and decision-making--thereby offering insights into how these innovations may reshape the modern healthcare industry.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生 (DT) 正在重新定义医疗保健，为更加个性化、主动和智能的医疗干预措施铺平道路。随着向个性化护理转变的加剧，对个人虚拟复制品的需求不断增长，以在最佳时间以最有效的方式提供正确的治疗。人类数字孪生 (HDT) 的新兴概念有可能彻底改变传统医疗保健系统，就像数字孪生改变了制造业和航空业一样。 HDT通过动态虚拟模型反映人体的物理实体，持续反映分子、生理、情感和生活方式因素的变化。这种数字表示不仅支持远程监控、诊断和处方，而且还有助于手术、康复和整体个性化护理，从而减轻传统医疗保健框架的压力。尽管 HDT 技术具有广阔的前景，但随着 HDT 技术的发展，仍有相当大的研究挑战需要克服。在这项研究中，我将首先描述传统数字孪生和 HDT 之间的区别，然后探索其运营中不可或缺的网络架构——从数据采集和通信到计算、管理和决策——从而深入了解这些创新如何重塑现代医疗保健行业。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了人体数字孪生（HDT）在个性化医疗中的应用，并探讨其未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 传统医疗体系面临个性化治疗需求与资源压力，HDT通过动态虚拟模型提供精准医疗方案，具有革新潜力。
AI.method: 对比传统数字孪生与HDT差异，分析其网络架构（数据采集、通信、计算、决策等环节）。
AI.result: 揭示HDT在远程监护、诊断、手术等场景的应用价值，同时指出技术演进中的研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: HDT有望重塑现代医疗体系，但需突破数据整合、模型精度及伦理规范等关键技术难题。

authors_text: Patricia Medina
title: Integrating Product Coefficients for Improved 3D LiDAR Data Classification
title_zh: 积分乘积系数以改进 3D LiDAR 数据分类
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, to be published in Data Management, Analytics, and Innovation, Proceedings of ICDMAI 2025 by Springer
comments: 13 pages, 5 figures, to be published in Data Management, Analytics, and Innovation, Proceedings of ICDMAI 2025 by Springer
abstract: In this paper, we address the enhancement of classification accuracy for 3D point cloud Lidar data, an optical remote sensing technique that estimates the three-dimensional coordinates of a given terrain. Our approach introduces product coefficients, theoretical quantities derived from measure theory, as additional features in the classification process. We define and present the formulation of these product coefficients and conduct a comparative study, using them alongside principal component analysis (PCA) as feature inputs. Results demonstrate that incorporating product coefficients into the feature set significantly improves classification accuracy within this new framework.
summary: In this paper, we address the enhancement of classification accuracy for 3D point cloud Lidar data, an optical remote sensing technique that estimates the three-dimensional coordinates of a given terrain. Our approach introduces product coefficients, theoretical quantities derived from measure theory, as additional features in the classification process. We define and present the formulation of these product coefficients and conduct a comparative study, using them alongside principal component analysis (PCA) as feature inputs. Results demonstrate that incorporating product coefficients into the feature set significantly improves classification accuracy within this new framework.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们致力于提高 3D 点云激光雷达数据的分类精度，这是一种估计给定地形三维坐标的光学遥感技术。我们的方法引入了乘积系数，即从测度论导出的理论量，作为分类过程中的附加特征。我们定义并提出这些乘积系数的公式，并进行比较研究，将它们与主成分分析 (PCA) 一起用作特征输入。结果表明，将乘积系数合并到特征集中可以显着提高这个新框架内的分类准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入乘积系数作为新特征，提升3D LiDAR数据分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D LiDAR数据分类方法在准确性和特征提取上存在不足，需探索更有效的特征融合策略。
AI.method: 提出基于测度论的乘积系数作为新特征，并与PCA结合，构建特征集进行分类。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，引入乘积系数后分类准确率显著提高，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 乘积系数能有效增强3D LiDAR数据分类性能，为后续研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Wonwoong Cho,Yan-Ying Chen,Matthew Klenk,David I. Inouye,Yanxia Zhang
title: Att-Adapter: A Robust and Precise Domain-Specific Multi-Attributes T2I Diffusion Adapter via Conditional Variational Autoencoder
title_zh: Att-Adapter：通过条件变分自动编码器实现的鲁棒且精确的特定领域多属性 T2I 扩散适配器
comment: ICCV'25 (Highlight), The project page is available at https://tri-mac.github.io/att-adapter/
comments: ICCV'25 (Highlight), The project page is available at https://tri-mac.github.io/att-adapter/
abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) Diffusion Models have achieved remarkable performance in generating high quality images. However, enabling precise control of continuous attributes, especially multiple attributes simultaneously, in a new domain (e.g., numeric values like eye openness or car width) with text-only guidance remains a significant challenge. To address this, we introduce the Attribute (Att) Adapter, a novel plug-and-play module designed to enable fine-grained, multi-attributes control in pretrained diffusion models. Our approach learns a single control adapter from a set of sample images that can be unpaired and contain multiple visual attributes. The Att-Adapter leverages the decoupled cross attention module to naturally harmonize the multiple domain attributes with text conditioning. We further introduce Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) to the Att-Adapter to mitigate overfitting, matching the diverse nature of the visual world. Evaluations on two public datasets show that Att-Adapter outperforms all LoRA-based baselines in controlling continuous attributes. Additionally, our method enables a broader control range and also improves disentanglement across multiple attributes, surpassing StyleGAN-based techniques. Notably, Att-Adapter is flexible, requiring no paired synthetic data for training, and is easily scalable to multiple attributes within a single model.
summary: Text-to-Image (T2I) Diffusion Models have achieved remarkable performance in generating high quality images. However, enabling precise control of continuous attributes, especially multiple attributes simultaneously, in a new domain (e.g., numeric values like eye openness or car width) with text-only guidance remains a significant challenge. To address this, we introduce the Attribute (Att) Adapter, a novel plug-and-play module designed to enable fine-grained, multi-attributes control in pretrained diffusion models. Our approach learns a single control adapter from a set of sample images that can be unpaired and contain multiple visual attributes. The Att-Adapter leverages the decoupled cross attention module to naturally harmonize the multiple domain attributes with text conditioning. We further introduce Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) to the Att-Adapter to mitigate overfitting, matching the diverse nature of the visual world. Evaluations on two public datasets show that Att-Adapter outperforms all LoRA-based baselines in controlling continuous attributes. Additionally, our method enables a broader control range and also improves disentanglement across multiple attributes, surpassing StyleGAN-based techniques. Notably, Att-Adapter is flexible, requiring no paired synthetic data for training, and is easily scalable to multiple attributes within a single model.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像（T2I）扩散模型在生成高质量图像方面取得了显着的性能。然而，在新领域（例如，眼睛睁开度或汽车宽度等数值）中，通过纯文本指导来精确控制连续属性，尤其是同时控制多个属性，仍然是一个重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了属性（Att）适配器，这是一种新颖的即插即用模块，旨在在预训练的扩散模型中实现细粒度的多属性控制。我们的方法从一组可以不配对并包含多个视觉属性的示例图像中学习单个控制适配器。 Att-Adapter 利用解耦的交叉注意模块来自然地协调多个域属性与文本调节。我们进一步向 Att-Adapter 引入条件变分自动编码器（CVAE），以减轻过度拟合，匹配视觉世界的多样性。对两个公共数据集的评估表明，Att-Adapter 在控制连续属性方面优于所有基于 LoRA 的基线。此外，我们的方法能够实现更广泛的控制范围，并且还改善了多个属性的解缠，超越了基于 StyleGAN 的技术。值得注意的是，Att-Adapter 非常灵活，不需要配对合成数据进行训练，并且可以轻松扩展到单个模型中的多个属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Att-Adapter的模块，用于在预训练的文本到图像扩散模型中实现对连续多属性的精细控制。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在生成高质量图像方面表现优异，但在仅通过文本指导实现新领域中多个连续属性的精确控制方面仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 该方法引入了一个称为Att-Adapter的新型即插即用模块，利用解耦的交叉注意力模块与文本条件进行自然协调，并结合条件变分自编码器（CVAE）以减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的评估表明，Att-Adapter在控制连续属性方面优于所有基于LoRA的基线方法，并且实现了更广的控制范围和更好的多属性解耦。
AI.conclusion: Att-Adapter方法灵活，无需配对的合成数据进行训练，且易于扩展到多个属性，为多属性控制提供了新的解决方案。

However, enabling precise control of continuous attributes, especially multiple attributes simultaneously, in a new domain (e.g., numeric values like eye openness or car width) with text-only guidance remains a significant challenge. To address this, we introduce the Attribute (Att) Adapter, a novel plug-and-play module designed to enable fine-grained, multi-attributes control in pretrained diffusion models. Our approach learns a single control adapter from a set of sample images that can be unpaired and contain multiple visual attributes. The Att-Adapter leverages the decoupled cross attention module to naturally harmonize the multiple domain attributes with text conditioning. We further introduce Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) to the Att-Adapter to mitigate overfitting, matching the diverse nature of the visual world. Evaluations on two public datasets show that Att-Adapter outperforms all LoRA-based baselines in controlling continuous attributes. Additionally, our method enables a broader control range and also improves disentanglement across multiple attributes, surpassing StyleGAN-based techniques. Notably, Att-Adapter is flexible, requiring no paired synthetic data for training, and is easily scalable to multiple attributes within a single model. 文本到图像（T2I）扩散模型在生成高质量图像方面取得了显着的性能。然而，在新领域（例如，眼睛睁开度或汽车宽度等数值）中，通过纯文本指导来精确控制连续属性，尤其是同时控制多个属性，仍然是一个重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了属性（Att）适配器，这是一种新颖的即插即用模块，旨在在预训练的扩散模型中实现细粒度的多属性控制。我们的方法从一组可以不配对并包含多个视觉属性的示例图像中学习单个控制适配器。 Att-Adapter 利用解耦的交叉注意模块来自然地协调多个域属性与文本调节。我们进一步向 Att-Adapter 引入条件变分自动编码器（CVAE），以减轻过度拟合，匹配视觉世界的多样性。对两个公共数据集的评估表明，Att-Adapter 在控制连续属性方面优于所有基于 LoRA 的基线。此外，我们的方法能够实现更广泛的控制范围，并且还改善了多个属性的解缠，超越了基于 StyleGAN 的技术。值得注意的是，Att-Adapter 非常灵活，不需要配对合成数据进行训练，并且可以轻松扩展到单个模型中的多个属性。 本文提出了一种名为Att-Adapter的模块，用于在预训练的文本到图像扩散模型中实现对连续多属性的精细控制。 Wonwoong Cho,Yan-Ying Chen,Matthew Klenk,David I. Inouye,Yanxia Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Yu,Yang Zheng,Lei Wang,Yongqi Wang,Shengfan Xu
title: Design of an Expression Recognition Solution Based on the Global Channel-Spatial Attention Mechanism and Proportional Criterion Fusion
title_zh: 基于全局通道空间注意力机制和比例准则融合的表情识别方案设计
abstract: Facial expression recognition is a challenging classification task that holds broad application prospects in the field of human-computer interaction. This paper aims to introduce the method we will adopt in the 8th Affective and Behavioral Analysis in the Wild (ABAW) Competition, which will be held during the Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) in 2025.First of all, we apply the frequency masking technique and the method of extracting data at equal time intervals to conduct targeted processing on the original videos. Then, based on the residual hybrid convolutional neural network and the multi-branch convolutional neural network respectively, we design feature extraction models for image and audio sequences. In particular, we propose a global channel-spatial attention mechanism to enhance the features initially extracted from both the audio and image modalities respectively.Finally, we adopt a decision fusion strategy based on the proportional criterion to fuse the classification results of the two single modalities, obtain an emotion probability vector, and output the final emotional classification. We also design a coarse - fine granularity loss function to optimize the performance of the entire network, which effectively improves the accuracy of facial expression recognition.In the facial expression recognition task of the 8th ABAW Competition, our method ranked third on the official validation set. This result fully confirms the effectiveness and competitiveness of the method we have proposed.
summary: Facial expression recognition is a challenging classification task that holds broad application prospects in the field of human-computer interaction. This paper aims to introduce the method we will adopt in the 8th Affective and Behavioral Analysis in the Wild (ABAW) Competition, which will be held during the Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) in 2025.First of all, we apply the frequency masking technique and the method of extracting data at equal time intervals to conduct targeted processing on the original videos. Then, based on the residual hybrid convolutional neural network and the multi-branch convolutional neural network respectively, we design feature extraction models for image and audio sequences. In particular, we propose a global channel-spatial attention mechanism to enhance the features initially extracted from both the audio and image modalities respectively.Finally, we adopt a decision fusion strategy based on the proportional criterion to fuse the classification results of the two single modalities, obtain an emotion probability vector, and output the final emotional classification. We also design a coarse - fine granularity loss function to optimize the performance of the entire network, which effectively improves the accuracy of facial expression recognition.In the facial expression recognition task of the 8th ABAW Competition, our method ranked third on the official validation set. This result fully confirms the effectiveness and competitiveness of the method we have proposed.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别是一项具有挑战性的分类任务，在人机交互领域具有广阔的应用前景。本文旨在介绍我们在2025年计算机视觉与模式识别会议（CVPR）期间举办的第八届野外情感与行为分析（ABAW）竞赛中将采用的方法。首先，我们应用频率掩蔽技术和等时间间隔提取数据的方法对原始视频进行针对性处理。然后，分别基于残差混合卷积神经网络和多分支卷积神经网络，设计了图像和音频序列的特征提取模型。特别是，我们提出了一种全局通道空间注意力机制来增强最初分别从音频和图像模态提取的特征。最后，我们采用基于比例准则的决策融合策略来融合两种单一模态的分类结果，获得情感概率向量，并输出最终的情感分类。我们还设计了粗-细粒度损失函数来优化整个网络的性能，有效提高了面部表情识别的准确性。在第八届ABAW竞赛的面部表情识别任务中，我们的方法在官方验证集上排名第三。这一结果充分证实了我们提出的方法的有效性和竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于全局通道-空间注意力机制和比例准则融合的表情识别解决方案，旨在提升多模态情感分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别在人机交互中具有广泛应用前景，但面临复杂环境下的分类挑战。本文旨在通过改进多模态特征融合方法，在ABAW竞赛中提升表情识别性能。
AI.method: 采用频域掩码和等时间间隔采样预处理视频数据，分别构建残差混合CNN和多分支CNN提取图像与音频特征，并引入全局通道-空间注意力机制强化特征。通过比例准则决策融合策略整合双模态分类结果，结合粗细粒度损失函数优化网络性能。
AI.result: 在第八届ABAW竞赛官方验证集上取得第三名成绩，验证了方法的有效性和竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多模态融合框架和注意力机制有效提升了表情识别准确率，为复杂场景下的情感计算提供了可行方案。
